item.name: G FUEL!
item.keywords: gfuel energy drink airhorn secret blue
item.bot_description:
<:stat_exclamation:1263940092494483568> This is a promotional item that can appear only during special daily runs, or by activating the secret easter egg seed GFVE LLLL.
^n^nModifies Isaac's tears by replacing them with various guns, also affecting his stats. The effects of the item change based on how many copies of it have been acquired.
^n^nEach copy of the item grants <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_speed:1263940240675045417> +0.2 speed that breaks the normal speed cap of 2.0.
^n^nThe item appears in the starting room of each floor. During Curse of the Labyrinth!, 2 copies of the item will appear.
^n^nEvery explosion effect is replaced with stock explosion footage and sound effects.
^n^nMakes enemies explode on death. The explosion is purely cosmetic and does not deal additional damage.
^n^nAll consumable spawn animations are accompanied by explosion sprites as well.
^n^nEnemies grant far more score on death than usual. The amount of score is displayed when they die.
^n^nWater and blood in rooms is replaced with a light blue liquid.
^n^nPressing the drop button plays an airhorn sound effect.
^n^nMost special floor tiles are replaced with G Fuel ones.
^n^nReplaces Isaac's nightmares during floor transition with unique G Fuel-themed versions.

^n^n1st copy^n^n
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> +0.5 tears.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_shotspeed:1263940211591876651> +0.2 shot speed.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +0.75 damage.

^n^n2nd copy^n^n
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> +0.5 tears.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_shotspeed:1263940211591876651> +1.8 shot speed.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +0.75 damage.
^n^nReplaces Isaac's tears with bullets that have increased knockback.
^n^nSpeeds up the game. The game is further sped up with each subsequent copy.

^n^n3rd copy^n^n
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> huge fire rate increase.
^n<:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> huge damage decrease.
^n^nChanges the firing pattern into 2 accurate, rapid-fire streams of bullets.

^n^n4th copy^n^n
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> huge damage increase.
^n<:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> huge fire rate decrease.
^n^nChanges the firing pattern to a shotgun that shoots 8 bullets in a large spread at once. The bullets bounce off on impact with walls and obstacles.
^n^nEnemies gain a chance to multiply themselves. Each subsequent copy increases the number of multiplications.

^n^n5th copy^n^n
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> damage increase.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> fire rate increase.
^n^nChanges the attack into a slug shotgun whose bullets deal 4x Isaac's damage and bounce on impact with walls and obstacles.

^n^n6th copy^n^n
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> damage increase.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> huge fire rate increase.
^n^nChanges the attack into a rapid-firing minigun with low accuracy, that also pushes Isaac back when shooting. The bullets deal 60% of Isaac's damage.

^n^n7th copy^n^n
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> damage increase.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_range:1263940180163821659> +5 range.
^n<:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> huge fire rate decrease.
^n^nChanges the attack into a rocket launcher that deals explosive damage equal to 4x Isaac's damage to nearby enemies. The explosion can hurt Isaac for half a heart. It can destroy doors and obstacles.

^n^n8th copy^n^n
Grants a random weapon from the previously listed, also using its stat changes.

^n^n9th copy onwards^n^n
Grants a random weapon, and applies a random tear effect.

item.name: Halo of Flies
item.bot_description: Spawns 2 Pretty Flies that block enemy shots.^n^nThese flies will instantly kill some fly enemies upon contact.^n^nNo more than 3 Pretty Flies can be obtained at a time.

item.name: Little Steven
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that follows Isaac around and fires homing tears that do 3.5 damage.
^n^nThe familiar shoots 1.36 times per second.
^n^nCan drop by defeating Steven.

item.name: The Halo
item.keywords: yellow gold angel stats damage tears range speed heal
item.unlock_method: Use {{i|The Bible}} on Mom, Mom's Heart, or It Lives!

item.name: Mom's Bottle of Pills
item.bot_description: Gives Isaac a random pill.

item.name: The Common Cold
item.bot_description:
Adds a chance to fire poison tears that deal damage over time when inflicted.
^n^nThe poison hits enemies 2 times, dealing a total of 2x Isaac's damage.
^n^nThe chance to fire a poison tear starts at 25% with 0 luck and maximizes at 100% with 12 luck.

item.name: The Parasite
item.unlock_method: Pick up any 2 items with the {{tag|dead}} tag in a single run.
item.bot_description:
Upon impact with obstacles or enemies, tears split into 2 smaller tears with half damage and half range.
^n^nOnly tears with damage greater than 1 are affected.

item.name: The D6
item.bot_description: Rerolls every item in the current room into another item from the current room's item pool.

item.name: Mr. Mega
item.bot_description: <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_bomb:1263944832515178559> +5 bombs.^n^nIncreases the damage and blast radius of Isaac's bombs. Damage is increased to 185.^n^nMakes the screen shake after a bomb explodes.^n^nCan drop from the Super Wrath mini-boss.

item.name: The Pinking Shears
item.bot_description:
Separates Isaac's head from his body for the current room. Only the head will be under Isaac's control, which gains flight.
^n^nThe body will seek out to enemies and deal 5.5 damage per tick (23.57 per second).
^n^nThe body's speed is dependent on Isaac's speed stat.

item.name: The Wafer
item.bot_description:
Reduces all damage taken to half a heart.
^n^nGiant champions that deal 2 full hearts of damage will instead deal only 1 full heart.

item.name: Money = Power
item.bot_description: <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +0.04 damage for every penny Isaac has.

item.name: 1up!
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770> +1 extra life.
^n^nGrants a familiar that follows Isaac.
^n^nRespawns Isaac with full health in the previous room, or half a soul heart if he has no red heart containers.
^n^nThe item is removed from Isaac's inventory after it respawns Isaac.

item.name: Mom's Contacts
item.unlock_method: Pick up 3 {{tag|mom}} items in a single run.
item.bot_description: <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_range:1263940180163821659> +1.5 range.^n^nAdds a 20% chance to shoot petrifying tears that stop enemies in place and prevent them from moving or attacking for 1 second.^n^nThe activation rate goes up to around 50% with 20 luck.

item.name: The Bean
item.bot_description:
Isaac farts, knocking back enemies and reflecting projectiles, making them deal damage to enemies.
^n^nThe fart deals 5 damage and poisons any nearby enemies for 6 ticks. The poison deals damage equal to Isaac's.
^n^nThe area of effect is 2.5 tiles in all directions.

item.name: Guardian Angel
item.bot_description:
Spawns an orbital familiar that blocks enemy shots and deals 7 damage per tick (52.5 per second).
^n^nIncreases the speed of all orbiting familiars.

item.name: Demon Baby
item.bot_description: Spawns a familiar that follows Isaac and automatically fires at enemies in its range 3 times per second, dealing 3 damage per shot.

item.name: Mom's Knife
item.bot_description:
Replaces Isaac's tears with a knife that pierces through enemies and can travel through obstacles.
^n^nHolding down the fire button increases the knife's range and power.
^n^nThe knife deals 2x Isaac's damage 20 times per second while held, and 6x Isaac's damage at about 1/3 full charge. Damage quickly drops to 2x Isaac's damage when returning regardless of charge. Further charging only increases the maximum range.
^n^nCan be fired diagonally by holding down 2 firing buttons at once.

item.name: Ouija Board
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> +0.5 tears.
^n^nGrants spectral tears that can travel through obstacles.

item.name: 9 Volt
item.bot_description:
*On pickup:*^nFully charges Isaac's active item.
^n^n*While held:*^nGrants 1 bar of charge when using any active item that has more than 1 bar of recharge time.
^n^nIf the current active item has a recharge time of 1 bar, then it will be changed to a timed recharge of 15 seconds.
^n^nRecharging can happen only in a room with enemies.
^n^nMakes timed recharge items start at half charge, reducing their recharge time by 50%.

item.name: Dead Bird
item.bot_description:
Taking damage summons a bird familiar that chases enemies for the remainder of the room.
^n^nThe familiar deals 2 damage per tick (4.29 per second).
^n^nThe familiar will remain active between rooms as long as Isaac has half or no Red Hearts (1 or less as Eve).

item.name: Brimstone
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> ×0.33 fire rate multiplier.
^n^nReplaces Isaac's tears with a laser beam that must be charged.
^n^nThe beam pierces through enemies and obstacles and has infinite range.
^n^nThe beam deals damage equal to Isaac's damage each tick. Each shot deals damage for 9 ticks, resulting in a total of 9x Isaac's damage in about ~0.63 seconds.
^n^nStarting from 15 fire rate, the beam can last indefinitely as long as a fire button is held. Higher fire rates will result in higher damage per tick and a larger scale.
^n^nAcquiring a second copy of Brimstone grants <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> ×1.2 damage multiplier and <:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +1 damage. The width of the laser is doubled as well.
^n^nAny additional copies only grant <:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +1 damage.

item.name: Blood Bag
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_red:1263940190515232838> +1 full Red Heart container.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_speed:1263940240675045417> +0.3 speed.
^n^nRefills 4 red heart containers.
^n^nCan drop as a final payout from a Blood Donation Machine.

item.name: Magic Mushroom
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_red:1263940190515232838> +1 full Red Heart container.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +0.3 damage.^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> ×1.5 damage multiplier.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_range:1263940180163821659> +2.5 range.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_speed:1263940240675045417> +0.3 speed.
^n^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_size:1263944884474347630> Increases Isaac's size by +25% without affecting his hitbox.
^n^nFully heals Isaac.
^n^nCan very rarely drop when destroying mushrooms.

item.name: Odd Mushroom
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_red:1263940190515232838> +1 full Red Heart container.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +1 damage.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_range:1263940180163821659> +1.5 range.
^n<:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488><:stat_speed:1263940240675045417> -0.2 speed.
^n^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_size:1263944884474347630> Makes Isaac's head larger, which on its own is only a visual effect. If taken when Isaac is smaller than the default, the Mushroom also increases his hitbox slightly.

item.name: Whore of Babylon
item.keywords: red black moon devil damage speed eve
item.bot_description:
Whenever Isaac has half a red heart or less, he enters the Whore of Babylon state which grants the following effects:
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +1.5 damage.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_speed:1263940240675045417> +0.3 speed.
^n^nThe effect lasts for the remainder of the room after healing.
^n^nWhen playing as Eve, the effect will activate at one full red heart or less and will also increase her damage multiplier to ×1.

item.name: Monster Manual
item.bot_description: Summons a random familiar for the remainder of the floor.^n^nOnly familiars that have the monstermanual tag can be summoned.

item.name: Dead Sea Scrolls
item.bot_description:
Activates a random active item effect from the following:
^n• Anarchist Cookbook
^n• Best Friend
^n• Bob's Rotten Head
^n• The Book of Belial
^n• Book of Revelations
^n• Book of Shadows
^n• The Book of Sin
^n• Crack the Sky
^n• Crystal Ball
^n• Deck of Cards
^n• Doctor's Remote
^n• The Gamekid
^n• The Hourglass
^n• Lemon Mishap
^n• Mom's Bottle of Pills
^n• Mom's Bra
^n• Mom's Pad
^n• Monster Manual
^n• Monstro's Tooth
^n• Mr. Boom
^n• My Little Unicorn
^n• The Nail
^n• The Necronomicon
^n• The Pinking Shears
^n• Prayer Card
^n• Shoop da Whoop!
^n• Spider Butt
^n• Tammy's Head
^n• Telepathy For Dummies
^n• Teleport!
^n• We Need To Go Deeper!
^n• Yum Heart

item.name: Bobby-Bomb
item.bot_description: <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_bomb:1263944832515178559> +5 bombs.^n^nBombs gain a homing effect.

item.name: Razor Blade
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +1.2 damage for the current room.
^n<:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488><:stat_red:1263940190515232838> -1 full red heart.
^n^nSubsequent uses in the same room will deal only <:stat_halfred:1263940116741754992> half a heart of damage.

item.name: Forget Me Now
item.bot_description:
Restarts and regenerates the current floor.
^n^nThis counts as entering a new floor.

item.name: Forever alone
item.bot_description:
Spawns a blue orbital fly that orbits a long distance from Isaac and deals 2 damage per tick (30 per second).
^n^nCan drop from the Super Envy mini-boss.

item.name: Bucket of Lard
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_red:1263940190515232838> +2 full heart containers.
^n<:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488><:stat_speed:1263940240675045417> -0.2 speed.
^n^nCan drop from the Super Gluttony mini-boss.

item.name: The Virus
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_speed:1263940240675045417> +0.2 speed.
^n^nInflicts poison on enemies who make contact with Isaac.
^n^nThe poison lasts for 6-7 ticks and deals damage equal to 0.2 × HeartContainers ^ 2 + 2. The poison can be continuously applied to bossses which normally are immune to status effects for a brief time after being inflicted with one.
^n^nMakes Isaac deal 24 contact damage per tick on top of applying poison (48 damage per second).
^n^nCan be dropped from the Lust mini-boss.

item.name: A Pony
item.bot_description: *While held:*^nGrants flight and sets Isaac's minimum <:stat_speed:1263940240675045417> speed to 1.5. The speed cannot go below this point as long as the item is held.^n^n*On use:*^nIsaac charges in the direction he's facing, gaining invincibility during the charge and dealing contact damage to enemies.^n^nThe dash deals 4 × DamageStat + 28.^n^nThe dash can persist between multiple rooms if lined up correctly. This means it can be used to enter Curse Rooms for free.^n^nThe invincibility will not protect against Blood Donation Machines, Devil Beggars or similar self-sacrifice methods.^n^nCan drop by defeating The Headless Horseman.

item.name: Bomb Bag
item.bot_description: Spawns a familiar that follows Isaac and drops a random type of bomb every 3 rooms.^n^nThe first drop happens after 2 rooms.

item.name: A Lump of Coal
item.bot_description: Tears gain a flat damage bonus of about +0.5-0.6 per tile of distance traveled, unaffected by other multipliers.^n^nCan drop by defeating Krampus.

item.name: Guppy's Tail
item.bot_description:
Grants a 33% chance of replacing room clear rewards with a Chest or a Locked Chest.
^n^nGrants a 22% chance to replace the room clear reward with nothing.
^n^nDue to these effects, keys become more scarce as they can often times be replaced with Locked Chests.

item.name: IV Bag
item.bot_description:
Spawns coins on the cost of half a red heart (or a full heart starting from The Womb).
^n^nEach use pays out with 1-2 coins on Normal Mode or 1 coin on <:stat_hard:1263944869878173857> Hard Mode.
^n^nSpawns 0-1 coins instead when used by Keeper or Tainted Keeper.
^n^nCan drop as a final payout from a Blood Donation Machine.

item.name: Best Friend
item.bot_description: Spawns a decoy that distracts enemies and makes them target it instead of Isaac.^n^nThe decoy explodes after a few seconds, dealing 185 damage in a Megatroll Bomb radius.^n^nThe decoy is affected by some bomb modifiers.

item.name: Remote Detonator
item.bot_description:
*On pickup:*^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_bomb:1263944832515178559> +5 bombs.
^n^n*While held:*^nBombs will no longer explode automatically.
^n^n*On use:*^nDetonates all bombs currently placed in the room.
^n^nCannot control Troll Bombs and Megatroll Bombs.

item.name: Stigmata
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_red:1263940190515232838> +1 full Red Heart container.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +0.3 damage.
^n^nRefills 1 heart container.

item.name: Mom's Purse
item.bot_description: Spawns a random trinket.^n^nAllows 2 trinkets to be carried at once.

item.name: Bob's Curse
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_bomb:1263944832515178559> +5 bombs.
^n^nGrants bombs a poison effect, making them leave behind a lingering green poison cloud after exploding.
^n^nThe poison cloud deals 5 damage per tick (15 per second).
^n^nMakes Isaac immune to poison effects such as gas clouds from destroying Mushrooms or Sick Boom Flies.
^n^nCan drop from the Super Sloth mini-boss.

item.name: Pageant Boy
item.bot_description: Spawns 7 random coins.

item.name: Scapular
item.bot_description: Once per room, when Isaac is down to his last half heart, he gains a soul heart.^n^nRe-entering the room allows for the effect to be triggered again.^n^nCannot be triggered by self-sacrifice methods such as Blood Donation Machines or Devil Beggars.

item.name: Bum Friend
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that follows Isaac and picks up coins from the ground.
^n^nThe familiar will drop a random pickup after collecting 6 coins.
^n^nAfter the initial drop, Bum Friend has a 67% chance to drop a pickup after collecting 3 coins, and a 33% chance to drop after 4 coins.
^n^nHas an additional chance to drop batteries and items from the Beggar item pool.
^n^nHe cannot pick up Sticky Nickels.
^n^nHe can drop one of the following: red heart, bomb, key, card/rune, pill or a trinket.

item.name: Guppy's Head
item.bot_description: Spawns 2-4 friendly Blue Flies.

item.name: Prayer Card
item.bot_description: <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770> +1 Eternal Heart.

item.name: Notched Axe
item.bot_description:
When used, replaces Isaac's tears with a pickaxe that can be swung like The Forgotten's club.
^n^nIt can damage enemies, break obstacles and blow open doors.
^n^nUsing the item again holsters the pickaxe and allows Isaac to shoot tears again. This can be done repeatedly without wasting any charges.
^n^nThe item has a total of 64 charges and cannot be recharged normally by clearing rooms or picking up batteries or battery-related items. It will fully recharge upon going down to a next floor or picking up Iron Bar.
^n^nEach swing deals 3x Isaac's damage and depletes 2 charges.
^n^nDestroying an obstacle or blowing open a door depletes 1 charge.
^n^nOnce the item runs out of charges, the pickaxe breaks and cannot be used again until recharged.

item.name: Infestation
item.bot_description: Spawns 2-6 Blue Flies upon taking damage.

item.name: Ipecac
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +40 flat damage.
^n<:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> ×0.33 fire rate multiplier.
^n<:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488><:stat_range:1263940180163821659> ×0.8 range multiplier.
^n<:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488><:stat_shotspeed:1263940211591876651> ×0.2 shot speed multiplier.
^n<:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488><:stat_tearsize:1263944891675967581> ×0.4 tear size multiplier.
^n^nIsaac's tears become explosive and are fired in an arc.
^n^nEnemies within the blast radius become poisoned.
^n^nDamage multipliers do not affect Ipecac's flat damage bonus.
^n^nIpecac shots deal half a heart of self-damage, and a full heart with 85 or a higher damage stat.
^n^nThe poison deals damage equal to BaseDamage + 2, and ticks for a total of 2 times. The +40 flat damage does not apply to this formula.

item.keywords: heart health gluttony red less than three
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_red:1263940190515232838> +1 full Red Heart container.
^n^nFully heals Isaac.
^n^nCan drop from the Gluttony mini-boss.

item.name: Tough Love
item.bot_description:
Adds a chance to shoot a tooth instead of a tear, that deals 3.2x Isaac's damage.
^n^nThe chance for a tooth shot starts at 10% with 0 luck, and maximizes at 100% with 9 luck.

item.name: The Mulligan
item.bot_description: Tears have a 16% chance to spawn a Blue Fly when they hit an enemy.

item.name: Technology 2
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> ×0.66 fire rate multiplier.
^n^nReplaces the tears fired from Isaac's right eye with a piercing laser with unlimited range that fires continuously as long as a fire button is held.
^n^nThe laser deals ~13% of Isaac's damage 15 times per second (~195% per second).
^n^nThe laser can knock back enemies.

item.name: Mutant Spider
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> ×0.42 fire rate multiplier.
^n^nIsaac fires a spread of 4 tears at the same time.

item.name: Chemical Peel
item.bot_description: <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +2 flat damage to tears fired from Isaac's left eye.

item.name: The Peeper
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> ×1.35 damage multiplier to tears fired from Isaac's left eye.
^n^nSpawns a familiar that floats diagonally across the room and bounces off of walls.
^n^nThe familiar blocks enemy shots and deals 8 damage per tick (17.14 per second) to enemies it passes through.

item.name: Habit
item.bot_description: Adds +1 charge to Isaac's active item upon taking damage.

item.name: Bloody Lust
item.bot_description: Taking damage increases Isaac's <:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> damage stat for the remainder of the floor.^n^nDamage is increased up to 6 times per floor, in the following manner: +0.5 for the first hit and an additional +0.2 for each hit, until +1.5 at the final hit.^n^nThe maximum total is +6 damage.

item.name: Crystal Ball
item.bot_description:
*While held:*^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_planetarium:1263940169824866316> +15% Planetarium chance, or +100% if at least one Treasure Room has been skipped.
^n^nEven though it grants a 100% planetarium chance, it still cannot guarantee one to spawn due to some floor layouts not being capable of spawning one.
^n^n*On use:*^nReveals the floor layout and all map icons except the Super Secret Room.
^n^n50/50 chance to drop either a Soul Heart or a random card/rune.
^n^nCan drop as a final payout from a Fortune Telling Machine.

item.name: Spirit of the Night
item.keywords: black moon red moon fly flight spectral devil
item.bot_description: Grants spectral tears and flight.

item.name: Raw Liver
item.bot_description: <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_red:1263940190515232838> +2 Red Heart containers.^n^nFully heals Isaac.

item.name: Crack the Sky
item.bot_description: Summons 5 beams of light that tend to directly target enemies.^n^nBeams can hit the same enemy up to 8 times, dealing DamageStat + 20 damage per hit.^n^nEach beam lasts for 0.8 seconds and has a 3x3 cross-shaped area of effect.

item.name: Ankh
item.keywords: cross respawn revive blue baby ??? extra life grey gray
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770> +1 extra life.
^n^nUpon death, respawns Isaac as ??? with 3 Soul Hearts in the most recent non-hostile room, and then removes the item.
^n^nIf playing as Tainted ???, will revive as that character instead.

item.name: Celtic Cross
item.bot_description:
Taking damage has a chance to create a shield that negates all types of damage for 7 seconds, similarly to Book of Shadows.
^n^nThe base chance is 20% and goes up to 100% with 27 luck.

item.name: Ghost Baby
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that follows Isaac around and fires spectral tears that deal 3.5 damage.
^n^nThe familiar shoots 1.36 times per second.
^n^nCan drop by destroying a skull.

item.name: The Candle
item.bot_description:
When used, Isaac raises the candle above his head. Pressing a fire button will shoot out a blue flame in the chosen direction.
^n^nThe flame shrinks in size while traveling and disappears after 2 seconds.
^n^nThe flame deals 23 to 11.5 damage per tick depending on its size, 6 times per second.
^n^nA single flame can deal a total of 160 damage.
^n^nThe flame also destroys enemy shots and shopkeepers.
^n^nIt can travel over pits, but not through obstacles.
^n^nThe flame cannot hurt Isaac.

item.name: D20
item.bot_description: Rerolls all pickups and chests in the room.^n^nCannot reroll items into item pedestals.

item.name: Harlequin Baby
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that follows Isaac around and fires 2 tears at once in a V pattern which each deal 4 damage.
^n^nThe familiar shoots 1.36 times per second.

item.name: Epic Fetus
item.bot_description:
Replaces Isaac's tears with guided missiles.
^n^nPressing a fire button spawns a crosshair that can be controlled with the fire buttons, summoning a missile to its position 1.5 seconds later.
^n^nEach missile deals 20x Isaac's damage.
^n^nMissiles are affected by some bomb modifiers.
^n^nThe speed of the crosshair is not affected by Isaac's shot speed.

item.name: Polyphemus
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +4 flat damage.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> ×2 damage multiplier.
^n<:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> ×0.42 fire rate multiplier.
^n^nWhen a tear kills an enemy, it continues to travel on with any leftover damage.

item.name: Daddy Longlegs
item.bot_description: Creates a shadow that follows Isaac around and causes Daddy Long Legs' foot to stomp on enemies every ~4 seconds.^n^nEach stomp can hit an enemy twice for a total of 40 damage (20 per tick).^n^nThe foor stays down for about 1 second and can hit multiple enemies at once, including ones that come in contact with it while it's down.^n^nThe familiar prioritizes enemies with the most health first, and then target ones closest to Isaac.

item.name: Spider Butt
item.bot_description: Deals 10 damage to all enemies in the room and slows them down for 4 seconds.^n^nEnemies killed by Spider Butt spawn 1-3 Blue Spiders.

item.name: Sacrificial Dagger
item.bot_description:
Spawns a sideways dagger that orbits around Isaac, blocks shots and deals damage to enemies that come in contact with it.
^n^nThe dagger deals 15 damage per tick (112.5 per second).

item.name: Mitre
item.bot_description: Grants a 33% chance to convert any red heart drop into a Soul Heart.

item.name: Rainbow Baby
Dad's Key
item.unlock_method: Pick up both Key Pieces from the Angels in one run.

item.name: Stem Cells
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_red:1263940190515232838> +1 full Red Heart container.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_shotspeed:1263940211591876651> +0.16 shot speed.
^n^nHeals 1 red heart container.

item.name: Portable Slot
item.bot_description:
Has a chance to drop a random pickup, spawn a Neutral Fly, or grant a Pretty Fly, for the cost of 1¢.
^n^nCan be obtained via a Slot Machine.

item.name: Holy Water
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that follows Isaac around and launches itself while Isaac is shooting.
^n^nUpon hitting an enemy, the familiar deals 7 damage and shatters, creating a pool of damaging blue creep that petrifies enemies that come in contact with it.
^n^nThe pool lasts for ~9 seconds and deals 8 damage per tick (24 per second).
^n^nOnce the pool disappears completely, Holy Water will respawn and can be launched again.
^n^nIt will not respawn immediately after entering a new room.

item.name: Fate
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770> +1 Eternal heart.
^n^nGrants flight.

item.name: A Dollar
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_coin:1263944839830179950> +100¢.
^n^nCan only be dropped as a final reward from a Slot Machine.

item.name: The Black Bean
item.bot_description:
Taking damage causes Isaac to fart 5 times in quick succession, knocking back and dealing poison damage to nearby enemies.
^n^nThe farts deals 5 damage and the poison deals 6x Isaac's damage for 6 ticks.

item.name: White Pony
item.bot_description: *While held:*^nGrants flight and sets Isaac's minimum <:stat_speed:1263940240675045417> speed to 1.5. The speed cannot go below this point as long as the item is held.^n^n*On use:*^nIsaac charges in the direction he's facing, gaining invincibility during the charge and dealing contact damage to enemies while also creating beams of light behind him.^n^nThe dash deals DamageStat × 4 + 28.^n^nThe dash can persist between multiple rooms if lined up correctly. This means it can be used to enter Curse Rooms for free.^n^nThe invincibility will not protect against Blood Donation Machines, Devil Beggars or similar self-sacrifice methods.^n^nThe beams of light deal DamageStat × 4 + 10 and trail behind him as he charges.^n^nCan drop by defeating Conquest.

item.name: Sacred Heart
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_red:1263940190515232838> +1 full Red Heart container.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> x2.3 damage multiplier.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +1 flat damage.
^n<:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> -0.4 tears.
^n<:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488><:stat_shotspeed:1263940211591876651> -0.25 shot speed.
^n^nFully heals Isaac.
^n^nGrants homing tears.

item.name: Holy Grail
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_red:1263940190515232838> +1 full Red Heart container.
^n^nHeals 1 red heart container.
^n^nGrants flight.

item.name: Dead Dove
item.bot_description: Grants flight.^n^nGrants spectral tears.

item.name: Blood Rights
item.description: Mass enemy damage at a cost
item.bot_description:
Deals a full heart of damage and activates The Necronomicon effect, dealing 40 damage to all enemies in the room.
^n^nDeals only half a heart of damage after the first use in the same room.
^n^nPrioritizes red hearts.
^n^nBypasses boss armor.

item.name: Guppy's Hairball
item.unlock_method: Become Guppy for the first time.
item.bot_description:
Spawns a hairball familiar that loosely follows behind Isaac.
^n^nThe familiar can block shots and be swung to damage enemies, dealing 5 damage per tick (21.43 per second).
^n^nEach time it kills an enemy, it grows in size and its damage increases by +2. It can grow up to 5 times, for a maximum of 13 damage per tick (55.71 per second).
^n^nThe damage dealt by it is equal to: (level × 2) + 3.
^n^nUpon entering a new floor, the hairball decreases its level:
^n• If level 2, reverts to level 1.
^n• If level 3 or 4, reverts to level 2.
^n• If level 5, reverts to level 3.

item.name: Abel
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that mirrors Isaac's movement and shoots tears towards him that deal 3.5 damage.
^n^nWhen used by Cain or Tainted Cain, the familiar's tears are red and deal 7.5 damage.
^n^nThe familiar shoots 1.88 times per second.

item.name: SMB Super Fan
item.keywords: red saw stats damage tears speed gear
item.unlock_method: Complete challenge #14: It's in the Cards.

<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_red:1263940190515232838> +1 full Red Heart container.

*On pickup:*^nSpawns 2 Soul Hearts.
^n^n*While held:*^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> +0.4 tears.

item.name: Box
item.bot_description: Spawns 1 coin, key, bomb, heart, card/rune, pill and trinket.^n^nThe pickups can be of any variety (nickels, dimes, soul hearts, double bombs, golden trinkets, etc).

item.name: Mom's Key
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_key:1263944873510305925> +2 keys.
^n^nIf a chest spawns hearts, coins, bombs and/or keys, a second group of said pickups will spawn, effectively doubling the average pickup yield.
^n^nDoes not affect Red Chests and Old Chests.

item.name: The Inner Eye
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> ×0.51 fire rate multiplier.
^n^nIsaac fires a spread of 3 tears at once.

item.name: Transcendence
item.bot_description: Grants flight.

item.name: Mom's Eyeshadow
item.bot_description:
Gives a chance to shoot charming tears that cause enemies to temporarily fight on Isaac's side.
^n^nThe chance to fire a charming tear scales with luck, starting at 10% with 0 luck, and maxing out at 100% with 26.95 luck: 1 / (10 - (LuckStat / 3)).

item.name: Iron Bar
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +0.3 damage.
^n^nGrants a chance to shoot concussive tears that cause enemies to walk around randomly.
^n^nThe chance to fire concussive tears scales with luck, maxing out at 100% with 27 luck.

item.name: Midas' Touch
item.bot_description:
Isaac can petrify enemies and turn them into gold by touching them.
^n^nEnemies killed in this state will drop 1-4 pennies, or 0-1 when held by Keeper or Tainted Keeper.
^n^nTouching enemies also deals contact damage to them based on the number of coins Isaac has: 3.5 + 0.2 × coins.
^n^nDamage is dealt 2 times per second per enemy.

item.name: Humbleing Bundle
item.bot_description: Provides a 50% chance to transform all bombs, keys, pennies and red hearts into their respective double variants.

item.name: Fanny Pack
item.bot_description: Grants a 50% chance to drop a random coin, bomb, key or heart when taking damage.

item.name: Sharp Plug
item.bot_description: Grants the ability to recharge your active item in exchange for self-damage. This can be accomplished by attempting to use an active item when it's not fully charged.^n^nEach charge slot costs one half-heart.^n^nRed hearts are prioritized when sacrificing health.^n^nCannot deal fatal damage. It can leave Isaac at a minimum of half a heart.

item.name: Guillotine
item.description: DMG + tears up. An out-of-body experience!
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +1 damage.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> +0.5 tears.
^n^nDetaches Isaac's head from his body, and makes it rotate around his body, allowing it to deal contact damage and block projectiles.
^n^nThe tears are still shot from Isaac's head, resulting in a non-constant line of fire while standing still.
^n^nThe head deals 7 damage per tick (52.5 per second).

item.name: Ball of Bandages
item.bot_description:
Spawns an orbital familiar which blocks shots and deals contact damage.
^n^nThe familiar can be upgraded up to 4 times by obtaining additional Balls of Bandages. Each level has its own characteristics.
^n^nLevel 1: Blocks projectiles and deals 7 damage per tick (52.5 per second).
^n^nLevel 2: Gains the ability to shoot tears alongside Isaac, 1.36 times per second, that deal 3.5 damage and can charm enemies.
^n^nLevel 3: Transforms from an orbital to a follower that chases nearby enemies and deals 5 damage per tick (12.5 per second). It will fire charming tears in the direction Isaac shoots.
^n^nLevel 4: Increases the size of Bandage Girl and now deals 10 damage per tick (25 per second). Enemies killed by its tears have a chance to drop a full red heart.
^n^nObtaining additional Balls of Bandages will create a new level 1 ball and start the cycle again.
^n^nCan drop after defeating a Harbinger.

item.name: Champion Belt
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +1 damage.
^n^nIncreases the chance for champion enemies to appear by 15%.
^n^nDoes not affect the spawn rate of champion bosses.
^n^nDoes not affect the champion rates in The Void.

item.name: Butt Bombs
item.bot_description: <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_bomb:1263944832515178559> +5 bombs.^n^nBombs cloud up the screen upon detonating, briefly confusing and dealing 10 damage to all enemies in the room.^n^nButt Bombs heal the following bosses by 25% of their maximum HP: Turdlings, Dingle, Dangle, Brownie and Clog.

item.name: The Compass
item.bot_description:
Shows the icons of all special rooms on the map, excluding secret rooms.
^n^nReveals if Greed / Super Greed has replaced the shop or a secret room by displaying a mini-boss icon instead of the normal one.
^n^nIts effects appear as an icon next to the map.

item.name: Gnawed Leaf
item.bot_description: Standing still and not pressing the move or attack buttons for one second will make Isaac invulnerable until the next key press.^n^nInvincibility will be removed by placing bombs or using active items.

item.name: Spiderbaby
item.bot_description: Spawns 3-5 friendly Blue Spiders upon taking damage.

item.name: Guppy's Collar
item.bot_description:
Grants a permanent 50% chance to respawn on death, returning Isaac to the previous room.
^n^nRespawning via this item will leave Isaac on half a red heart, or half soul heart if he had no red heart containers.

item.name: Lost Contact
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488><:stat_shotspeed:1263940211591876651> -0.15 shot speed.
^n^nCauses Isaac's tears to destroy enemy projectiles upon impact.

item.name: Anemic

<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_range:1263940180163821659> +1.5 range.

^n^nThe creep deals 2 damage per tick (20 per second).

item.name: Goat Head

<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_angeldevil:1263940944848228474> 100% chance for a devil/angel room to spawn after beating a boss, regardless of damage taken.
^n^nThe devil/angel room won't disappear after leaving.
^n^nEven if the boss has been defeated on the current floor, the item will still spawn a devil/angel room.
^n^nDoes not work on floors that don't normally spawn a devil/angel room.

item.name: Mom's Wig

*On pickup:*^nHeals 1 <:stat_red:1263940190515232838> Red Heart container.

^n^nUp to 5 spiders can be spawned at once.
^n^nThe chance to spawn spiders scales with luck, and goes up to 100% with 10 luck.

item.name: Placenta

*On pickup:*^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_red:1263940190515232838> +1 full Red Heart container.

Can drop from destroying polyps in The Womb.

item.bot_description:

^n^nIf the button is not released, tears will fire on their own after 3 seconds.

item.name: Piggy Bank

item.bot_description:

item.name: Death's Touch

<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +1.5 damage.
^n<:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> -0.3 tears.

item.name: Key Piece 1
item.tags: uniquefamiliar offensive lazarusshared noeden nocantrip quest
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_angel:1263940933913804893> +25% chance to spawn an Angel Room instead of a Devil Room when defeating the floor's boss.
^n^nGrants a +2.5% chance to convert Red Heart pickups into Eternal Hearts.

^n^nSpawns when defeating Uriel if not already in possession.

item.name: Key Piece 2
item.tags: uniquefamiliar offensive lazarusshared noeden nocantrip quest
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_angel:1263940933913804893> +25% chance to spawn an Angel Room instead of a Devil Room when defeating the floor's boss.
^n^nGrants a +2.5% chance to convert Red Heart pickups into Eternal Hearts.
^n^nUnlocks the door to the Mega Satan fight in The Chest or Dark Room when combined with Key Piece 1.
^n^nSpawns when defeating Gabriel if not already in possession.

item.name: Dessert
item.bot_description: <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_red:1263940190515232838> +1 full Red Heart container.^n^nHeals 1 red heart container.

item.name: Experimental Treatment
item.description: Some stats up, some stats down
item.bot_description:
Grants 4 random stat increases and 2 random stat decreases.
^n^nEach stat can change for a fixed amount:
^n<:stat_red:1263940190515232838> ±1 heart container.
^n<:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> ±1 flat damage.
^n<:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> ±0.5 fire rate.
^n<:stat_range:1263940180163821659> ±2.5 range.
^n<:stat_shotspeed:1263940211591876651> ±0.2 shot speed.
^n<:stat_speed:1263940240675045417> ±0.2 speed.
^n<:stat_luck:1263940158839849010> ±1 luck.

item.name: Contract from Below
item.bot_description:
Any reward spawned from clearing a room is doubled, but has a 33% chance to be removed completely.
^n^nDoes not apply to trinkets or Pennies dropped in <:stat_greed:1263944856376443104> Greed Mode.

item.name: Infamy
item.bot_description: Grants a 50% chance to block any projectile that hits Isaac.^n^nA successful block is indicated by Isaac briefly flashing blue.^n^nCannot block explosives, lasers, lines of fire from fireballs and projectiles from Big Bony, Coal Boy and Danny.^n^nEven though the mask is only seen on Isaac's face, projectiles can be blocked from any direction.

item.name: Trinity Shield
item.bot_description: Spawns a shield that stays in front of Isaac's shooting direction and blocks incoming projectiles.^n^nThe shield can also be placed diagonally by holding two firing buttons at once.

item.name: Tech.5
item.bot_description:
Grants Isaac a laser with unlimited range and piercing that fires alongside his original tears.
^n^nThe laser has a 1/6 chance to fire every ~0.07 seconds, firing at an average of 2.5 times per second.
^n^nDamage dealt by the laser is equal to Isaac's damage stat.
^n^nThe laser has a 5% chance to gain a random status effect.

<:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> ×0.8 damage multiplier.
^n^nIsaac now fires 2 tears at once, one from each eye.
^n^nPrevents shot multipliers such as The Inner Eye and Mutant Spider from decreasing tears. This also affects Polyphemus.

item.name: Blue Map
item.bot_description:
Reveals the locations of Secret Rooms and Super Secret Rooms on the map.
^n^nIts effects appear as an icon next to the map.

item.name: BFFS!
item.bot_description: Increases the size of Isaac's familiars by 25%, and improves the effectiveness of most of them.^n^nDoubles the damage of familiars that deal damage through tears or contact damage.^n^nIncreases the frequency of pickup-generating familiars dropping pickups.^n^nGrants unique synergies for some familiars. Check the synergies section of familiar pages for more details.

item.name: Hive Mind
item.bot_description:
Increases the size and doubles the damage of friendly Blue Spiders, Blue Flies and Locusts.
^n^nMakes fly and spider familiars stronger, exactly like BFFS!.

item.name: There's Options
item.bot_description: Makes 2 items spawn after defeating a boss instead of one. Only one can be taken; the other will disappear.^n^nTwo items will also spawn after clearing Boss Rush.^n^nDoes not affect mini-boss drops.^n^nDoes not affect the Mom fight drops.

item.name: Breakfast
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_red:1263940190515232838> +1 full Red Heart container.
^n^nHeals 1 red heart container.
^n^nCan spawn once the Treasure Room item pool has been exhausted. When other pools are exhausted, they will use the Treasure Room item pool.

item.name: BOGO Bombs
item.bot_description: Turns all newly spawned Bombs into Double Bombs.

item.name: Starter Deck
item.bot_description:
*On pickup:*^nSpawns a random card/rune.
^n^n*While held:*^nAllows Isaac to carry 2 cards/runes at once.
^n^nReplaces all pills with cards. This works retroactively, affecting pills already spawned on the floor.
^n^nCards can be cycled through by using the drop button.

item.name: Little Baggy
item.unlock_method: Pick up any 2 items that have the {{tag|syringe}} tag in one run.
item.bot_description:
*On pickup:*^nSpawns a random pill.
^n^n*While held:*^nAllows Isaac to carry 2 pills at once. Pills can be cycled through by using the drop button.
^n^nConverts all cards into pills. This works retroactively.

item.name: Magic Scab
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_red:1263940190515232838> +1 full Red Heart container.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_luck:1263940158839849010> +1 luck.
^n^nHeals 1 additional Red Heart.

item.name: Blood Clot
item.bot_description:
Applies the following stats to Isaac's left eye:
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +1 flat damage.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_range:1263940180163821659> +2.75 range.
^n^nCan drop from destroying polyps in The Womb.

item.name: Hot Bombs
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_bomb:1263944832515178559> +5 bombs.
^n^nGrants immunity to damage from fire places.
^n^nMakes Isaac's bombs deal contact damage and leave behind a fire that damages enemies and remains there for 10 seconds.
^n^nThe fire can block 4 shots and/or deal 4 ticks of contact damage before disappearing.
^n^nThe fire cannot hurt Isaac.
^n^nBombs deal 16 contact damage to enemies. The fire deals 23 damage at full durability, then 17.25, and finally 2x11.5.

item.name: Fire Mind
item.bot_description:
Grants a fire effect to Isaac's tears, making them set enemies on fire.
^n^nTears have a chance to explode upon impact with an enemy, leaving behind a fire.
^n^nThe fire deals 23 damage at full durability, then 17.25, and finally 2x11.5.
^n^nThe explosion can hurt Isaac, but he is immune to the fire that's spawned afterward.
^n^nThe chance for tears to explode scales with luck, going up to 100% with 13 luck.

item.name: Missing No.
item.bot_description:
Randomizes Isaac's passive items and stats on pickup and at the start of every floor.
^n^nStats gain a random modifier that does not stack between floors. These modifiers can be either 0 or:
^n<:stat_speed:1263940240675045417> ±0.2 speed.
^n<:stat_range:1263940180163821659> ±2.5 range
^n<:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> ±0.5 fire rate.
^n<:stat_shotspeed:1263940211591876651> ±0.2 shot speed.
^n<:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> ±1 flat damage.
^n<:stat_luck:1263940158839849010> ±1 luck.

item.name: Dark Matter
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +1 damage.
^n^nAdds a chance to shoot fear tears that cause enemies to run away from Isaac.
^n^nThe chance to shoot fear tears starts at 33.33% with 0 luck, and goes up to 100% with 20 luck.

item.name: Rotten Meat
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_red:1263940190515232838> +1 full Red Heart container.
^n^nHeals 1 red heart container.
^n^nCan drop from destroying polyps in Corpse.

item.name: Black Candle
item.unlock_method: Donate 150 coins to the Donation Machine.
item.bot_description:
*On pickup:*^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_black:1263940054078849086> +1 Black Heart.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_angeldevil:1263940944848228474> +15% chance for a devil/angel room to spawn after defeating the floor's boss.
^n^n*While held:*^nPrevents curses from appearing.
^n^nWill immediately remove any curse on the current floor, except for Curse of the Labyrinth!.
^n^nRemoves teleportation effects from Cursed Eye and Cursed Penny.

item.name: Proptosis
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +0.5 damage.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tearsize:1263944891675967581> ×2 tear size.
^n^nMakes Isaac's tears shrink in size and lose damage the more time they stay airborne, starting at 3x damage and going down to 0 damage after 0.8 seconds.

item.name: Missing Page 2
item.description: Evil up. Your enemies will pay!
item.bot_description: *On pickup:*^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_black:1263940054078849086> +1 Black Heart.^n^n*While held:*^nIf taking damage would leave Isaac at exactly one heart, deals 80 damage to every enemy in the room.^n^nIncreases the damage dealt by The Necronomicon by +40.

item.name: Clear Rune
item.bot_description:
*On pickup:*^nDrops a random rune.
^n^n*On use:*^nCopies the effect of Isaac's currently held rune or soul stone.
^n^nThe recharge time depends on the last copied rune or soul stone. Check the page of each rune or soul stone for more details.

item.name: Smart Fly
item.bot_description:
Spawns a fly familiar that orbits Isaac, blocks projectiles and deals 1.5 damage per tick (6.43 per second).
^n^nUpon taking damage in the room, the fly will seek out nearby enemies and attack them, losing the ability to block projectiles.

item.name: Dry Baby
item.bot_description: Spawns a familiar that follows Isaac and blocks enemy projectiles. Upon blocking a shot, it has a 10% chance of triggering the The Necronomicon effect.^n^nCan rarely drop from destroying skulls.

item.name: Juicy Sack
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that follows Isaac and leaves a trail of white creep that slows enemies down.
^n^nThe familiar spawns 1-2 Blue Spiders after every room.

item.name: Robo-Baby 2.0
item.description: We worked out all the kinks
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that automatically shoots Technology lasers at enemies when aligned with them, dealing 3.5 damage per shot.
^n^nThe familiar shoots 3 times per second.
^n^nThe familiar can be moved around with the shooting buttons.

item.name: Rotten Baby
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that follows Isaac and spawns friendly Blue Flies when in a room with enemies and holding down a fire button.
^n^nThe familiar can spawn only one Blue Fly at a time. No additional Blue Flies will be spawned until the first one is killed (minimum delay of 1.36 seconds).
^n^nCan drop from destroying polyps in Corpse.

item.name: Headless Baby
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that follows Isaac and leaves a trail of damaging red creep on the ground.
^n^nThe creep deals 2 damage per tick (20 per second).

item.name: Leech
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that follows Isaac and attacks nearby enemies, healing Isaac for half a red heart upon killing an enemy.
^n^nThe familiar deals 1.5 damage per tick (3.21 per second).
^n^nCan spawn from destroying buckets in Downpour or Dross.

item.name: Mystery Sack
item.bot_description: Spawns a familiar that follows Isaac and drops a heart, coin, bomb or key every 5 or 6 rooms alternatingly.^n^nPickups can be of any variant.

item.name: BBF
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that flies around the room diagonally and explodes upon contact with an enemy.
^n^nThe explosion deals 100 damage to all enemies within its blast radius and 10 to the enemy it touched.
^n^nAfter exploding, it will respawn again after 10 seconds, or upon entering a new room.
^n^nThe explosion can hurt Isaac.

item.name: Bob's Brain
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that follows Isaac and launches forward while shooting.
^n^nIf it hits an enemy, it deals 3.5 damage to the enemy and explodes. The explosion deals 100 damage and poisons enemies in its blast radius.
^n^nThe explosion can hurt Isaac, dealing a full heart of damage.
^n^nUpon exploding, the familiar re-appears after a few seconds.

item.name: Best Bud
item.bot_description:
Upon taking damage, spawns a white attack fly familiar for the duration of the room.
^n^nThe fly orbits Isaac and deals 10 damage per tick (150 per second).

item.name: Lil Brimstone
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that follows Isaac and will charge a shot while firing. Releasing it will fire a thin Brimstone laser.
^n^nThe laser deals 3 damage per tick and can strike an enemy up to 8 times, for a total of 24 damage.

item.name: Isaac's Heart
item.bot_description:
Spawns a heart familiar that follows Isaac and tries to position itself in the opposite direction of Isaac's shooting.
^n^nIsaac takes damage if the heart is hurt, but Isaac's body becomes immune to damage, excluding interactable objects such as Blood Donation Machines and Devil Beggars.
^n^nThe heart charges up as Isaac fires. At full charge, upon releasing the fire button, it will knock back nearby enemies and tears, create a small puddle of red creep, and release blood shots in 8 directions that deal 8 damage.
^n^nMakes Isaac's body deal contact damage equal to 2x Isaac's damage stat per tick (4x per second).

item.name: Lil Haunt
item.bot_description: Spawns a familiar that chases down enemies, dealing 2 damage per tick (4.29 per second), and inflicting fear.

item.name: Dark Bum
item.description: He wants to take your life
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that follows Isaac and collects red hearts.
^n^nFor every one and a half red hearts collected, it will spawn one of the following:
^n• Black Heart (40% chance)
^n• Card or rune (20% chance)
^n• Pill (20% chance)
^n• Blue Spider (10% chance)
^n• Enemy Spider (10% chance)

item.name: Big Fan
item.bot_description: Spawns a large orbital familiar that blocks enemy shots and deals 2 damage per tick (8.57 per second).

item.name: Sissy Longlegs
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that wanders around the room and spawns friendly Blue Spiders once every 10-15 seconds.
^n^nUpon contact with an enemy, it will briefly charm them.
^n^nUp to 5 Blue Spiders can be spawned at a time.
^n^nThe spawning timer is active only if there are enemies in the room.

item.name: Punching Bag
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that walks randomly around the room and acts as a decoy, making enemies attack it instead of Isaac if it is closer than him.
^n^nThe familiar cannot block enemy projectiles.
^n^nEnemies can target the familiar for up to 6 seconds, then they will target Isaac for 6 seconds, etc.

item.name: How to Jump
item.bot_description: Makes Isaac jump in the direction he's currently moving.^n^nThe distance of the jump depends on how fast Isaac was moving.^n^nIsaac can jump over obstacles such as rocks and pits.^n^nIsaac is invulnerable while mid-jump, and cannot interact with pickups and machines.

item.name: D100
item.bot_description:
Activates most dice-related items in the game at once: D1, D4, The D6, D7, D8, D10, D12 and D20.
^n^nEffectively rerolls the entire run, affecting passive items held by Isaac, pedestal items in the room, stats, monsters, rocks and pickups.

item.name: D4
item.bot_description: Rerolls Isaac's passive items.^n^nEach item is rerolled into an item from the same item pool it was acquired from.

item.name: D10
item.bot_description: Devolves all monsters in the room into weaker variants of themselves.^n^nEach type of monster has a specific devolve path it takes.^n^nIf a monster is at its weakest level, it will mostly transform into a background critter or simply die.^n^nSome enemies can be transformed into obstacles or pickups.

item.name: Blank Card
item.bot_description:
Copies the effect of the card currently held by Isaac, without expending the consumable.
^n^nThe recharge time of the item depends on the last copied card. Check each of the card pages for more details.
^n^n<:stat_exclamation:1263940092494483568> If used with ? Card, it will teleport Isaac to the I AM ERROR room, consuming both the card and item in the process.

item.name: Book of Secrets
item.bot_description: Activates one of the following map effects: Treasure Map, The Compass or Blue Map, for the duration of the current floor.^n^nHighlights any tinted rocks and rocks with a crawl space in the room.^n^nCannot give effects that are already activated via any means.^n^nIf all of the effects are already active, it will provide X-Ray Vision for the current floor, opening all secret room entrances.^n^nIf used on a floor with Curse of the Lost active, it will immediately grant the X-Ray Vision effect.

item.name: Box of Spiders
item.bot_description: Spawns 4-8 friendly Blue Spiders.

item.name: Red Candle
item.bot_description:
On use, raises a candle above Isaac's head that can be shot by pressing a fire button. Shooting the candle will spawn a red flame in the chosen direction that can travel over pits, but not obstacles.
^n^nThe flame deals 23 damage per tick at full size, then 17.25, then 2x11.5, and can hit enemies up to 4 times, for a maximum of 63.25 damage.
^n^nThe flame can also destroy enemy projectiles, which decreases its size each time, ultimately destroying the flame.
^n^nThe flame will disappear automatically after 10 seconds.
^n^nThe flame also destroys enemy shots and shopkeepers.
^n^nThe flame cannot hurt Isaac.

item.name: Mom's Underwear
item.bot_description:
*On pickup:*^nSpawns 3-6 Blue Flies upon pickup.
^n^n*While held:*^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_range:1263940180163821659> +2.5 range.

item.name: The Jar
item.bot_description:
*While held:*^nAllows Isaac to store up to 4 extra red hearts in The Jar if his red heart containers are full.
^n^nThe number of hearts currently stored in The Jar is indicated by a number next to it.
^n^n*On use:*^nDrops all previously stored red hearts on the ground.
^n^nWhen dropped^n^n
Drops all previously stored red hearts on the ground.

item.name: Flush!
item.bot_description:
Turns all non-boss monsters in the room into poop, and fills the whole room with water.
^n^nPoops can drop pickups.
^n^nInstantly kills poop-themed enemies and bosses: Dingle, Dangle, Brownie, Clog, and Turdlings.
^n^nExtinguishes all normal and red fire places in the room.
^n^nTurns lava-filled pits into solid rock, allowing them to be walked over.

item.name: Satanic Bible
item.description: Reusable evil... but at what cost?
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_black:1263940054078849086> +1 Black Heart.
^n^nForces item pedestals that appear after defeating the floor's boss to be replaced by a deal with the devil, meaning items will be pulled from the Devil Room item pool, and must be paid for with heart containers. This effect lasts for the entire floor Satanic Bible was used on.
^n^nTaking a devil deal generated this way affects the chance of getting an angel deal for the rest of the run.
^n^nDoes not change hardcoded boss drops into devil items, such as Cube of Meat from a Harbinger, however the item will still cost hearts.
^n^nException from the above rule are the items dropped after the Mom fight.
^n^nDoes not affect the items dropped in The Void.

item.name: Head of Krampus
item.unlock_method: Defeat Krampus for the first time.
item.bot_description:
Fires a Brimstone laser in the 4 cardinal directions, similarly to Krampus' attack.
^n^nEach beam deals 10 damage over 20 ticks, for a total of 200 damage per use.
^n^nStanding close to enemies can cause them to get by more than one beam at once, dealing significantly more damage.
^n^nCan drop by defeating Krampus.

item.name: Butter Bean
item.keywords: wait what knockback knock back fart
item.bot_description:
Isaac farts and knocks back nearby enemies and projectiles.
^n^nEnemies pushed into walls, obstacles or other enemies take 8 + 2 × CurrentFloor damage.
^n^nReflected projectiles deal 7 damage to enemies.
^n^nWhen a run is started, the game has a 5% chance to replace this item with Wait What? in every item pool. This means both items cannot be available at the same time in a run.

item.name: Magic Fingers
item.bot_description: Consumes 1¢ and damages all enemies for DamageStat × 2 + 10.

item.name: Pandora's Box
item.bot_description:
Spawns specific pickups or items depending on the floor it was used on:^n^nFor a full list of per-floor spawns, please check the website.^n^n
Alternate variants of the floor spawn the same pickups as the main floor they're based on (e.g. Dross = Basement).
^n^nFor <:stat_greed:1263944856376443104> Greed Mode, it will always generate its second floor drops for each chapter that is before the Shop.
^n^nWith Curse of the Labyrinth!, the floor is treated as the first floor of a chapter.
^n^nIf used while Strange Key is held, the above pickup table is ignored, and it will instead spawn 6 higher quality items from a set of item pools, consuming both items in the process.

item.name: Unicorn Stump
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_speed:1263940240675045417> +0.28 speed and invulnerability for 6 seconds.
^n^nRemoves the ability to shoot while the effect is active.
^n^nAlso speeds up the game's music.

item.name: Taurus
item.bot_description: <:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488><:stat_speed:1263940240675045417> -0.3 speed.^n^nWhen in a room with enemies, Isaac's speed gradually increases at a rate of +0.065 per tick.^n^nOnce the speed reaches 2.0, it activates My Little Unicorn for 5 seconds, granting invulnerability, and reseting the speed bonus afterward.^n^nThe effect can be activated only once per room.^n^nIf Isaac already has 2.0 speed, the effect will activate immediately upon entering a new room.

item.name: Spoon Bender
item.bot_description: Grants homing tears.

item.name: Mom's Heels
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_range:1263940180163821659> +2.5 range.
^n^nMakes Isaac deal 12 contact damage per tick (24 damage per second).

item.name: Aries
item.bot_description: <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_speed:1263940240675045417> +0.25 speed.^n^nRunning into enemies at a speed higher than 0.85 will deal 25 damage to them and prevent Isaac from taking contact damage.

item.name: Cancer
item.bot_description: <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_soul:1263940226758479953> +3 Soul Hearts.^n^nTaking damage activates The Wafer effect for the duration of the room, reducing all damage taken to half a heart.

item.name: Leo
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_size:1263944884474347630> +20% size. Does not affect Isaac's hitbox.
^n^nAllows Isaac to destroy obstacles by walking into them.

item.name: Virgo
item.bot_description:
Grants a chance to trigger Book of Shadows when taking damage, creating a shield that negates damage for 10 seconds.
^n^nConverts all pills into positive ones without identifying them.
^n^nThe chance to activate the shield starts at 10% with 0 luck, going up to 100% with 10 luck.

item.name: Libra
item.bot_description: <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_coin:1263944839830179950> +6 coins.^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_bomb:1263944832515178559> +6 bombs.^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_key:1263944873510305925> +6 keys.^n^nContinually balances Isaac's primary stats: <:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> damage, <:stat_range:1263940180163821659> range, <:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> tears and <:stat_speed:1263940240675045417> speed.^n^nStats are rebalanced in a way that attempts to bring together the highest and lowest stats.^n^nRebalacing happens all the time, meaning picking up new items, activating cards/pills, etc, will have an effect on all 4 previously mentioned stats.

item.name: Scorpio
item.bot_description: Makes Isaac's tears inflict poison to enemies that deals Isaac's amount of damage to them 2 times.

item.name: Sagittarius
item.bot_description: <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_speed:1263940240675045417> +0.2 speed.^n^nGrants piercing tears that can pass through enemies.

item.name: Aquarius
item.bot_description:
Makes Isaac leave a trail of blue creep on the ground behind him that damages enemies walking over it.
^n^nThe creep deals 66% of Isaac's damage 10 times per second.
^n^nThe creep inherits Isaac's tear effects and changes color based on them.
^n^nChance-based tear effects will also have a chance to be applied whenever enemies walk over the creep.

item.name: Pisces
item.keywords: blue zodiac fish knockback knock back
item.bot_description: <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> +0.5 fire rate.^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tearsize:1263944891675967581> +0.12 tear size.^n^nIncreases tear knockback.

item.name: Mom's Lipstick
item.bot_description:
*On pickup:*^nSpawns a random heart.
^n^n*While held:*^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_range:1263940180163821659> +3.75 range.

item.name: Eve's Mascara
item.description: DMG up, tears + shot speed down
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> ×2 damage multiplier.
^n<:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> ×0.66 fire rate multiplier.
^n<:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488><:stat_shotspeed:1263940211591876651> -0.5 shot speed.
^n^nEffectively acts as a 33% increase in DPS.

item.name: Judas' Shadow
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770> +1 extra life.
^n^nUpon death, respawns Isaac as Black Judas with 2 Black Hearts in the most recent non-hostile room.
^n^nIf playing as Tainted Judas, respawns as that character instead.

item.name: Maggy's Bow
item.bot_description: <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_red:1263940190515232838> +1 full Red Heart container.^n^nHeals 1 additional Red Heart.^n^nMakes all Red Hearts heal for double their value.

item.name: Holy Mantle
item.bot_description: Once per room, grants a shield that negates the first instance of damage.^n^nThe shield is represented with a blue cross icon next to the health bar.^n^nBreaking the shield grants 1 second of invincibility frames.

item.name: Thunder Thighs
item.description: HP up + speed down + you feel stompy
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_red:1263940190515232838> +1 full Red Heart container.
^n<:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488><:stat_speed:1263940240675045417> -0.4 speed.
^n^nAllows Isaac to destroy obstacles by walking into them.

item.name: Strange Attractor
item.bot_description: Isaac's tears gain a magnetic effect that attracts monsters, pickups and trinkets towards them.^n^nThe magnetic effect becomes stronger as tears travel in the air.

item.name: Cursed Eye
item.bot_description:
Grants a charge-attack which fires a tight burst of up to 5 shots.
^n^nThe charge can be released before fully charged but will shoot fewer tears.
^n^nTaking damage while charging (not fully charged) will teleport Isaac into another room.
^n^nThe teleportation effect can be removed with Black Candle.

item.name: Mysterious Liquid
item.bot_description: Isaac's tears create a small, short-lasting pool of green creep upon hitting an enemy or falling to the ground.^n^nThe creep deals 1 damage per tick to enemies, and can deal a total of 25 damage before disappearing.

item.name: Gemini
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that is conjoined to Isaac and chases nearby enemies.
^n^nThe familiar deals 3 damage per tick (6.43 per second).

item.name: Cain's Other Eye
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that follows Isaac and copies all of his tear modifiers/stats, but with a 25% reduction in damage, unless playing as Lilith or Tainted Lilith.
^n^nThe familiar fires randomly in the cardinal directions.

item.name: ???'s Only Friend
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that can be controlled with the shooting buttons and deals contact damage to enemies.
^n^nThe familiar deals 3.5 damage per tick (15 per second).

item.name: Samson's Chains
item.bot_description:
Attaches a ball and chain to Isaac's ankle that blocks enemy projectiles, deals damage to enemies and destroys obstacles.
^n^nThe ball deals 5 damage per tick (10.71 per second).

item.name: Mongo Baby
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that follows Isaac and copies the tears of his other currently held familiars.
^n^nIf Isaac has no other familiars, Mongo Baby will fire normal tears that deal 3.5 damage.
^n^nThe familiar shoots 2.73 times per second.
^n^nOnly the following familiars can be copied:
^n• Brother Bobby
^n• Demon Baby
^n• Freezer Baby
^n• Ghost Baby
^n• Harlequin Baby
^n• Little Gish
^n• Little Steven
^n• Rainbow Baby
^n• Robo-Baby
^n• Rotten Baby
^n• Sister Maggy

item.name: Isaac's Tears
item.bot_description: Fires 8 tears around Isaac that retain Isaac's damage, range, shot speed and most tear effects.^n^nTears fired from this item gain a +5 flat damage bonus.^n^nThe item can only be charged by shooting tears: 1 tear shot will increase the item's charge by one.^n^nCannot copy tear-replacing items such as Brimstone.

item.name: Undefined
item.bot_description: Teleports Isaac to the Treasure Room, Secret Room, Super Secret Room or the I AM ERROR room.^n^nThe chance to teleport to each room is equal.^n^nThere is a very small chance to teleport into a Black Market.^n^nHas no effect when used in the Home level.

item.name: Scissors
item.bot_description:
Detaches Isaac's head from his body, turning the head into a stationary familiar that fires tears for the rest of the room.
^n^nThe head's shooting can be controlled by Isaac.
^n^nThe body will constantly spew a controllable fountain of blood shots, dealing from 66%-101% of Isaac's tear damage.

item.name: Breath of Life
item.keywords: shield white angel beam light laser
item.bot_description: Holding down the active item button will gradually deplete this item's charge bar. As it gets close to 0, Isaac turns blue over time. Once it hits 0, Isaac will become invincible to all outside damage sources. After 1 second, Isaac will begin to take damage if the active item button is still held down.^n^nWhile invincible, Isaac deals 3.5 contact damage to enemies and beams of light will strike down on enemies touching him, dealing 15 damage.^n^nTouching an enemy or blocking a projectile at the exact moment the invincibility takes place will shoot out beams of light in the 4 cardinal directions that deal 12 damage per tick, or a total of 180 damage.^n^nThe item will recharge on its own but cannot be used again until fully charged.

item.name: The Polaroid
item.bot_description: Activates the Book of Shadows effect if Isaac has half a red heart or no red hearts at all after taking damage, creating a shield that negates damage for 5 seconds.^n^nGrants entrance to the Chest level after beating Isaac in the Cathedral.^n^nOpens the door in the starting room of Depths II that leads to the Ascent path, getting consumed in the process.^n^nDrops after killing Mom, alongisde The Negative.

item.name: The Negative
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +1 damage.
^n^nActivates The Necronomicon effect if Isaac has half a red heart or no red hearts at all after taking damage, dealing 40 damage to all enemies in the room.
^n^nGrants entrance to the Dark Room level after beating Satan in Sheol.
^n^nOpens the door in the starting room of Depths II that leads to the Ascent path, getting consumed in the process.^n^nDrops after killing Mom, alongisde The Polaroid.

item.name: The Ludovico Technique
item.bot_description: Replaces Isaac's tears with a single controllable tear that hovers over obstacles and deals constant damage to enemies when held over them.^n^nThe movement speed of the tear is determined by the <:stat_shotspeed:1263940211591876651> shot speed stat.^n^nThe hits per second are determined by the <:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> tears stat, maxing out at 30 ticks per second.

item.name: The Bible
item.bot_description: Grants flight for the current room.^n^nInstantly kills Mom, Mom's Heart, It Lives, including their alt path variants.^n^n<:stat_exclamation:1263940092494483568> Instantly kills Isaac if used against Satan.

item.name: Soy Milk
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> ×5.5 fire rate multiplier.
^n<:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> ×0.2 damage multiplier.
^n<:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488><:stat_tearsize:1263944891675967581> -0.3 tear size.
^n^nDrastically reduces knockback by Isaac's tears.
^n^nAutomatically charges and fires charged attack items such as Brimstone.

item.name: Godhead
item.unlock_method: Earn all completion marks on Hard Mode as {{i|The Lost}}.
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +0.5 damage.
^n<:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> -0.3 tears.
^n<:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488><:stat_shotspeed:1263940211591876651> -0.3 shot speed.
^n^nGrants homing tears.
^n^nTears gain a damaging aura that deals 2 damage per tick (60 per second).
^n^nThe size of the aura scales with tear size.

item.name: Lazarus' Rags
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770> +1 extra life.
^n^nUpon death, respawns Isaac as Lazarus II in the current room with one less heart container (but no less than 1), the Anemic item and a permanent <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +0.5 damage.
^n^nTraveling to the next floor after the effect has been activated will revert the character into the regular Lazarus form, with his inherent extra life effect.
^n^nIf playing as Tainted Lazarus, revives as that character instead.

item.name: The Mind
item.bot_description:
Grants the effects of Blue Map, Treasure Map and The Compass, revealing the entire floor layout, including Secret Rooms and Super Secret Rooms.
^n^nIts effects appear as an icon next to the map.

item.name: The Body
item.bot_description: <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_red:1263940190515232838> +3 full Red Heart containers.

item.name: The Soul
item.keywords: blue triangle soul heart repel aura
item.bot_description: <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_soul:1263940226758479953> +3 Soul Hearts.^n^nGrants a pulsing blue aura that repels enemies and projectiles. The power of the repel force is random.

item.name: Dead Onion
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tearsize:1263944891675967581> +0.22 tear size.
^n<:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488><:stat_range:1263940180163821659> -1.5 range.
^n<:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488><:stat_shotspeed:1263940211591876651> -0.4 shot speed.
^n^nGrants piercing and spectral tears.

item.name: Broken Watch
item.keywords: stop watch stopwatch blue slow time
item.bot_description: In every 4th newly discovered room, enemies and their attacks are slowed down, but has a ~13% chance to speed them up by 40% instead.^n^nThe effect is lost upon leaving the room, and not gained back by re-entering it.

item.name: The Boomerang
item.bot_description:
On use, Isaac holds the Boomerang in his hand. Pressing a fire button will throw the Boomerang in the chosen direction, and will return it shortly afterward.
^n^nThe Boomerang can collect pickups along the way and return them to Isaac.
^n^nEnemies hit by it will take 2x Isaac's damage and get petrified for ~2 seconds.
^n^nThe Boomerang will pierce through enemies and obstacles (except key blocks), and can destroy Shopkeepers.

item.name: The Book of Belial
item.bot_description:
*While held:*^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_angeldevil:1263940944848228474> +12.5% chance for a devil/angel deal.
^n^n*On use:*^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +2 damage for the current room.
^n^nMultiple uses will only add +1 damage.
^n^nPassive variant^n^n
If Judas or Black Judas obtain Birthright, they receive a special variation of The Book of Belial that can be held alongside another active item, similar to Book of Virtues. This variant synergizes differently with certain active items. For more details, check the synergies section on active item pages.
^n^nThe special variant won't always grant +2 damage on use, but will instead use a formula for calculating the damage: NumberOfCharges × 0.66.
^n^nThe above formula will result in +2 damage for active items with 3 charges, just like The Book of Belial itself.
^n^nTimed-charge items and items with no charges will not grant a damage bonus, unless they have a specific synergy.

item.name: Caffeine Pill
item.bot_description:
*On pickup:*^nGives a random pill.
^n^n*While held:*^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_speed:1263940240675045417> +0.3 speed.
^n<:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488><:stat_size:1263944884474347630> -10% size.
^n<:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488><:stat_size:1263944884474347630> -4% hitbox size.

item.name: Blue Cap
item.description: HP + tears up + shot speed down

item.name: Latch Key
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_soul:1263940226758479953> +1 Soul Heart.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_luck:1263940158839849010> +1 luck.
^n^nSpawns 2 keys, with them having a very small chance to be of different variant.

item.name: Match Book
item.bot_description: <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_black:1263940054078849086> +1 Black Heart.^n^nSpawns 3 bombs around Isaac.^n^nSpawns the Match Stick if it hasn't yet been encountered.

item.name: A Snack
item.bot_description: <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_red:1263940190515232838> +1 full Red Heart container.^n^nHeals 1 additional Red Heart.

item.name: Diplopia
item.bot_description:
Duplicates all pickups and item pedestals in the current room.
^n^nCannot duplicate trinkets, the Jera rune or Diplopia itself.
^n^nCan be used to take Shop and Devil Room items for free.

item.name: Placebo
item.bot_description: Copies the effect of Isaac's currently held pill without consuming it.^n^nThe recharge time depends on the last used pill. Check the specific pill page for more details.

item.name: Wooden Nickel
item.unlock_method: Donate 30 coins to the {{i|Greed Donation Machine}}.
item.bot_description:
Has a 59% chance to drop a random coin, or more precisely:
^n• 52% → Penny
^n• 6% → Nickel
^n• 1% → Dime
^n• 41% → nothing

item.name: The Necronomicon
item.bot_description: Deals 40 damage to everything in the room.^n^nA Missing Page and Missing Page 2 each add +40 to the damage, stacking up to 120 in total.

item.name: Toxic Shock
item.bot_description:
Poisons all enemies upon entering a room, dealing 2x Isaac's tear damage 4 times, and creating a green fog for the first couple of seconds of the room.
^n^nKilling enemies leaves a small, short-lasting pool of green creep that deals 1 damage per tick (30 per second).

item.name: Mega Bean
item.bot_description:
Creates a Mama Mega! explosion in the current room which destroys all obstacles, and blows open all doors.
^n^nThe explosion deals 100 flat damage to all enemies in the room.
^n^nPetrifies all enemies in the room for a couple of seconds.
^n^nDeals 5 damage and poisons all enemies near Isaac.
