^n^nThe poison deals Isaac's amount of damage 6 times.

item.name: Glass Cannon
item.bot_description:
*On use:*^nFires a single high-damage piercing and spectral tear, and knocks back Isaac a bit.
^n^nThe damage dealt by the tear is equal to (10 * Isaac's damage) + 10.
^n^n*While held:*^nUpon taking damage, the item transforms into the Broken Glass Cannon, and damages Isaac for an additional 2 full hearts.
^n^nWhen this happens, Isaac gains <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_range:1263940180163821659> +1.5 range and leaves a trail of red creep for the rest of the current room.
^n^nThe damage dealt by Glass Cannon cannot kill Isaac, but will leave him on half a red heart.
^n^nThe Cannon won't break from self-sacrifice mechanics such as the Blood Donation Machine.

item.name: Bomber Boy
item.bot_description: <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_bomb:1263944832515178559> +5 bombs.^n^nCauses Isaac's bombs to explode in a large cross-shaped blast by adding 2 additional explosions in each cardinal direction.^n^nEach single explosion deals 0.75x its normal damage.^n^nEach successive explosion that hits the same enemy has its damage halved.

item.name: Crack Jacks
item.description: HP up. Don't swallow the prize!
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_red:1263940190515232838> +1 full Red Heart container.
^n^nHeals 1 additional Red Heart.
^n^nSpawns a random trinket.

item.name: Car Battery
item.bot_description:
Whenever an active item is used, it is activated 2 times at once.
^n^nSome active items cannot be used twice. These include one-time-use and throwable active items.

item.name: Box of Friends
item.bot_description:
Adds a copy of each of Isaac's familiars for the duration of the current room.
^n^nIf Isaac has no familiars, it will instead spawn a Demon Baby for the duration of the room.
^n^nIf Isaac already has more than one copy of a familiar, only one additional copy of that familiar will be added.
^n^nCannot copy Blue Flies/Spiders.
^n^nCannot copy familiars with the uniquefamiliar tag.

item.name: The Wiz
item.bot_description: Makes Isaac's tears fire diagonally from both eyes at the same time.^n^nGives spectral tears.

item.name: 8 Inch Nails
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +1.5 damage.
^n^nReplaces Isaac's tears with nails that have increased knockback.

item.name: The Poop
item.bot_description:
Spawns a poop pile where Isaac is currently standing.
^n^nKnocks back nearby enemies, enemy shots and pickups.
^n^nThe poop pile may yield pickups like regular poop.
^n^nCan drop from destroying buckets in Dross.
^n^nCannot be placed over obstacles (e.g. while flying), except for some examples such as Red Poop and Cobwebs which will remove the obstacles.
^n^nIt can also be placed over retracted spikes which will remove them from the room.

item.name: Incubus
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that follows Isaac and copies his tears and stats.
^n^nThe damage dealt by the familiar is reduced by 25% unless playing as Lilith or Tainted Lilith.

item.name: Fate's Reward
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that follows Isaac and copies his damage and tear effects.
^n^nThe familiar shoots 0.68 times per second.

item.name: Lil Chest
item.bot_description:
Spawns a chest familiar that follows Isaac and has a chance to spawn a random pickup or trinket after clearing a room.
^n^nThe chances are 25% for a pickup, and 10% for a trinket.

item.name: Sworn Protector
item.bot_description:
Spawns an orbital familiar that blocks enemy shots and deals 7 damage per tick (52.5 per second).
^n^nThe familiar attracts enemy shot to itself. If a shot is inside the familiar's range, it can no longer deal damage to Isaac unless it slips out of the range.
^n^nThe familiar has a chance to drop an Eternal Heart upon blocking 10 shots in one room. Can only happen once per room, unless the room is re-entered.

item.name: Friend Zone
item.bot_description: Spawns a fly familiar that slowly orbits Isaac and deals 3 damage per tick (45 per second).

item.name: Lost Fly
item.bot_description:
Spawns a fly familiar that moves in a straight line upon entering the room, and attaches itself to the first wall or obstacle it comes in contact with. The fly will orbit around said obstacle.
^n^nThe familiar deals 7 damage per tick (30 per second).
^n^nEnemies that are nearby the fly will target the fly instead of Isaac.
^n^nIf the obstacle that the fly was attached to was destroyed, it will continue moving in the original direction until it finds a new obstacle.

item.name: Scatter Bombs
item.description: We put bombs in your bombs!
item.bot_description: <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_bomb:1263944832515178559> +5 bombs.^n^nMakes Isaac's bombs split into 4-5 tiny bombs after exploding.^n^nTiny bombs explode immediately upon landing. They deal half the damage of the original bombs and have a decreased radius.^n^nThe bombs inherit most bomb synergies.

item.name: Sticky Bombs
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_bomb:1263944832515178559> +5 bombs.
^n^nMakes Isaac's bombs stick to enemies and spawn Blue Spiders when they kill the enemy they have stuck to.
^n^nBombs leave slowing white creep upon exploding.

item.name: Epiphora
item.bot_description:
Fire rate continuously increases as Isaac shoots in one direction, but accuracy decreases.
^n^nWhen the stat boost is at maximum, it effectively doubles Isaac's fire rate.
^n^nRate of fire returns to normal immediately after Isaac stops shooting, changes shooting direction, or enters an unexplored boss room.

item.name: Continuum
item.bot_description: <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_range:1263940180163821659> +3 range.^n^nGrants spectral tears.^n^nWhen tears travel off-screen, they loop back around through the opposite wall.

item.name: Mr. Boom
item.bot_description: Places down a large bomb that deals 185 damage, identical to the ones spawned by Mr. Mega.^n^nThe bomb is compatible with all bomb modifiers.^n^nCan drop by the Wrath mini-boss.

item.name: Mr. Dolly
item.keywords: maggie magdalene yellow golden hair girl
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> +0.7 tears.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_range:1263940180163821659> +2.5 range.
^n^nSpawns 3 of the following hearts when picked up, each having an equal chance to be selected:
^n• Heart
^n• Soul Heart
^n• Black Heart

item.name: Curse of the Tower
item.bot_description:
Spawns 6 Troll Bombs around the center of the room upon taking damage.
^n^nThe bombs inherit Isaac's bomb synergies.
^n^nThe effect will not trigger when taking damage from bombs, and self-sacrifice mechanisms, such as Devil Beggars and Blood Donation Machines.

item.name: Charged Baby
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that follows Isaac.
^n^nWhile in an uncleared room, every 30 seconds, it has a chance to do one of the following:
^n• Spawn a random battery pickup (max 2 times per room).
^n• Add a charge to Isaac's active item (max 2 times per room).
^n• Petrify all enemies in the room for 1.3 seconds.

item.name: Dead Eye
item.bot_description:
Each successive tear hit increases Isaac's damage multiplier by <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> 25%, going up to 100% at 4 successive hits.^n^nIf a tear misses an enemy, there is a chance for the multiplier to reset. The chance is:
^n• 20% for the first miss.
^n• 33% for the second miss.
^n• 50% for the third miss and beyond.
^n^nIsaac's tears glow red and increase in size as the multiplier increases.

item.name: Holy Light
item.bot_description: Adds a chance to fire glowing blue tears that spawn a damaging beam of light after colliding with an enemy.^n^nEach beam deals 3x Isaac's tear damage and damages enemies in a small radius around it.^n^nThe chance to fire a holy tear scales with luck, using the formula: 1 / (11 - LuckStat), starting at 10% with 0 luck, going up to 50% at 9 luck.

item.name: Host Hat
item.bot_description: Grants immunity to explosions and projectiles falling from above.^n^nHas a 20% chance to block any incoming projectiles. When a projectile is blocked, fires 3 tears that copy Isaac's damage, range and tear effects.

item.name: Restock
item.bot_description:
Allows infinite purchases from Shops, by spawning a new item/pickup after purchasing one.^n^nUnless playing Greed Mode, each new item/pickup will increase in size after each purchase from the same Shop slot. The price increase varies based on the type of item/pickup:
^n• Items follow the formula: 15 + n × (n + 1) where n is the number of restocks triggered.
^n• Everything else follows the formula> (OriginalPrice + n × (n + 1)) / 2.
^n^nThe maximum price of an item cannot exceed 99 cents.
^n^nA small restock icon will appear under the map while the item is held.

item.name: Bursting Sack
item.bot_description: Prevents certain spider enemies from targeting or dealing contact damage to Isaac, or spawning other enemies.

item.name: No. 2
item.bot_description:
Continuously firing tears for 2.35 seconds causes Isaac to fart (purely visual effect) and drop a Butt Bombs bomb.
^n^nOnly one bomb can be dropped per firing cycle, requiring Isaac to let go of the firing buttons in order to start a new cycle. Taking damage will interrupt the cycle.

item.name: Pupula Duplex
item.bot_description: <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tearsize:1263944891675967581> +0.6 tear size.^n^nGrants spectral tears.

item.name: Tammy's Head
item.bot_description: Shoots 10 tears in a circle around Isaac that retain Isaac's shot speed and tear modifiers.^n^nEach tear does DamageStat + 25 damage.

item.name: Pay To Play
item.bot_description: <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_coin:1263944839830179950> +5 coins.^n^nMost rooms and objects that require a key to open will now require a penny instead.^n^nAffects Shops, Treasure Rooms, Libraries, Locked Chests and Key Blocks.

item.name: Eden's Blessing
item.description: Tears up + your future shines brighter
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> +0.7 tears.
^n^nGrants a random item at the start of the next run.
^n^nCannot grant items with the noeden tag.
^n^nThe effect will occur even if the run was unsuccessful, or restarted. Rerolling the item will still grant the effect on the next run.
^n^nDoes not work if obtained on a seeded run, victory lap, RERUN, during a challenge, or if obtained as a temporary effect, e.g. via Lemegeton or Metronome.
^n^nUp to 2 items can be obtained in subsequent runs by picking up multiple copies of the item.

item.name: Friendly Ball
item.bot_description: Grants a throwable ball that will instantly capture any non-boss enemy it hits.^n^nThe next time the ball is thrown, it will release the previously captured enemy as a permanently charmed enemy that will follow Isaac between rooms and floors, until it dies.^n^nWalking over the ball after it's been used to capture a monster will instantly recharge it and allow immediate release of the monster.

item.name: Tear Detonator
item.bot_description:
Splits all mid-air tears shot from Isaac into 6 more tears in all directions which retain their tear effects, damage and shot speed.
^n^nAlso affects tears shot from Isaac's familiars.

item.name: Lil Gurdy
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that follows Isaac and can be launched in the direction Isaac is firing after a short charge-up period, represented with a charge bar next to the familiar.
^n^nIt can be launched before the charge bar is at maximum, but will do so with a lower velocity.
^n^nThe familiar deals a fixed amount of damage based on the level of charge and velocity, ranging from ~1 to ~28 damage.
^n^nIt can bounce off of walls and enemies multiple times.

item.name: Bumbo
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that follows Isaac and picks up nearby coins. The familiar changes level and behavior based on the number of collected coins.
^n• Level 1 (0-5 coins): only collects coins to level up.
^n• Level 2 (6-11 coins): has a chance to drop a random pickup, trinket, chest or pedestal item after clearing a room.
^n• Level 3 (12-23 coins): fires tears in the same direction as Isaac that deal 3.5 damage and have a chance to drop a coin if they hit an enemy. The familiar shoots 1.36 times per second.
^n• Level 4 (24+ coins): no longer fires tears and instead chases enemies, dealing 2.5 damage per tick (10.71 per second). Will occasionally drop bombs while chasing enemies or coins. Has a chance to drop a pickup or item after each coin collected.

item.name: D12
item.bot_description: Rerolls all obstacles in the room, such as rocks, metal blocks, poops, spikes, fire places, TNT, cobwebs and pillars.^n^nCan reroll into other obstacles, as well as reward plates, red buttons, crawl spaces, trapdoors, golden poop, rainbow poop and tinted rocks.

item.name: Censer
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that follows Isaac and projects a circular aura that slows down enemies and enemy shots within its radius.
^n^nProjectiles that once touched the aura will be permanently slowed down.
^n^nDoes not affect bosses but slows down their shots.

item.name: Key Bum
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that follows Isaac and collects keys. It has a 20% chance of dropping a random chest upon collecting a key.
^n^nPicking up a Charged Key will make Key Bum spawn a Lil' Battery.
^n^nKey Bum cannot pick up Golden Keys.

item.name: Rune Bag
item.bot_description: Spawns a familiar that follows Isaac and drops a random rune or soul stone after clearing 7 or 8 rooms (alternating).

item.name: Mom's Bra
item.bot_description: Petrifies all enemies in the room for 4 seconds.

item.name: Seraphim
item.keywords: white angel sacred heart uriel gabriel
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that follows Isaac and fires homing tears that deal 10 damage and are shot at 75% shot speed.
^n^nThe familiar shoots 1.36 times per second.

item.name: Betrayal
item.bot_description: Allows enemies to hurt each other with projectiles.^n^nWhen an enemy gets damaged by another enemy, they will attack that enemy instead of Isaac. At this point, the 2 enemies are able to deal contact damage to each other as well.

item.name: Zodiac
item.bot_description: Grants the effects of a random Zodiac item each floor.

item.name: Serpent's Kiss
item.bot_description:
Grants a 15% chance to fire poison tears that deal a total of 2x Isaac's damage.
^n^nInflicts poison on enemies that make contact with Isaac. The poison will tick 6 times, each tick dealing Isaac's amount of damage.
^n^nEnemies that were inflicted with poison via contact damage have a 20% chance to drop a Black Heart.

item.name: Marked
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> +0.7 tears.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_range:1263940180163821659> +3 range.
^n^nWhen Isaac starts shooting, a controllable crosshair will appear on the floor that Isaac will automatically and continuously shoot at.
^n^nThe crosshair can be shot at from any direction, rather than the traditional 4-way cardinal direction shooting.
^n^nPressing the drop button will make the crosshair disappear and stop Isaac from shooting until a firing key is pressed again.
^n^nFamiliars will also shoot towards the crosshair. Throwable familiars will launch themselves towards it automatically.

item.name: Tech X
item.bot_description:
Replaces Isaac's tears with ring-shaped lasers that require a short charge-up before firing.
^n^nShots can be fired before fully charged, which will shoot out smaller rings that deal less damage, scaling from 25% to 100% of Isaac's damage stat.
^n^nIsaac's tear stat also slightly affects the damage output.
^n^nRings deal damage 15 times per second. Only the outer line deals damage.
^n^nRings have infinite range and will travel through obstacles and enemies.

item.name: Ventricle Razor
item.bot_description: When used for the first time, creates a blue portal where Isaac is standing. When used for the second time, it creates an orange portal.^n^nWalking into a portal will teleport Isaac to the other one. Portals persist across the entire floor, but will not persist between floors.^n^nActivating the item after 2 portals have been created will replace the older of the 2 portals.^n^nPortals won't persist in rooms that are not part of the floor's layout, such as Devil Rooms, Angel Room, I AM ERROR rooms, Crawl Spaces, Boss Rush, Black Markets, the Mega Satan room, the Hush fight arena, etc.

item.name: Tractor Beam
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> +1 fire rate.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_range:1263940180163821659> +2.5 range.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_shotspeed:1263940211591876651> +0.16 shot speed.
^n^nCreates a beam directly in front of Isaac in the direction that his head is facing. Isaac's tears will always travel in the path of the beam.
^n^nIf Isaac changes direction while shooting, tears that are midair will instantly snap to the beam.
^n^nPrevents Isaac from firing tears at an angle by using momentum.

item.name: God's Flesh
item.bot_description:
Grants Isaac a 20% chance to shoot tears that cause enemies to shrink in size and run away from Isaac for 5 seconds.
^n^nShrunk enemies can be crushed and instantly killed by stepping over them.
^n^nEnemies will flash white briefly before returning to normal size.
^n^nOn-death effects of shrunken enemies, such as explosions, shooting projectiles, or summoning enemies, are prevented. This does not apply to champion enemies that have these effects.
^n^nDoes not affect bosses or mini-bosses.

item.name: Maw Of The Void
item.keywords: red worm ring brimstone laser beam
item.bot_description:
Adds a charge meter that fills up while shooting. Releasing the fire buttons when fully charged (2.35 seconds) creates a black Brimstone ring around Isaac that expands and contracts, dealing damage 15 times per second.
^n^nThe ring deals Isaac's damage per tick, for a total of 30 times, lasting for 2 seconds.
^n^nThe ring inherits Isaac's tear effects.

item.name: Kamikaze!
item.bot_description: Makes Isaac explode, damaging him for half a heart and dealing 185 damage to nearby enemies.

item.name: Spear Of Destiny
item.bot_description:
Gives Isaac a spear that he holds in the direction of his most recent shot.
^n^nThe spear deals contact damage equal to 2x Isaac's damage per tick, and does so 4.29 times per second.
^n^nThe spear occasionally inflicts fear to enemies it damages.

item.name: Explosivo
item.bot_description: Isaac's tears have a chance to stick to enemies and explode after a few seconds, dealing 60 + DamageStat in a small radius.^n^nThe explosions can hurt Isaac.^n^nIf a sticky tear gets detached from an enemy (if the enemy dies or teleports), the tear will slowly fall to the ground, attaching itself to a new enemy it comes in contact with.

item.name: Chaos
item.bot_description:
*On pickup:*^nDrops 1-6 random pickups around Isaac.
^n^n*While held:*^nCauses items to be chosen from random item pools.
^n^nFixed item drops that ignore the current room's item pool are not affected. Such examples include Cube of Meat after defeating a Harbinger, The Small Rock after breaking a Tinted Rock, etc.
^n^nEach pool has a different weight (chance to be selected) based on the number of items inside it, with pools having more items being much more likely to be chosen than smaller pools.
^n^nCannot mix up pools between <:stat_greed:1263944856376443104> Greed Mode and the normal game.

item.name: Spider Mod
item.bot_description:
Spawns a spider familiar that wanders around the room and allows Isaac to see tear damage and health bars of enemies.
^n^nThe familiar will inflict a random status effect to any enemy it comes in contact with.
^n^nHas a chance to drop a Lil' Battery or spawn a Blue Spider upon clearing a room.

item.name: Farting Baby
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that follows Isaac and blocks enemy projectiles. Has a 10% chance to fart upon blocking a projectile.^n^nThere are 3 possible fart effects:
^n• Charms nearby enemies.
^n• Poisons nearby enemies, dealing 5 initial damage, and 3.5 per tick of poison.
^n• Knocks back nearby enemies and projectiles, dealing 6 initial damage, while the deflected tears deal 7 damage.

item.name: GB Bug
item.keywords: game breaking familiar rectangle square glitch reroll
item.bot_description: Spawns a familiar that follows Isaac and can be launched forward by double-tapping a fire button.^n^nThe familiar will reroll the first monster, trinket or pickup it hits when launched, after which it will disappear for the rest of the room.^n^nIf it hits an enemy that cannot be rerolled (e.g. a boss), it will deal 8 damage instead.^n^nCannot reroll items and opened chests.^n^nAny pickup has a 10% chance to be rerolled into a chest. Rerolling a chest has a 28% chance to stay as some kind of a chest.

item.name: D8
item.bot_description: Rerolls Isaac's <:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> damage, <:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> tears, <:stat_range:1263940180163821659> range and <:stat_speed:1263940240675045417> speed.^n^nEach stat is given a multiplier ranging from 0.5x to 2x, which applies after all other adjustments.^n^nAllows the tears to exceed the default tears cap of 5.

item.name: Purity
item.bot_description:
Grants Isaac an aura that boosts his stats based on color:
^n• Red: <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +4 damage.
^n• Blue: <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> +2 fire rate.
^n• Yellow: <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_speed:1263940240675045417> +0.5 speed.
^n• Orange: <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_range:1263940180163821659> +3 range.
^n^nTaking damage causes the aura to disappear until another room is entered, randomizing its color.

item.name: Athame
item.bot_description:
Killing an enemy has a luck-based chance to spawn a black Brimstone ring that deals Isaac's tear damage to everything it touches, 15 times per second.
^n^nEnemies killed by the ring have a chance of spawning another ring, starting at 25% with 0 luck, and going up to 100% with 30 luck.
^n^nThe ring lasts for 2 seconds and inherits Isaac's tear effects.

item.name: Empty Vessel
item.keywords: black devil fly flight shield protec
item.bot_description: <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_black:1263940054078849086> +2 Black Hearts.^n^nGrants flight when Isaac has no red hearts.^n^nWhen Isaac has no red hearts, every 40 seconds (when the seconds on the timer hit 00, 20, or 40), while in an active room, activates a shield that negates all damage for 10 seconds.

item.name: Mom's Pad
item.bot_description:
Inflicts fear to all enemies in the room for 5 seconds.
^n^nSpawns a Blue Fly.

item.name: Evil Eye
item.bot_description:
Grants a chance to fire a slow-moving eye with infinite range that copies Isaac tears and shoots in the direction that Isaac is firing at.
^n^nThe chance starts at 3.33% with 0 luck, going up to 10% with 20 luck.

item.name: Lusty Blood
item.bot_description: Isaac gains a damage boost for each enemy killed.^n^nEach kill adds <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +0.5 damage up to a maximum of +5 damage after 10 kills.^n^nThe boost lasts only for the current room.

item.name: Cambion Conception
item.bot_description:
Grants Isaac a permanent demonic familiar upon taking damage a certain amount of times. Possible familiars include:
^n• Dark Bum
^n• Demon Baby
^n• Incubus
^n• Leech
^n• Lil Brimstone
^n• Succubus
^n• Lil Abaddon
^n• Twisted Pair
^n^nCan spawn a maximum of 4 familiars. The first 2 each spawn after taking damage 15 times, while the second 2 after taking damage 30 more times. Will max out at 90 hits taken.

item.name: Immaculate Conception
item.keywords: white angel demon familiar pregnant lilith
item.bot_description:
Grants a permanent angelic familiar and spawns a Soul Heart for every 15 hearts picked up.
^n^nPossible familiars include:
^n• Holy Water
^n• Guardian Angel
^n• Sworn Protector
^n• The Relic
^n• Seraphim
^n^nOnly one of each familiar can spawn. After all of them have spawned, a Soul Heart will continue to drop after every 15 hearts collected.
^n^nAny heart pickups count except for Gold Hearts and Blended Hearts.

item.name: More Options
item.bot_description: Makes 2 item pedestals spawn in every Treasure Room. Only one can be taken; the other will disappear.

item.name: Crown Of Light
item.bot_description:
*On pickup:*^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_soul:1263940226758479953> +2 Soul Hearts.
^n^nWhen Isaac has no damaged Red Heart containers or Bone Hearts^n^n
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> ×2 damage.
^n<:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488><:stat_shotspeed:1263940211591876651> -0.3 shot speed.
^n^nReplaces Isaac's tears with blue diamonds.
^n^nThe crown on Isaac's head will glow blue while the effect is active, and grey when inactive.
^n^nTaking damage will disable the effect for the rest of the room.

item.name: Deep Pockets
item.bot_description:
Increases the amount of coins Isaac can carry to 999.
^n^nIf a room would otherwise yield no reward, 1-3 random coins of the same type will spawn.
^n^nSpawning coins has no effect in <:stat_greed:1263944856376443104> Greed Mode.

item.name: Succubus
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that bounces around the room and has a dark aura around it that boosts Isaac's damage and deals damage to enemies within its radius.
^n^nThe aura deals 2.5 damage per tick (10.71 per second).
^n^nBoosts Isaac's <:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> damage multiplier to ×1.5 while he's standing inside the aura.

item.name: Fruit Cake
item.bot_description:
Grants a random item effect to each tear fired by Isaac.
^n^nCan also grant the effects of Book of Virtues wisps, such as dropping pickups on kill, teleporting enemies to random locations, transforming enemies into poop or into random wisps.
^n^nPossible item effects:
^n• Anti-Gravity
^n• Ball of Bandages (level 4)
^n• Ball of Tar
^n• Brain Worm
^n• Bumbo (level 3)
^n• The Common Cold
^n• Compound Fracture
^n• Continuum
^n• Cricket's Body
^n• Cupid's Arrow
^n• Euthanasia
^n• Explosivo
^n• Eye of Belial
^n• Eye of Greed (does not make Isaac lose coins)
^n• Eye of the Occult
^n• Fire Mind
^n• Flat Stone
^n• Flat Worm
^n• Glaucoma
^n• God's Flesh
^n• Godhead
^n• Haemolacria
^n• Head of the Keeper
^n• Holy Light
^n• Hook Worm
^n• Immaculate Heart
^n• Ipecac (no damage boost, poison effect or arcing)
^n• Iron Bar
^n• Jacob's Ladder
^n• Knockout Drops
^n• Lachryphagy
^n• Large Zit
^n• Little Horn
^n• Lodestone
^n• Lost Contact
^n• A Lump of Coal
^n• Mom's Contacts
^n• Mom's Eyeshadow
^n• Mom's Perfume
^n• Mucormycosis
^n• The Mulligan
^n• My Reflection (no shot speed modifier)
^n• Mysterious Liquid
^n• Ocular Rift
^n• Ouija Board
^n• Ouroboros Worm
^n• The Parasite
^n• Parasitoid
^n• Pisces
^n• Polyphemus (no damage applied, only piercing shots on overkill)
^n• Pop!
^n• Proptosis (no damage multiplier, effectively only decreases damage dealt)
^n• Pulse Worm
^n• Ring Worm
^n• Rotten Tomato
^n• Rubber Cement
^n• Serpent's Kiss
^n• Sinus Infection
^n• Spider Bite
^n• Spoon Bender
^n• Strange Attractor
^n• Sulfuric Acid
^n• Technology Zero
^n• Terra
^n• Tiny Planet (no range up)
^n• Trisagion
^n• Uranus
^n• Wiggle Worm

item.name: Teleport 2.0
item.bot_description:
Teleports Isaac to an unexplored room.
^n^nPrioritizes normal rooms over special rooms. Common special rooms have priority over rarer ones.
^n^nWhen used inside an uncleared room, it will simply reset the room.
^n^nThe order of rooms that his item will teleport Isaac to is as follows:
^n• Grave Room (only in the Dark Room).
^n• Mirror/Minecart Room on Downpour/Mines II.
^n• Normal rooms.
^n• Red rooms.
^n• Boss Room.
^n• Super Secret Room.
^n• Shop.
^n• Treasure Room.
^n• Planetarium.
^n• Sacrifice Room.
^n• Dice Room.
^n• Library.
^n• Curse Room.
^n• Mini-Boss Room.
^n• Challenge Room.
^n• Bedroom.
^n• Arcade.
^n• Vault.
^n• Secret Room.
^n• Devil/Angel Room.
^n• Ultra Secret Room (Mirrored World only).
^n• I AM ERROR room (not in Chest, Dark Room or The Void, instead will teleport to the Devil/Angel Room.).

item.name: Bob's Rotten Head
item.keywords: poison bomb explo gas sloth green
item.bot_description:
Grants a poison bomb above Isaac's head that can be thrown using the cardinal directions and explodes upon impact.
^n^nThe explosion deals DamageStat + 185 damage and leaves behind a gas cloud that poisons enemies that come in contact with it.
^n^nThe poison cloud deals 5 damage per tick (15 per second).
^n^nThe bomb can slightly bounce off of walls before exploding.^n^nCan drop from the Sloth mini-boss.

item.name: Black Powder
item.bot_description:
Leaves a trail of black powder on the ground as Isaac is walking. Using this powder to form a circle will create a pentagram symbol which deals 10 damage per tick (30 per second) to enemies standing inside it.
^n^nThe pentagram lasts for 4.5 seconds.
^n^nFlying enemies are also affected.

item.name: Kidney Bean
item.bot_description: Isaac farts, charming nearby enemies.

item.name: Glowing Hourglass
item.keywords: blue hour glass rewind glowing hour glass
item.bot_description:
Undoes everything that happened in the current room and returns Isaac to the previous room.
^n^nWill restore any health, bombs, coins, keys, cards (except Joker), runes, pills, items and trinkets.
^n^nWill restore devil/angel deal chance if red heart damage has been taken.
^n^nWill remove completion marks obtained in the current room.
^n^nWill reset even counters, such as the Donation Machine progress.
^n^nCan only be used 3 times per floor, after which it will turn into The Hourglass for the rest of the floor.
^n^nCan be used to go back to the previous floor if used in the starting room of a new floor. This will immediately turn it into The Hourglass for the entire floor.
^n^nDoes not affect the chance for a Devil/Angel Room to spawn, or a Void portal appearing, as these chances are seeded per run.
^n^n<:stat_exclamation:1263940092494483568> If used in the starting room of a run, teleports Isaac directly to the Home floor.

item.name: Circle of Protection
item.bot_description:
Creates a large white halo around Isaac that damages enemies inside it and has a chance to reflect enemy shots.
^n^nThe halo deals Isaac's amount of damage 2.73 times per second to enemies inside it.
^n^nThe chance to reflect a shot is 30%. Reflected tears gain a homing effect and deal Isaac's amount of damage.

item.name: Sack Head
item.bot_description:
*On pickup:*^nSpawns a random Grab Bag.
^n^n*While held:*^n10% chance to replace any coin spawned with a Grab Bag.
^n^n20% chance to replace any bomb (including troll bombs), key, card, rune or battery with a Grab Bag.
^n^nDoes not apply to pickups spawned by Isaac, e.g. via IV Bag, and contents of other sacks.
^n^nWorks retroactively, meaning pickups existing on the floor prior to picking the item up can be converted as well.

item.name: Night Light
item.bot_description:
Creates a shining cone of light in front of Isaac that slows down enemies and their projectiles.
^n^nRemoves Curse of Darkness! for the current floor. Will not remove it on later floors, but will significantly lessen its visual effect.
^n^nThe light faces the direction Isaac is moving.
^n^nCannot slow down bosses, but affects their shots.
^n^nEnemies that exit the cone of light will lose the slow effect, however projectiles that touch it are permanently affected.

item.name: Obsessed Fan
item.bot_description: Spawns a fly familiar that follows Isaac's movement with a 0.66 second delay, dealing 2 damage per tick (30 per second).

item.name: Mine Crafter
item.keywords: tnt barrel explo bomb minecrafter orange
item.bot_description:
Spawns a movable TNT barrel that can be exploded by using the item again.
^n^nExploding the TNT barrel does not require for the item to be fully charged.

item.name: PJs
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_soul:1263940226758479953> +4 Soul Hearts.
^n^nHeals 12 Red Heart containers.

item.name: Head of the Keeper
item.bot_description:
Turns Isaac's tears into coins that have a 5% chance to drop a Penny when hitting an enemy.
^n^nCan spawn by blowing up shopkeepers.

item.name: Papa Fly
item.bot_description:
Spawns a fly familiar that mimics Isaac's movement with a 0.66 second delay and fires tears at nearby enemies.
^n^nTears deal Isaac's amount of damage and are fired once per second.

item.name: Multidimensional Baby
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that follows Isaac's movement with a 0.66 second delay.
^n^nWhen a friendly tear passes through the familiar, it splits into 2 parallel tears that gain <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_shotspeed:1263940211591876651> +33% shot speed and <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_range:1263940180163821659> +50% tear height which effectively increases range.

item.name: Glitter Bombs
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_bomb:1263944832515178559> +5 bombs.
^n^nIsaac's bombs gain a 63% chance to spawn a random pickup or trinket upon exploding. Each successful spawn decreases the chance by 1% for the rest of the floor.
^n^nBombs also gain a 15% chance to charm random enemies in the room for 5 seconds upon exploding.

item.name: My Shadow
item.bot_description:
Spawns a shadow familiar that follows Isaac's movement on a very brief delay, and spawns friendly Chargers whenever an enemy comes into contact with it.
^n^nThe Chargers have 20 HP and deal 8.66 damage per tick (18.56 per second). They also deal an additional tick of damage that scales with enemies' max health points, but cannot exceed 3.5.
^n^nChargers last only for the current room.
^n^nNo more than 16 Chargers can be acquired at once.

item.name: Jar of Flies
item.bot_description:
*While held:*^nKilling an enemy adds a fly to the jar that can hold up to 20 flies at once.
^n^n*On use:*^nReleases Blue Flies equal to the number of flies in the jar.
^n^nKills made by Blue Flies, locusts and shooting familiars do not add flies to the jar.

item.name: Lil Loki
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that follows Isaac and shoots tears in the 4 cardinal directions.
^n^nThe familiar shoots 1.36 times per second and deals 3.5 damage.

item.name: Milk!
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that follows closely behind Isaac and blocks projectiles.
^n^nAfter blocking 10 projectiles per floor, the glass breaks, spilling milk on the floor and granting Isaac <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> +1 fire rate for the rest of the floor.
^n^nThe familiar reappears on the next floor.
^n^nThe puddle of milk is purely cosmetic.

item.name: D7
item.keywords: die dice silver grey gray white reroll
item.bot_description:
Restarts the current room and respawns all enemies.
^n^nPickups may be granted for clearing the room again.
^n^nHas no effect in <:stat_greed:1263944856376443104> Greed Mode or rooms that had no enemies.
^n^nHas no effect in Boss Rooms, Devil Deals, and Angel Rooms.
^n^nRespawned champion enemies are unable to drop pickups.

item.name: Mom's Box
item.bot_description:
*On use:*^nSpawns a random trinket.
^n^n*While held:*^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_luck:1263940158839849010> +1 luck.
^n^nBoosts the effects of trinkets. Most often it doubles their original effects, but some trinkets may have special interactions. Check the respective trinket pages for full details about each interaction.
^n^nThe boosted effects stack with golden trinkets.

item.name: Teleport!
item.bot_description:
Teleports Isaac to a random room.^n^nIt is possible to teleport to the Secret Room, Super Secret Room but not to the I AM ERROR room.
^n^nIn the Mirrored World, it can additionally teleport to the Ultra Secret Room.

item.name: Kidney Stone
item.bot_description:
Firing tears will occasionally cause Isaac's head to turn read and charge an attack. Releasing the attack will fire a kidney stone that deals 5x Isaac's damage and pierces enemies, followed by a rapid, inaccurate spray of tears.
^n^nWhen the effect is activated, Isaac gains a temporary <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> x6 fire rate multiplier that decreases rapidly.
^n^nThe effect occurs immediately when the item is acquired, and every ~25 seconds.
^n^nIsaac cannot fire tears normally until the kidney stone effect ends.

item.name: Mega Blast
item.keywords: brimstone devil head satan beam laser
item.unlock_method: Defeat Mega Satan as every character, excluding Tainted characters.
item.bot_description:
Fires a giant Brimstone laser for 15 seconds that persists between rooms and floors.
^n^nThe beam deals 5x Isaac's damage 15 times per second.
^n^nThe beam pushes Isaac backward while active.
^n^nThe beam can be rotated with the shooting buttons.
^n^nWhile the beam is active, Isaac cannot open chests, pick up batteries, items, pills, trinkets or cards/runes, finish the run, or sleep in a bed.

item.name: Dark Prince's Crown
item.bot_description:
Increases Isaac's stats when at exactly 1 red heart.
^n^nThe effect is lost for the rest of the room any time Isaac gains or loses red hearts.
^n^nThe crown glows red while active, and black when inactive.
^n^nThe following stat changes are applied when active:
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> +2 fire rate.
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_range:1263940180163821659> +1.5 range.
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_shotspeed:1263940211591876651> +0.2 shot speed.
^n^nHas no effect on characters that cannot obtain red hearts or coin hearts.

item.name: Apple!
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> +0.3 tears.
^n^nAdds a chance to fire razor blades that deal 4x Isaac's damage.
^n^nThe chance scales with luck, using the formula: 1 / (15 - LuckStat), starting at 6.66% with 0 luck, going up to 100% at 14 luck.

item.name: Lead Pencil
item.bot_description:
After every 15 tears fired, Isaac will fire a low range burst of 12 tears at once from his right eye.
^n^nTears have a 50% chance to be colored red, but this is purely cosmetic.

item.name: Dog Tooth
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +0.3 damage.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_speed:1263940240675045417> +0.1 speed.
^n^nUpon entering a room that's connected to an undiscovered Secret Room or Super Secret room, a dog howl sound will play.
^n^nUpon entering a room that contains an undiscovered Crawl Space, a barking dog sound will play.

item.name: Dead Tooth
item.bot_description:
Holding down a fire button creates a green aura around Isaac that poisons nearby enemies, dealing Isaac's amount of damage 2 times.
^n^nShooting tears is not required for the aura to appear, as long as a fire button is held.
^n^nCan stack up to 6 ticks at a time.

item.name: Linger Bean
item.bot_description:
Holding down a fire button for 4 seconds will create a small brown cloud that damages enemies that walk into it.
^n^nShooting tears is not required for the cloud to appear, as long as a fire button is held.
^n^nThe cloud grows larger over the span of 10 seconds before disappearing. Its damage reduces as it grows larger.
^n^nDamage dealt by the cloud starts at ~1.5x Isaac's damage, and is dealt 4.29 times per second. It scales down to ~0.7x Isaac's damage.
^n^nClouds can be moved slightly by shooting at them.

item.name: Shard of Glass
item.keywords: blue white triangle pyramid tears bleed
item.bot_description:
Grants a 25% chance to drop a full Red Heart upon taking damage.
^n^nTaking damage causes Isaac to bleed and constantly spew out red tears around him. The direction of the bleeding can be influenced by holding a fire button, which will slightly increase its range. It can also be pointed diagonally.
^n^nAfter bleeding for 20 seconds, Isaac will take half a heart of damage, but only red hearts and rotten hearts are affected. This damage also has a 25% chance to drop a red heart.
^n^nThe damage over time effect will continue every 20 seconds until the bleeding is stopped by receiving any form of red heart or rotten heart healing. Eternal hearts also work.
^n^nBleeding will also stop if Isaac has no more red or rotten hearts, or if the next bit of bleed damage will kill him.
^n^nThe bleeding effect of the item won't activate if Isaac has no red or rotten hearts.

item.name: Metal Plate
item.keywords: silver grey gray iron protec shield
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_soul:1263940226758479953> +1 Soul Heart.
^n^nEnemy projectiles have a 25% chance to be reflected off of Isaac, negating damage, but pushing Isaac back a bit.
^n^nReflected tears gain homing and concussive properties, and inherit Isaac's damage and tear effects.

item.name: Yum Heart
item.bot_description:
Heals one red heart container, or 2 if playing as Tainted Magdalene.
^n^nHeals co-op players for half a red heart.
^n^nCan be dropped from the Super Lust mini-boss.

item.name: Eye of Greed
item.keywords: silver gray grey coin penny money
item.bot_description:
After every 20 tears shot, an additional coin tear is fired that turns enemies to gold and petrifies them for a few seconds, similarly to Midas' Touch for the cost of 1¢.
^n^nHitting an enemy with the golden coin will drop a penny, effectively returning the cost unless the shot is missed.
^n^nEnemies killed while golden will drop 1-3 coins.
^n^nThe tear does 1.5 × DamageStat + 10 damage.
^n^nIf Isaac has no money, the golden tear will still be fired, however it won't deal increased damage. The other effects of it will still apply.

item.name: Tarot Cloth
item.bot_description:
*On pickup:*^nDrops a random card.
^n^n*While held:*^nBoosts the effects of certain tarot cards.
^n^nMakes cards glow purple while held, even if they gain no boost.
^n^nFor full details about the boosted effects of each card, please check the respective card pages.

item.name: Varicose Veins
item.bot_description:
Upon getting hit, Isaac will fire 10 tears in a circle around him that have a +25 damage increase.
^n^nGrants a chance to activate the Anemic effect for 2 seconds upon getting hit, leaving damaging red creep on the ground.

item.name: Compound Fracture
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_range:1263940180163821659> +1.5 range.
^n^nTurns tears into bones that shatter into 1-3 shard upon hitting an obstacle or an enemy, and deal 50% of Isaac's damage.
^n^nTears can split only once.

item.name: Polydactyly
item.bot_description:
*On pickup:*^nSpawns a random card, rune or pill.
^n^n*While held:*^nAllows Isaac to carry 2 consumables at the same time (cards, pills, runes, usable objects, etc).

item.name: Dad's Lost Coin
item.bot_description:
*On pickup:*^nSpawns a Lucky Penny.
^n^n*While held:*^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_range:1263940180163821659> +2.5 range.

item.name: Midnight Snack
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_red:1263940190515232838> +1 full Red Heart container.
^n^nHeals 1 additional Red Heart.

item.name: Cone Head
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_soul:1263940226758479953> +1 Soul Heart.
^n^nGrants a 20% chance to negate any type of damage dealt to Isaac. This also includes damage from self-sacrifice mechanics, such as Curse Rooms, Blood Donation Machines, Devil Beggars, etc.
^n^nDamage negation is indicated by Isaac briefly flashing blue.

item.name: Belly Button
item.bot_description:
*On pickup:*^nSpawns a random trinket.
^n^n*While held:*^nAllows Isaac to carry 2 trinkets at once.

item.name: Sinus Infection
item.bot_description:
Grants a 20% chance to fire a booger tear that sticks to enemies and deals damage over time.
^n^nDamage is equal to Isaac's damage stat and is dealt once per second.
^n^nBoogers last for 10 seconds before disappearing.
^n^nBoogers don't inherit Isaac's tear effects, despite them changing appearance.
^n^nBoogers will pierce through bombs and fire places.
^n^nMultiple boogers can stick to the same enemy, resulting in stackable damage.
^n^nIf an enemy dies, jumps or teleports while having a booger attached to them, the booger will slowly fall to the ground and can stick to another enemy before disappearing.
^n^nThe chance to fire booger tears is not affected by luck.

item.name: Lucky Foot
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_luck:1263940158839849010> +1 luck.
^n^nIncreases the chances of winning at Slot Machines, Shell Games, Fortune Telling Machines, and Confessionals.
^n^nIncreases the chance of getting a room-clear reward.
^n^nConverts all negative pills into their positive counterparts, but does not identify them like PHD does.

item.name: Glaucoma
item.bot_description:
Adds a 5% chance to shoot concussive tears that cause enemies to walk around randomly.
^n^nThe effect is permanent for normal enemies, and a very longer than usual duration for bosses when compared to other status effects.
^n^nMakes the screen darker.
^n^nThe chance to shoot concussive tears is not affected by luck.

item.name: Parasitoid
item.bot_description:
Adds a chance to fire egg sack tears that spawn slowing white creep. If they hit an enemy, 1-2 Blue Flies or Blue Spiders are spawned.
^n^nThe chance starts at 14.29% with 0 luck, and goes up to 50% with 5 luck.
^n^nEgg sack tears have <:stat_range:1263940180163821659> x2 tear height which effectively increases range.

item.name: Eye of Belial
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_range:1263940180163821659> +1.5 range.
^n^nGrants piercing tears that after piercing one enemy, gain double <:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> damage, <:stat_tearsize:1263944891675967581> ×1.3 size multiplier and homing properties.

item.name: Sulfuric Acid
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +0.3 damage.
^n^nAdds a 25% chance to shoot acidic tears that destroy obstacles and open doors upon contact.

item.name: Glyph of Balance
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_soul:1263940226758479953> +2 Soul Hearts.
^n^nModifies drops from room clears and champion enemies depending on Isaac's held amount of pickups. It prioritizes drops as follows:
^n• Soul Hearts: when Isaac has no red heart containers and less than 2 soul hearts.
^n• Full Red Hearts: when Isaac is at half a red heart.
^n• Keys: when Isaac has no keys.
^n• Bombs: when Isaac has no bombs.
^n• Pennies: when Isaac has less than 15 pennies.
^n• Keys: when Isaac has less than 5 keys.
^n• Bombs: when Isaac has less than 5 bombs.
^n• Trinkets: when Isaac has no trinkets, and there are no trinkets on the ground in the room.
^n• Soul Hearts: when Isaac has less than 6 total heart containers of any kind.
^n• If none of the above criteria are met, pickups are dropped normally.
^n^nCannot reroll chests.
^n^nGlyph of Balance drops can appear if the room would normally yield no reward. An exception to this rule are hearts drops in Hard Mode which have a separate chance of being replaced with an empty drop.
^n^nWhen playing as a character that cannot have red heart containers, red heart and soul heart drops are skipped from the above list.
^n^nHaving a higher <:stat_luck:1263940158839849010> luck stat means that the effects of the Glyph will occur much less frequently, as room drops will often be replaced with chests that are immune to the Glyph.

item.name: Analog Stick
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> +0.35 tears.
^n^nAllows tears to be fired diagonally by holding down 2 shooting buttons at the same time.
^n^nWhen using a controller or mouse input, tears can be shot in any direction.

item.name: Contagion
item.bot_description:
The first enemy killed in each room will release a gas explosion that poisons nearby enemies.
^n^nEnemies poisoned by this explosion will also release gas upon death, spreading the effect.
^n^nPoisoned enemies don't have to die while poisoned in order for the gas explosion to take place.
^n^nThe initial gas explosion deals 5 damage, and the poison deals Isaac's tear damage per tick for 6 total ticks.

item.name: Finger!
item.bot_description:
Spawns a finger familiar that can be aimed with the shooting buttons in all directions.
^n^nThe finger fires invisible spectral lasers that deal 10% of Isaac's damage 10 times per second.
^n^nThe thickness of the invisible laser scales with Isaac's damage, allowing it to deal damage to a wider area.
^n^nWhilst not being aimed with the firing buttons, the finger will point to Isaac's movement direction.

item.name: Shade
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that mimics Isaac's movement with a 0.66 second delay and deals 5 damage per tick (75 per second).
^n^nAfter the familiar deals over 666 damage, it gets absorbed by Isaac and turns into friendly dark Charges, similar to those spawned by My Shadow.
^n^nThis enables Isaac to do contact damage at the same rate Shade used to.

item.name: Depression
item.keywords: sad pink purple violet blue cloud
item.bot_description:
Spawns a cloud familiar that follows Isaac and leaves a trail of damaging blue creep on the ground.
^n^nThe creep deals 2 damage per tick (20 per second).
^n^nUpon touching an enemy, the cloud has a small chance to shoot a damaging Holy Light beam onto the enemy that deals 20 + DamageStat damage per tick and can strike up to 8 times.

item.name: Doctor's Remote
item.keywords: grey gray silver remote bomb explo
item.bot_description:
Makes a large red crosshair appear on the ground that can be controlled by Isaac's shooting keys.
^n^nAfter approximately 2 seconds, a large missile strikes down on the crosshair, dealing 20x Isaac's damage.

item.name: Hushy
item.bot_description:
Spawns a little Hush familiar that bounces diagonally around the room, dealing 2 damage per tick (30 per second).
^n^nThe familiar stops moving when Isaac is shooting tears, at which point it will block enemy projectiles.
^n^nWhile stationary, the familiar shoots 8 blue projectiles in a circle 0.97 times per second, each dealing 6 damage.

item.name: Lil Monstro
item.bot_description:
Spawns a miniature Monstro familiar that follows Isaac. It charges up and fires a cluster of tears similar to Monstro's attack.
^n^nThe familiar fires 12-14 tears that do 3.5 damage each.
^n^nCharge time is equal to 1 second.

item.name: King Baby
item.bot_description:
Grants a familiar that follows Isaac and is always first in the chain of familiars.
^n^nWhile Isaac is firing tears, the familiar stops moving and glows, causing other familiars to remain stationary as well.
^n^nThis action will cause shooting familiars to fire at nearby enemies automatically, and throwable familiars to launch themselves at enemies.
^n^nWhen Isaac stops shooting, King Baby rapidly moves back to Isaac.

item.name: Big Chubby
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that follows Isaac and charges across the room when Isaac fires.
^n^nThe familiar deals 2.7 damage per tick (40.5 per second) when launched, and blocks enemy projectiles.
^n^nWhen launched, the familiar will travel forward until it hits an obstacle or a wall.

item.name: Broken Glass Cannon
item.bot_description:
This item is acquired when Isaac takes damage while holding Glass Cannon.
^n^nIt begins with no charges, and turns into the Glass Cannon when fully charged.
^n^nFor more details about the charged item, please check the Glass Cannon page.

item.name: Plan C
item.bot_description:
Deals 9,999,999 damage to every enemy in the room, but kills Isaac 3 seconds later.
^n^nCan be used to kill final bosses that have a quick death animation and finish the run in time before dying.
^n^nEven if Isaac does not manage to reach the ending object in time, some bosses are still technically considered dead before their death animation is finished, thus granting the completion mark if not yet acquired.
^n^nList of bosses that cannot be killed in time: Delirium, Ultra Greedier (only as Tainted Forgotten, The Lost, Tainted Lost, The Forgotten in Soul form and Tainted Jacob in Lost form), Mother, The Beast (if used before Isaac starts fighting her directly).
^n^nInvlunerable enemies cannot be killed. This includes temporary invulnerability, such as a closed off Host.
^n^nNo form of invincibility can prevent Isaac from dying after having used Plan C.

item.name: D1
item.bot_description:
Duplicates a random pickup in the current room into another pickup of the same type, but the variant can be different, e.g. using it on a Heart can spawn a Soul Heart.
^n^nCannot duplicate Jera.
^n^nOpened chests will be duplicated into an unopened copy.
^n^nCan be used to duplicate shop pickups into free pickups.

item.name: Void
item.bot_description:
Absorbs and removes all items in the room. Cannot absorb items that require payment.
^n^nIf an active item is absorbed^n^n
Void will grant the activated ability of that item, allowing it to be activated when Void is used again, simultaneously with all other absorbed active items.
^n^nItems are activated in the same order they were absorbed in.
^n^nPassive effects of asorbed active items are not gained.
^n^nIf a passive item is absorbed^n^n
Isaac gains 2 random stat boosts from the following list:
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +1 damage.
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> +0.5 fire rate.
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_speed:1263940240675045417> +0.2 speed.
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_shotspeed:1263940211591876651> +0.2 shot speed.
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_luck:1263940158839849010> +1 luck.
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_range:1263940180163821659> +2.5 range.
^n^nCannot increase stats above their maximum allowed values. If such a stat is chosen, it will effectively do nothing to it.
^n^nItems can be absorbed while the pickup animation is playing, i.e. when Isaac holds the item above his head. This can be used to absorb items from shops or devil deals after purchasing them, or during Curse of the Blind.
^n^nAbsorbing items counts as Isaac taking them, thus will activate Boss Rush, Challenge Rooms and similar mechanics.
^n^nIf Void is used in a room with linked choice item pedestals, only one of them will be absorbed, while the others will vanish as if Isaac took them.
^n^nUsing multiple copies of an active item will activate those items' effects equally as many times.
^n^nOne time use items can still be used only once.

item.name: Pause
item.bot_description:
Pauses all enemies and their projectiles in the room until a fire button is pressed or if 30 seconds have passed.
^n^nTouching paused enemies will still hurt Isaac.

item.name: Smelter
item.unlock_method: Defeat Mom's Heart or It Lives! on Hard Mode as {{i|Apollyon}}.
item.bot_description:
*On use:*^nAbsorbs Isaac's currently held trinkets and permanently applies their effects to him.
^n^nAbsorbed trinkets are displayed on the HUD item tracker as regular items.
^n^n*While held:*^nGrants a 2% chance to convert the room clear reward into a trinket.

item.name: Cupid's Arrow
item.bot_description: Grants piercing tears that travel through enemies.

item.name: Compost
item.bot_description:
Convert all pickups in the current room to Blue Flies or Blue Spiders.
^n^nDoubles Isaac's current amount of Blue Flies and Blue Spiders.
^n^nIf Isaac does not have any Blue Flies or Blue Spiders, spawns one of them.
^n^nDoes not work on Troll Bombs.

item.name: Dataminer
item.keywords: minecraft pickaxe pick axe red notch
item.bot_description:
Rotates every enemy and pickup 90 degrees and moves its sprite up and left without affecting hitboxes.
^n^nAdds random tear effects for the current room and distorts the music.
^n^nConverts all items in the room into glitched items.
^n^nIncreases 1 of Isaac's stats and decreases another. Possible stat changes include:
^n• <:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> ±1 damage.
^n• <:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> ±0.5 fire rate.
^n• <:stat_speed:1263940240675045417> ±0.2 speed.
^n• <:stat_shotspeed:1263940211591876651> ±0.2 shot speed.
^n• <:stat_luck:1263940158839849010> ±1 luck.
^n• <:stat_range:1263940180163821659> ±2.5 range.
^n^nIf the tear stat reaches a negative number, Isaac's tear stat will instead go to the maximum possible value due to an integer overflow.

item.name: Clicker
item.bot_description:
Transforms Isaac into a random unlocked character and applies all of the new character's stat changes.
^n^nRemoves the last passive item collected or trinket gulped.
^n^nCannot transform into a character that hasn't been unlocked yet.
^n^nNon-tainted characters can only transform into other non-tainted characters, and tainted ones can transform only into tainted ones.
^n^nThe Clicker can choose the same character making it seem as no effect took place at all.

item.name: Mama Mega!
item.bot_description:
Destroys all obstacles, machines, beggars, etc and deals 200 damage to every enemy. This effect is applied upon entering each room for the entire floor.
^n^nIt will also open up any doors in the rooms, including Secret Room and Super Secret Room entrances.
^n^nWill blow up the Donation Machine as well, rendering it unusable for the rest of the run.
^n^nOpens the door to Boss Rush and Hush even after the time limit has expired.
^n^nIf Isaac has a Golden Bomb, it will change Mama Mega's sprite on the HUD to a golden one, and using Mama Mega will consume the Golden Bomb, allowing Mama Mega to be used again.

item.name: Wait What?
item.description: I can't believe it's not butter bean!
item.bot_description:
Isaac farts, knocking back enemies and their shots, and sending out rock waves that deal 10 damage per tick to enemies and break obstacles.
^n^nRock waves can break open door entrances, including Secret Rooms. They can also break open Bomb Chests.
^n^nWhen a run is started, the game has a 5% chance to replace Butter Bean with this item in every item pool. This means both items cannot be available at the same time in a run.

item.name: Crooked Penny
item.bot_description:
Has a 50% chance to double all items and pickups in the current room.
^n^nIf the effect fails, removes all items and pickups and spawns a single Penny instead.
^n^nCan be used to take Shop and Devil Room items for free, if duplicated.

item.name: Dull Razor
item.bot_description:
Hurts Isaac without taking away any health, granting invincibility frames and activating any items that trigger upon taking damage.
^n^nCan be used to enter Curse Rooms and open Spiked Chests for free via its invincibility frames.
^n^nCannot be used to exploit Blood Donation Machines, Devil Beggars, etc.
^n^nIgnores the shield granted by Holy Mantle and similar items.

item.name: Potato Peeler
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +0.2 flat damage.
^n<:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488><:stat_red:1263940190515232838> -1 Red Heart container.
^n^nGrants a Cube of Meat.
^n^nGrants the effects of Anemic for the current room.
^n^nCounts as self-damage for the purposes of damage-triggered items.

item.name: Metronome
item.bot_description:
Grants the effects of a random item for the current room.
^n^nCan grant the effects of any active or passive item, except Glowing Hourglass, Plan C, Breath of Life, Clicker and R Key.
^n^nUsing the item multiple times in the same room will replace the effect granted previously.
^n^nCan trigger the effects of items that haven't been unlocked yet.
^n^nHas a reduced chance of selecting Genesis (25%) or Death Certificate (15%).

item.name: D infinity
item.keywords: white ball die dice reroll d1 d4 d6 d7 d8 d10 d12 d20 d100
item.bot_description:
Acts as any die item except for Spindown Dice. Different dice can be cycled through by using the drop key.
^n^nCharge time varies and is equal to the one of the last used die.
^n^nThe icon displayed on the HUD will change based on the selected die.

item.name: Shoop da Whoop!
item.bot_description:
Upon use, the next shot fired will be a large Brimstone-like laser in the direction Isaac is shooting at.
^n^nThe laser deals 2x Isaac's damage and can hit enemies up to 13 times.
^n^nThe laser inherits Isaac's tear effects.
^n^nCan be dropped by the Envy mini-boss.

item.name: Eden's Soul
item.bot_description:
Starts with 0 charges when acquired.
^n^nWhen used, spawns 2 random items from the current room's item pool and vanishes from Isaac's inventory.

item.name: Acid Baby
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that follows Isaac and drops a random pill after every 7 cleared rooms. The first pill is dropped after 6 rooms.
^n^nUpon using a pill, the familiar poisons all enemies in the room for 6 ticks. Each tick deals damage equal to Isaac's. Enemies also take 10 additional damage.

item.name: YO LISTEN!
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_luck:1263940158839849010> +1 luck.
^n^nSpawns a familiar that sporadically moves around the room.
^n^nUpon entering a room with a Secret Room/Super Secret Room entrance, tinted rock or a rock with a Crawl Space underneath, the familiar will fly towards it.
^n^nIf multiple of the abovementioned are present in the room, the familiar will fly from one to another.
^n^nCan sometimes fly over pits, poops or empty tiles, indicating that an unreachable Crawl Space has been generated there.

item.name: Adrenaline
item.bot_description:
Grants <:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> damage based on the number of Isaac's fully empty heart containers (half empty containers don't count).
^n^nDamage is calculated using the formula: ((2 × MissingHearts) ^ 1.6) × 0.1.

item.name: Jacob's Ladder
item.bot_description:
Isaac's tears fire a short-ranged spark of electricity in a random direction upon hitting an enemy or an obstacle. When an arc strikes an enemy, it will strike another nearby enemy, chaining up to 4 enemies.
^n^nEach spark deals half of Isaac's damage, and has spectral and piercing properties.
^n^nEnemies can take damage multiple times from sparks of a single chain. If an enemy takes damage from a tear, it does not take any damage from the chain caused by that tear.
^n^nThe arcing distance is increased on wet floors, such as Downpour, Dross, Flooded Caves, some rooms in Scarred Womb. This also applies after using Flush!.

item.name: Ghost Pepper
item.bot_description:
Grants a luck-based chance to shoot out a blue fire whilst shooting tears, damaging enemies and destroying shots it comes into contact with.
^n^nThe fire lasts for a limited time and can pass through obstacles.
^n^nCauses Isaac's farts to produce fires.
^n^nThe fire deals 3-6x Isaac's damage depending on the size of the flame.
^n^nThe chance of shooting a flame is equal to 1 / (12 - LuckStat). It starts at 8.33% with 0 luck, going up to 50% with 10 luck.
^n^nFlames can be used to destroy Shopkeepers.

item.name: Euthanasia
item.bot_description:
Adds a luck-based chance to fire needles that instantly kill non-boss enemies and causes them to burst into 10 tears in all directions.
^n^nNeedles deal 3x Isaac's damage to bosses and mini-bosses.
^n^nTears from the burst shot can still become needles, but do not retain their insta-kill capabilities. They still do 3x Isaac's damage.
^n^nThe chance to fire a needle starts at 3.33% with 0 luck, going up to 25% with 15 luck.
^n^nNeedles can kill otherwise invulnerable enemies, such as Peep's eyes, Death's Heads and Stoneys & Stone Grimaces.

item.name: Camo Undies
item.bot_description:
Upon entering a new room, Isaac becomes camouflaged which causes all non-boss enemies to be confused and walk around randomly. The effect lasts until Isaac shoots.
^n^nWhile camouflaged, Isaac gains <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_speed:1263940240675045417> +0.5 speed.
^n^nDropping the camouflage deals 15 damage to enemies in a short radius, and briefly grants Isaac <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> +7.5 fire rate and <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +10.5 damage.
^n^nUsing an active item or placing a bomb does not cancel the effect.

item.name: Duality
item.keywords: black white circle ball angel devil
item.bot_description:
Causes both a Devil and Angel Room to spawn whenever one would spawn normally after defeating a boss.
^n^nOnly one of the rooms can be entered, causing the other one to disappear.
^n^nBoth rooms will spawn, even if a Devil Deal has been taken before.
^n^nSometimes only one room will spawn if the boss room does not have enough space for both.

item.name: Eucharist
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_angel:1263940933913804893> 100% chance for an Angel Room to spawn after beating a boss, regardless of damage taken.
^n^nPrevents Devil Deals from appearing.
^n^nThe Angel Room will stay open after leaving.
^n^nEven if the boss has been defeated on the current floor, the item will still spawn an Angel Room, unless a Devil Deal has previously been visited on the floor.
^n^nDoes not work on floors that don't normally spawn a devil/angel room.

item.name: My Reflection
item.description: Boomerang tears + DMG up + luck down
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +1.5 damage.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_range:1263940180163821659> ×2 range multiplier.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_range:1263940180163821659> +1.5 range.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_shotspeed:1263940211591876651> ×1.6 shot speed multiplier.
^n<:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488><:stat_luck:1263940158839849010> -1 luck.
^n^nMakes Isaac's tears pull back to his direction after traveling a short distance.

item.name: Steven
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +1 damage.
^n^nHas a 16.6% chance to drop from the Steven boss.

item.name: Sack of Sacks
item.bot_description: Spawns a familiar that follows Isaac and drops a Grab Bag every 7 or 8 rooms (alternatingly).

item.name: Greed's Gullet
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_emptyred:1263944849988784259> +1 empty Red Heart container for every 25 coins Isaac has.
^n^nHeart containers are removed if the number of coins reduces below the required amount.
^n^nWill grant a total of 4 extra heart containers at 99 coins.
^n^nIf used by a character that cannot obtain Red Heart Containers, it will instead grant Soul Hearts.
^n^nCan kill Isaac if the extra containers are wasted, and the money required for them is spent.
^n^nCan exceed the maximum Coin Heart limit of Keeper and Tainted Keeper.
^n^nWhen combined with Deep Pockets and exceeding 100 coins, an extra heart container is given for every 100 coins instead of 25.

item.name: Large Zit
item.bot_description:
Grants Isaac a chance to fire a creep shot alongside his tears that deals double damage, slows enemies and leaves a short trail of slowing white creep on the ground.
^n^nFires a creep shot in a random direction upon taking damage.
^n^nThe chance to fire a creep shot is not affected by luck.
^n^nCreep shots inherit Isaac's shot speed, but not his tear effects.

item.name: Little Horn
item.bot_description:
Grants Isaac the ability to deal 3.5 contact damage to enemies, 2 times per second.
^n^nGrants a luck-based chance to fire tears that summon Big Horn's hand. The hand will grab and crush any non-boss enemy, killing them instantly.
^n^nThe hand will attack bosses 3 times, dealing 12 damage per hit.
^n^nThe hand is able to push enemy projectiles and increase their speed, which may prove more difficult to dodge.
^n^nThe chance of firing the special tear start at 5% with 0 luck, going up to 20% at 15 luck.
^n^nThe special tears can kill otherwise invulnerable enemies, such as Peep's eyes, Death's Heads, Stoneys & Stone Grimaces.

item.name: Brown Nugget
item.bot_description:
Spawns a stationary fly familiar that automatically shoots at nearby enemies, dealing 3.5 damage per shot.
^n^nThe flies are invulnerable and ignored by enemies.
^n^nThe familiar shoots once per second.

item.name: Poke Go
item.bot_description:
Grants a 20% chance to spawn a friendly enemy upon entering a new room with enemies.
^n^nMultiple friendly enemies can spawn at the same time.
^n^nCan spawn the following enemies:
^n• Attack Fly.
^n• Fat Bat.
^n• Frowning Gaper.
^n• One Tooth.
^n• Pooter.
^n• Vis.
^n^nCan also spawn different friendly variants of the abovementioned enemies.

item.name: Backstabber
item.bot_description:
Tears deal double damage and inflict a bleeding effect when they hit enemies on the back.
^n^nAffected enemies bleed for 5 seconds, taking damage at a rate that scales with their movement speed. The faster an enemy is moving, the faster it will take damage. These enemies will also leave behind red creep that damages other enemies for 2 ticks per second at a rapid rate.
^n^nAn enemy's "back" is considered the opposite of the direction they last moved in.
^n^nEnemies that are standing still don't receive the extra damage.
^n^nThe amount of damage dealt per tick is equal to 2.8 + 0.3 × CurrentFloor.
^n^nThe effects of Backstabber can also be inflicted by shooting familiars.

item.name: Sharp Straw
item.bot_description:
Damages all enemies in the room for DamageStat + 0.1 × EnemyMaxHealth.
^n^nEach damaged enemy has a 15% chance to drop a Half Red Heart.

item.name: Mom's Razor
item.bot_description:
Spawns an orbiting razor familiar that blocks shots and deals contact damage to enemies equal to 20% of Isaac's damage 7.5 times per second (150% per second).
^n^nThe razor also makes enemies bleed for 5 seconds, taking damage at a rate that scales with their movement speed. The faster an enemy is moving, the faster it will take damage. These enemies will also leave behind red creep that damages other enemies for 2 ticks per second at a rapid rate.
^n^nEnemies that are standing still don't receive the extra damage.
^n^nThe amount of damage dealt per tick is equal to 2.8 + 0.3 × CurrentFloor.

item.name: Bloodshot Eye
item.bot_description:
Spawns an orbital familiar that shoots in the direction it's facing and deals contact damage.
^n^nThe familiar deals 2 contact damage per tick (15 per second).
^n^nTears shot from the eye deal 3.5 damage and are fired 1.88 times per second when enemies are within its line of sight.

item.name: Pentagram
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +1 damage.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_angeldevil:1263940944848228474> +10% chance to spawn a devil/angel deal.

item.name: Delirious
item.bot_description:
Spawns Delirum in the form of a friendly boss. The boss remains active until it dies, or another one is spawned via the item.
^n^nRandomizes the room appearance, similar to the effect caused by Delirium.
^n^nThe recharge time is variable based on the quality of the last spawned boss:
^n• 6 rooms: Gemini, Dingle, Gurglings, Larry Jr., The Duke of Flies, Widow, Pin, Dangle, Turdlings, Famine, Gurdy Jr., The Husk, The Hollow, Loki.
^n• 8 rooms: Monstro, Steven, Blighted Ovum, The Haunt, Little Horn, Rag Man, Fistula, Chub, C.H.A.D., Gurdy, Mega Fatty, Mega Maw, Peep, Dark One, Polycephalus, The Wretched, The Forsaken, The Frail, Rag Mega, Pestilence, Gish, Brownie, War, Blastocyst, Scolex, Mr. Fred, Lokii, Daddy Long Legs, Triachnid, Teratoma, Death, Headless Horseman.
^n• 12 rooms: Carrion Queen, The Stain, Big Horn, Monstro II, The Cage, The Gate, The Adversary, The Bloat, Mask of Infamy, Sisters Vis, Conquest, The Fallen, Hush.

item.name: Angry Fly
item.bot_description:
Spawns a fly familiar that orbits around a random enemy in the room, dealing 2 damage per tick (30 per second) to enemies coming into contact with it.
^n^nThe familiar occasionally makes a lunge towards the enemy it is orbiting, allowing brief contact even with smaller enemies.
^n^nWhen the enemy it was orbiting dies, it starts orbiting a different enemy.
^n^nWhen there are no enemies in the room, it will instead orbit Isaac.

item.name: Black Hole
item.bot_description:
Throws a black hole that sucks in pickups, enemies and projectiles, and lasts for 6 seconds.
^n^nThe hole deals 0.4 damage per tick (6 per second) to enemies it's sucking in.
^n^nThe hole will slightly suck in Isaac but cannot deal damage to him.
^n^nCan destroy nearby obstacles in a radius that expands over time.
^n^nCannot destroy room doors.
^n^nCannot suck in stationary or invincible enemies.
^n^nSome bosses cannot be sucked in, although they will still take damage from the hole.

item.name: Bozo
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_soul:1263940226758479953> +1 Soul Heart.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +0.1 flat damage.
^n^nRandomly causes enemies to briefly become charmed or feared.
^n^nTaking damage has a 5% chance to spawn a Rainbow Poop.
^n^nPicking up the item multiple times will not grant further damage ups.

item.name: Broken Modem
item.bot_description:
Causes enemies, enemy projectiles, tears and pickups to briefly freeze in place at random intervals. The frequency of the effect scales with Isaac's luck.
^n^nFrozen enemy shots will disappear.
^n^nHas a 25% chance to double room clear rewards. Cannot double chests, pills or cards. However, it can duplicate chests spawned by Options?.
^n^n<:stat_exclamation:1263940092494483568> Can be used to create a glitched TMTRAINER item under very specific circumstances. This can happen by using Magneto to immediately open a chest that was duplicated by Options? and contained an item.

item.name: Mystery Gift
item.keywords: green red present stripes box christmas
item.bot_description:
Spawns a random item from the current room's item pool, but has a chance to spawn A Lump of Coal or The Poop instead.
^n^nThe item spawned depends on Isaac's luck.
^n• At -10 luck, it has an equal chance to spawn one of the 2 abovementioned items.
^n• At 0 luck, it has a 83.3% chance to spawn a random item, and 8.3% + 8.3% chance to spawn one of the 2 items.
^n• At 10 luck, it has a 90.9% chance to spawn a random item, and 4.5% + 4.5% chance to spawn one of the 2 items.

item.name: Sprinkler
item.bot_description:
Spawns a stationary sprinkler familiar that rotates and fires tears in 8 directions. The tears copy Isaac's stats and tear effects.
^n^nIts rate of fire and rotation depend on Isaac's tears stat.
^n^nThe familiar does not deal contact damage, but is counted as an obstacle and will block some enemies' movement.

item.name: Fast Bombs
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_bomb:1263944832515178559> +7 Bombs.
^n^nAllows Isaac to place bombs rapidly with no delay whatsoever.
^n^nRemoves the knockback between Isaac's bombs.

item.name: Buddy in a Box
item.unlock_method: Obtain 5 familiars in a single run.
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that follows Isaac and has a random appearance, tear effects, fire rate, and damage.
^n^nThe familiar is randomized each floor using the appearance of co-op babies.
^n^nDamage dealt by the familiar scales from ~2-6, while tear delay scales from ~12-30.
^n^nTear effects granted are the same used by Fruit Cake.

item.name: Lil Delirium
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that transforms into another random familiar every 10 seconds. The familiar will take on a Delirium-like appearance, but otherwise has the same stats and behavior as the non-Delirium counterpart.
^n^nCan transform into the following familiars:
^n• Acid Baby
^n• BBF
^n• Big Chubby
^n• Bob's Brain
^n• Cube of Meat (level 4)
^n• Dry Baby
^n• Farting Baby
^n• Fruity Plum
^n• Headless Baby
^n• Hushy
^n• Incubus
^n• Isaac's Head
^n• Lil Brimstone
^n• Lil Gurdy
^n• Lil Haunt
^n• Lil Loki
^n• Lil Monstro
^n• Little Chubby
^n• Little Gish
^n• Robo-Baby 2.0
^n• Seraphim
^n^nCan transform into the same familiar multiple times in a row, thus keeping the same form for more than 10 seconds.
^n^nThe familiar can damage Isaac when taking the form of BBF or Bob's Brain.

item.name: Dr. Fetus
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> ×0.4 fire rate multiplier.
^n^nReplaces Isaac's tears with bombs that explode after approximately 1 second after being fired.
^n^nEach bomb deals 10 times Isaac's damage. If this would lead to more than 60 damage, then the bombs instead deal 5 × DamageStat + 30.^n^nBombs' size depends on tear size modifiers.
^n^nBombs deal no knockback to each other.

item.name: Jumper Cables
item.unlock_method: Pick up any 2 items with the {{tag|battery}} tag in a single run.
item.bot_description: Grants +1 active item charge for every 15 enemies killed.

item.name: Coupon
item.unlock_method: Make 50 purchases from Shops, Devil Rooms and/or Black Markets.
item.bot_description:
*While held:*^nGuarantees a random item or pickup in the Shop to sell at half price.
^n^n*On use:*^nAllows a random item in the current room that costs money or hearts to be taken for free.
^n^nUsing the Coupon in Greed Mode or when holding Restock does not restock the taken item or consumable.
^n^nCan be obtained from Shopkeepers.

item.name: Telekinesis
item.bot_description:
Upon use, for the next 3 seconds, any enemy shots that come near Isaac are held in place. They're fired back as tears when the item charge is depleted, dealing 3.5 damage to enemies.
^n^nAlso pushes away enemies while active.

item.name: Moving Box
item.unlock_method: Use {{i|Pandora's Box}} in the Dark Room.
item.bot_description:
If the box is empty^n^n
Picks up items and pickups in the room and stores them.
^n^nIt can store up to 10 things at once, picked randomly.
^n^nCannot be used to steal items from Shops or Devil Rooms.
^n^nUsing it in a Challenge Room or Boss Rush will take the items, but start the challenge.
^n^nIf used in a room with choice pedestals, only one of them will be packed up, while the others will disappear.
^n^nA Moving Box that is holding stuff cannot be packed within another box.
^n^nIf the box is not empty^n^n
Places all previously stored things in the current room.

item.name: Technology Zero
item.unlock_method: Pick up any 2 items with the {{tag|tech}} tag in a single run.
item.bot_description:
Connects Isaac's tears with electricity beams that deal damage to enemies equal to 30% of Isaac's damage, 15 times per second.
^n^nA single tear can only generate one connection, but other tears can still make connections with it.
^n^nEach of Isaac's tears can connect with allied tears, including those of shooting familiars.

item.name: Leprosy
item.bot_description:
Upon taking damage, Isaac gains a body part orbital that blocks enemy shots and deals 7 damage per tick (30 per second).
^n^nA maximum of 3 body parts can be active at once.
^n^nEach body part can deal up to 30 ticks of damage and/or block 3 shots before getting destroyed.

item.name: 7 Seals
item.bot_description:
