Spawns a random Harbinger familiar that deals contact damage to enemies and periodically spawns locusts if Isaac currently does not have any.
^n^nThe familiar changes appearance and behavior every 10 seconds based on the 5 Harbingers:
^n^n• Famine: wanders around the room leaving slowing black creep on the ground. He deals 0.5 damage per tick (2.14 per second), and spawns yellow locusts every 3 seconds that deal 2x Isaac's damage and slow enemies down.
^n^n• Pestilence: wanders around the room leaving green creep on the ground that deals 1 damage per tick (30 per second). He deals 0.5 damage per tick (2.14 per second), and spawns green locusts every 3 seconds that deal 2x Isaac's damage and poison enemies, dealing Isaac's damage over time.
^n^n• War: chases enemies and has increased speed. He deals 1.5 damage per tick (6.43 per second), and spawns red locusts every 5 seconds that detonate upon impact with enemies, dealing 2x Isaac's damage on impact, and 60 for the explosion. The explosion can hurt Isaac, and synergizes with his bomb modifiers.
^n^n• Death: chases enemies dealing 1.5 damage per tick (6.43 per second), and spawns black locusts every 3 seconds that deal 4x Isaac's damage.
^n^n• Conquest: wanders around the room dealing 0.5 damage per tick (2.14 per second), and spawns 2 white locusts every 2 second that deal 2x Isaac's damage.

item.name: Mr. ME!
item.bot_description:
Summons a ghost that follows Isaac and a controllable blue crosshair on the ground. The crosshair disappears after a few seconds, and the ghost will act based on what the crosshair's was targeting:
^n^n• Item / Pickup / Trinket / Chest / Red Chest / Spiked Chest / Mega Chest: brings it to Isaac.
^n^n• Shop or Devil Deal Item/Pickup: has a 50/50 chance to either grab the item for free or fail, making the ghost disappear and do nothing.
^n^n• Locked Chest / Eternal Chest / Bomb Chest: opens it for free.
^n^n• Button/Reward Plate: presses the button.
^n^n• Enemy: attacks it until it dies or can no longer be targeted due to a form change or similar cause. Deals 3 damage per tick (9 per second).
^n^n• Door: opens the door, even if locked. Can open the door to Mega Satan, Hush (only exit) and Boss Rush (only exit).
^n^n• Secret Room entrance: blows up and opens the entrance.
^n^n• Destructible obstacle / Shopkeeper / Machine / Beggar: explodes and destroys it.
^n^n• Nothing: interacts with the object closest to Isaac.

item.name: Angelic Prism
item.bot_description:
Spawns an orbital familiar with a large radius that splits any tear it passes through it into 4 multi-colored tears.
^n^nAlso works for familiars' tears.

item.name: Pop!
item.bot_description:
Isaac's tears become eyeballs that bounce off of each other and are no longer limited by range, but instead dissipate when they stop moving or hit an enemy or obstacle.
^n^nEyeball tears fall to the ground after bouncing off of each other 8 times.

item.name: Magneto
item.bot_description:
Pickups are attracted to Isaac, even through pits and obstacles, excluding key blocks.
^n^nHearts and batteries are only attracted when they are needed.
^n^nNearby unlocked chests will open automatically, including spiked chests without damaging Isaac.

item.name: Death's List
item.bot_description:
Upon entering a room, a skull appears over an enemy that spawned first. Killing the enemy will cause the skull to move to a different enemy.
^n^nKilling all enemies in the marked order will grant Isaac with a random reward.
^n^nIf a non-marked enemy is killed, the skull will disappear and no bonus will be granted for that room.
^n^nMarked enemies are chosen starting from the top-left corner of the room. New enemies spawned afterward are added at the end of the list
^n^nRooms with no enemies (e.g. only a button) will also give rewards.
^n^nPossible rewards:
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_speed:1263940240675045417> +0.2 speed.
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_range:1263940180163821659> +0.5 range.
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> +0.5 fire rate.
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_shotspeed:1263940211591876651> +0.2 shot speed.
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +1 damage.
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_luck:1263940158839849010> +1 luck.
^n• Soul Heart.
^n• Pill.
^n• Key.
^n• Bomb.
^n• Nickel.

item.name: Haemolacria
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +1 damage.^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> ×1.5 damage multiplier.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tearsize:1263944891675967581> x1.71 tear size multiplier.
^n<:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> x2 tear delay + 10.
^n<:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488><:stat_range:1263940180163821659> x0.8 range multiplier.
^n^nMakes Isaac's tears fire in an arc, and burst into 6-11 smaller tears in all directions upon hitting something or falling to the ground.
^n^nThe burst tears' damage varies from 50-83.33% of the main tear, averaging at ~67% damage.
^n^nShot speed affects the arc oppositely. Higher shot speed lowers the arc, while lower shot speed heightens it.

item.name: Lachryphagy
item.unlock_method: Collect 10 items with the {{tag|tearsup}} tag or {{i|Tears Up}} pills in a single run.
item.bot_description:
Grants Isaac hungry tears that decelerate as they travel. Upon stopping or hitting something, they burst into 5-8 tears (based on tear size) in all directions that deal half of the main tear's damage.
^n^nTears can be fired into each other in order to feed them, increasing their size and damage.
^n^nOne tear can be fed up to 5 times before bursting.
^n^nCombined tears' damage gets added up together, with the first consumed tear giving additional damage.
^n^nFamiliars' tears can also feed Isaac's tears.
^n^nTear bursting is also affected by tear size. With big enough tear size, tears will burst immediately after firing.

item.name: Trisagion
item.keywords: white triangle angel laser beam light
item.bot_description:
Replaces Isaac's tears with piercing white beams of light that deal 33% of Isaac's damage, but can hit the same enemy multiple times.
^n^nBeams decrease in size until disappearing.
^n^nLower shot speed is more beneficial as it can cause enemies to get hit more times.
^n^nBeams can hit enemies through obstacles, but only when passing through only 1 obstacle.

item.name: Schoolbag
item.unlock_method: Visit every Shop from Chapters 1 through 3 in a single run.
item.bot_description:
Allows Isaac to carry 2 active items at once.
^n^nItems can be swapped through by using the drop button.
^n^nItems in the secondary slot will recharge at the same rate as the primary item.

item.name: Blanket
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_soul:1263940226758479953> +1 Soul Heart.
^n^nHeals 1 red heart container.
^n^nGrants a one-time-use Holy Mantle shield upon entering a Boss Room, that blocks one hit.
^n^nThe shield is only active within the Boss Room and cannot be carried over to a different room.
^n^nRe-entering the Boss Room will renew the shield.
^n^nIn Greed Mode, the shield will only activate in The Shop floor final boss fights.

item.name: Sacrificial Altar
item.bot_description:
Sacrifices up to 2 of Isaac's familiars chosen at random, and spawns an item from a preset devil-deal-like list for each of them.
^n^nConverts specific familiars:
^n• Blue Flies, Blue Spiders, Clots, Locusts, Friendly Dips and Minisaacs into Pennies
^n• Book of Virtues wisps into Half Hearts
^n• Lemegeton wisps into Half Soul Hearts
^n^nCauses a brief Curse of Darkness!.
^n^nCannot sacrifice Incubus when playing as Lilith.
^n^nCan sacrifice familiars granted from trinkets, destroying the trinket in the process.
^n^nIf an angelic familiar is sacrificed (Guardian Angel / Seraphim / Sworn Protector), 2 Black Hearts will drop as well.
^n^nIf Isaac already has all items that can be spawned, it will instead spawn 1-2 copies of Pentagram.

item.name: Lil Spewer
item.unlock_method: Have Isaac die to his own explosion from {{i|Ipecac}}, {{i|Bob's Rotten Head}} or a {{i|Horf!}} pill.
item.bot_description:
Spawns a random pill.
^n^nSpawns a familiar that follows Isaac. It charges up for 1 second and fires different types of creep based on his appearance that changes when Isaac uses a pill.
^n^nPossible creep types:
^n^n• Green: deals 0.35 damage per tick (10.5 per second) - total 35.
^n^n• Red: deals 12 damage per tick (120 per second) - total 24.
^n^n• Yellow: 2 damage per tick at its lowest range, up to 15.2 damage at its furthest range (~6.47 damage per second, based on range). Damage ticks for a total of 9 times.
^n^n• Black/White: slows enemies down.
^n^nThe familiar always starts with green creep.

item.name: Marbles
item.bot_description:
*On pickup:*^nSpawns 3 random trinkets.
^n^n*While held:*^nGrants a 10% chance to swallow Isaac's currently held trinket(s) upon taking damage, gaining its effects permanently.

item.name: Mystery Egg
item.unlock_method: Spawn 3 charmed (friendly) enemies in the same room.
item.bot_description:
Spawns an egg familiar that follows Isaac. It cracks and turns into a random friendly enemy when Isaac is hurt.
^n^nRegenerates upon entering a different room.
^n^nClearing more rooms without the egg cracking will results in more useful friendly enemies spawned. The most useful enemies are spawned after clearing more than 13 rooms without taking damage.

item.name: Treasure Map
item.bot_description: Reveals the map layout without showing the icons.

item.name: Flat Stone
item.bot_description: Causes Isaac's tears to bounce off the floor multiple times, dealing splash damage to nearby enemies for 25% of Isaac's damage.

item.name: Marrow
item.unlock_method: Defeat Mom's Heart or It Lives! on Hard Mode as {{i|The Forgotten}}.
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770> +1 Bone Heart.
^n^nSpawns 3 Red Hearts.

item.name: Slipped Rib
item.bot_description:
Spawns an orbital familiar that reflects enemy projectiles, making them deal 6 or 7 damage based on whether they would've hurt Isaac for a half or full heart.
^n^nThe familiar will insta-kill some fly enemies.

item.name: Hallowed Ground
item.bot_description:
Spawns a white poop familiar that follows Isaac and turns into a white poop when Isaac is hurt.
^n^nWhite poop has an aura that grants <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> ×1.2 damage multiplier, <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> ×2.5 fire rate multiplier, homing tears, and has a 50% chance to negate damage.
^n^nCan be used to negate damage from Devil Beggars, Blood Donation Machines, and similar self-sacrifice mechanics.
^n^nWhite poop cannot be destroyed from enemy projectiles and charging attacks.
^n^nThe familiar respawns after leaving the room.

item.name: Pointy Rib
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that can be aimed with the firing buttons in all directions, and deals contact damage.
^n^nDamage dealt is equal to Isaac's tear damage and is dealt 4.29 times per second.
^n^nThe damage increases when Isaac is moving in the direction the familiar is pointing at, and it scales with the speed Isaac is currently moving at, going up to 2x its base damage.

item.name: Book of the Dead
item.bot_description:
Spawns one of the following for each enemy killed in the current room:
^n• Orbital bone familiar (very common).
^n• Friendly Bony (uncommon).
^n• Friendly Bone Fly (uncommon).
^n• Friendly Black Bony (rare).
^n• Friendly Revenant (rare - more common in Mausoleum, Gehenna, Sheol, and Dark Room).
^n^nSpawning a different enemy other than a Bony is only possible after dying at least once to said enemy on the save file.

item.name: Dad's Ring
item.bot_description:
Creates a ring of light around Isaac that petrifies enemies it touches.
^n^nBosses get a standard petrification effect that lasts for a few seconds, while non-boss enemies stay permanently petrified while inside the ring.

item.name: Divorce Papers
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770> +1 Bone Heart.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> +0.7 tears.
^n^nSpawns Mysterious Paper if unlocked and not previously encountered during the run.

item.name: Jaw Bone
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that follows Isaac and glides across the room in the direction of the first tear fired and returns to Isaac upon hitting a wall.
^n^nThe familiar deals 7 contact damage to enemies and will pierce through them if it kills them, or bounce back if it doesn't.
^n^nCan block enemy projectiles, even when stationary.
^n^nCan retrieve pickups.

item.name: Brittle Bones
item.bot_description:
*On pickup:*^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770> +6 Bone Hearts.
^n^nRemoves all Red Heart containers and empties all Bone Hearts.
^n^n*While held:*^nLosing any Bone heart causes Isaac to fire a ring of 8 bones that deal 22 + DamageStat damage and split into more bones that deal damage half of this amount.
^n^nLosing a Bone Heart also grants a permanent <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> +0.4 fire rate.
^n^nNo effects are applied when losing Bone Hearts via a Devil Deal or other means that don't involve directly taking damage.

item.name: Mom's Eye
item.description: Eye in the back of your head
item.bot_description:
Gives Isaac a chance to simultaneously shoot a tear out of an eye on the back of his head.
^n^nThe chance starts at 50% with 0 luck and goes up to 100% with 5 luck.

item.name: Broken Shovel
item.bot_description:
Can be acquired by defeating the first floor boss under a minute (indicated by Mom yelling "Isaac!").
^n^nBombing the starting room of the floor after defeating the boss will drop the item. If Isaac has no bomb, the Sacrifice Room can be used which will guarantee a bomb drop on the first sacrifice.
^n^nThe Lamb must be defeated at least once in order for the item to appear.
^n^n<:stat_exclamation:1263940092494483568> Forms Mom's Shovel when combined with the other piece of the shovel.
^n^n*While held:*^nCauses 1-2 Mom's feet to attempt to stomp Isaac every few seconds. Each stomp deals a full heart of damage to Isaac if successful, and 100 damage to enemies.
^n^nStomps will not blow up Slot Machines or Beggars, but will destroy obstacles, Bomb Chests, and will open doors.
^n^nThe stomps cease while fighting Mom.
^n^nRemoves the 20 minute time limit on the Boss Rush door, but forces Isaac to complete Boss Rush before advancing to the next floor.
^n^nForces The Negative to appear after defeating Mom, ultimately leading Isaac to Sheol.
^n^n<:stat_exclamation:1263940092494483568> If the item is dropped, leaving the room will cause it to disappear.
^n^n*On use:*^nPauses stomps for the current room.
^n^nIf used in Boss Rush or a Challenge Room, stomps will be paused for only a single wave.

item.name: Broken Shovel
item.bot_description:
Can be acquired by completing Boss Rush while holding the first half of the shovel, which transforms it into Mom's Shovel.
^n^nPermanently ceases the Mom's feet stomps.

item.name: Mom's Shovel
item.bot_description:
Spawns a trapdoor that leads to the next floor.
^n^nIf used on a tile with a special graphic (e.g. grass, piece of garbage, etc), it will instead spawn a Crawl Space once per floor.
^n^nIf used in Womb II, the trapdoor will always lead to Sheol.
^n^nCan only spawn a Crawl Space trapdoor if used in any floor after Womb. Regular trapdoors won't be spawned in these floors.
^n^n<:stat_exclamation:1263940092494483568> Using it on a dirt patch that appears in Grave Rooms in the Dark Room will unlock The Forgotten. If already unlocked, will spawn a random chest instead.

item.name: Mucormycosis
item.bot_description:
Grants a 25% chance to shoot a spore tear that sticks to enemies and explodes after 2.5 seconds.
^n^nThe explosion deals 5 damage and poisons nearby enemies, firing 4 more spores in a cross pattern.
^n^nThe poison deals Isaac's amount of damage for a total of 6 times.
^n^nSpores produced from Isaac's tears have homing properties.
^n^nSpores cannot hurt Isaac.

item.name: 2Spooky
item.bot_description: Constantly applies fear to enemies near Isaac, causing them to run away.

item.name: Golden Razor
item.bot_description:
*On pickup:*^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_coin:1263944839830179950> +5¢.
^n^n*On use:*^nConsumes 5¢ and grants <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +1.2 damage for the current room.
^n^nDoes nothing if Isaac has less than 5¢.

item.name: Sulfur
item.bot_description:
Grants Brimstone for the current room.
^n^nIf Sulfur has already been used in the current room, or Isaac has Brimstone, it instead grants <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +1 damage, <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> ×1.2 damage multiplier, and widens the laser for the current room.

item.name: Fortune Cookie
item.keywords: china chinese japanese soul card rune trinket
item.bot_description:
Gives one of the following:
^n• Random fortune (69.5% chance).
^n• Soul Heart (15% chance).
^n• Card or Rune (12% chance).
^n• Random trinket (3.5% chance).

item.name: Eye Sore
item.bot_description: Grants Isaac a random chance to fire 1-3 additional tears in random directions when shooting.

item.name: 120 Volt
item.keywords: electric spark zap cable plug robot
item.bot_description:
Repeatedly zaps enemies near Isaac with electricity beams that deal 75% of Isaac's damage.
^n^nEnemies can be zapped up to 5 times per second.
^n^nEach zap can hit up to 4 enemies.
^n^nArcing distance is increased on wet floors, such as Downpour, Flooded Caves, Dross, some rooms in Scarred Womb, as well as when using Flush!
^n^nIt's possible to zap an enemy standing directly on the other side of an obstacle.

item.name: Lemon Mishap
item.bot_description:
Creates a small pool of yellow creep that deals 8 damage per tick (24 per second) to enemies inside it.
^n^nThe creep remains active until Isaac leaves the room.

item.name: It Hurts
item.bot_description:
Causes Isaac to release a ring of 10 tears upon taking damage, and gain a fire rate increase for the current room.
^n^nEach tear in the ring deals 10 damage and does not inherit Isaac's tear effects.
^n^nThe first hit taken in a room grants <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> +1.2 fire rate, while each subsequent hit grants <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> +0.4 fire rate.
^n^nThe tears also leave damaging red creep when they land that deals 2 damage per tick (20 per second), and lasts for 5 seconds.
^n^nThe fire rate boost can be stacked indefinitely.

item.name: Almond Milk
item.description: DMG down + tears up + you feel nutty
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> ×4 fire rate multiplier.
^n<:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> ×0.3 damage multiplier.
^n<:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488><:stat_tearsize:1263944891675967581> -0.16 tear size.
^n^nCauses each tear fired to gain a random worm trinket effect, as well as some item effects such as Rubber Cement, My Reflection and Tiny Planet.

item.name: Rock Bottom
item.unlock_method: Complete Boss Rush as {{i|Jacob and Esau}}.
item.bot_description:
Locks Isaac's stats to their highest values reached after picking up the item, preventing stats from ever going down.
^n^nThe real values of Isaac's stats are still being calculated in the background, but only the highest values are applied.
^n^nFor example, using The Book of Belial would normally grant +2 damage for the current room. Rock Bottom allows this bonus to be carried over for the rest of the run. However, since the original damage is calculated in the background, Isaac will have to earn more than +2 damage from other items in order to see an increase in overall damage.
^n^nIt is recommended to stack as many temporary buffs at once as possible in order to reach high stat values.
^n^n<:stat_exclamation:1263940092494483568> Taking items that lower your stats may seem to not have an effect, but due to background calculation, doing this will make it more difficult to reach higher stats on the long run.

item.name: Nancy Bombs
item.keywords: pink boom explo random enigma bombs
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_bomb:1263944832515178559> +5 Bombs.
^n^nIsaac's bombs gain 1-4 random bomb synergies (mostly 1).
^n^nCan also apply the effects of Bob's Bladder, Strange Attractor and Golden Bombs (only visual effect).

item.name: Blood Puppy
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that chases nearby enemies, dealing 2 damage per tick (8.57 per second)
^n^nThe familiar will evolve 2 times after killing some enemies.
^n^nEach boss killed by Blood Puppy counts as killing 4 non-boss enemies.
^n^nAfter killing 15 enemies^n^n
Blood Puppy deals 7.5 damage per tick (16.07 per second) to enemies.
^n^nIt will charge at enemies that are aligned with it in the cardinal directions, dealing 90 damage per second while charging.
^n^nDrops a Half Red Heart for every 10 enemies it kills.
^n^nBecomes hostile and will charge at Isaac if aligned with him, dealing half a heart of damage.
^n^nCan be damaged by Isaac to return it back to normal after it takes enough damage. It has 20 health points + 90 armor.
^n^nAfter killing 25 more enemies (40 total)^n^n
Increases in size and deals 15 damage per tick (150 per second).
^n^nDestroys obstacles it runs into while charging.
^n^nDeals a full heart of damage to Isaac.
^n^nDrops a full Red Heart after every 10 kills.
^n^nHas 50 health points + 90 armor.

item.name: Dream Catcher
item.keywords: purple violet cutscene nightmare floor transition
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_halfsoul:1263940146504532049> +1 Half Soul Heart each floor.
^n^nChanges the nightmare cutscene that plays during floor transitions. It will now show the item that will be found in the upcoming Treasure Room, as well as the floor's boss.
^n^nIt will also reveal items during Curse of the Blind!, as well as the second hidden item on alternate floors.
^n^nBoth items and bosses are shown during Curse of the Labyrinth!.
^n^nCannot show glitched items generated by TMTRAINER.
^n^nWill show a poop in the Treasure Room if there are no item pedestals inside it.
^n^nIn The Void, it will list all possible bosses found on the floor.

item.name: Paschal Candle
item.keywords: cross angel flame fire tears pascal
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that follows Isaac and grants <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> +0.4 fire rate for each room cleared in a row without taking damage.
^n^nThe bonus can stack up to 5 times, giving a total of +2 fire rate. This is represented by the flame burning at its brightest.
^n^nThe bonus resets immediately upon taking damage, unless damage is taken from self-sacrifice mechanics, such as Curse Rooms, Blood Donation Machines, etc.

item.name: Divine Intervention
item.keywords: cross angel yellow white shield protec
item.bot_description:
Double-tapping a fire button creates a shield that slowly moves in the chosen direction and disappears after 1 second.
^n^nThe shield has a variety of effects as listed below.
^n^nIt will push back enemies, causing them to take damage upon hitting a wall or enemy, as well as deal damage to hit enemies. Both damage amounts are equal to 10 + 2 × CurrentFloor.
^n^nIt will reflect back enemy tears, dealing damage to enemies depending on the source of the tear. Damage is 6 for tears that would deal half a heart of damage to Isaac, and 7 if they would deal a full heart.
^n^nReflected projectiles do not inherit Isaac's tear effects.
^n^nIt can also reflect enemy lasers, dealing 7 damage per tick (105 per second). It is also capable of reflecting The Beast's laser.

item.name: Blood Oath
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that follows Isaac and stabs him at the beginning of the each floor if he has more than half a red heart.
^n^nThe familiar will drain as much red hearts as possible without killing Isaac, ultimately leaving him at half a red heart, or no red hearts at all if he has other types of hearts that will keep him alive.
^n^nWhen stabbed, Isaac gains increased stats for the rest of the floor: <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +0.15 × HeartsLost ^ 2 worth of damage, and <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_speed:1263940240675045417> +0.1 × HeartsLost worth of speed.
^n^nEven though a single stab animation, every bit of damage taken is treated separately per half a heart lost, which can lead to synergies with some items.

item.name: Distant Admiration
item.bot_description: Spawns a red attack fly that circles around Isaac and deals 5 damage per tick (75 per second).

item.name: Playdough Cookie
item.bot_description:
Causes every tear fired by Isaac to have a different color and corresponding effect:
^n• Light Brown: none.
^n• Green: poison.
^n• Yellow: fear.
^n• Blue: chance for Proptosis, but start at x1 damage instead of x3.
^n• Light Blue: slowing effect, and freeze on kill.
^n• Pink: charm.
^n• Red: double damage, petrifying effect, or Fire Mind.
^n• Purple: homing.
^n• Dark Orange: mark effect (forces enemies to attack the marked enemy).

item.name: Orphan Socks
item.description: Speed up + your feet feel stronger
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_soul:1263940226758479953> +2 Soul Hearts.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_speed:1263940240675045417> +0.3 speed.
^n^nGrants immunity to spikes on the ground and creep.
^n^nDoes not prevent damage from Curse Rooms, Spiked Chests, or Spiked Rocks, but prevents damage from Spiked Rock bridges.
^n^nDoes not prevent the use of a Sacrifice Room - these spikes will still deal damage.

item.name: Eye of the Occult
item.description: DMG up + range up + controlled tears
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +1 damage.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_range:1263940180163821659> +2 range.
^n<:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488><:stat_shotspeed:1263940211591876651> -0.16 shot speed.
^n^nIsaac's tears no longer move on their own and can be controlled mid-air with the shooting buttons.

item.name: Immaculate Heart
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_red:1263940190515232838> +1 full Red Heart container.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> ×1.2 damage multiplier.
^n^nFully heals Isaac.
^n^nCauses Isaac to frequently fire additional spectral tears that orbit around him until they hit the ground. These tears inherit most tear effects.

item.name: Monstrance
item.bot_description:
Creates a large pulsing aura around Isaac that damages enemies inside of it.
^n^nThe aura's damage scales as enemies get closer towards the inside of the aura, ranging from 0.4 on the edge, up to 3.9 + 0.3 × CurentFloor.
^n^nThe aura deals damage 7.5 times per second.

item.name: The Intruder
item.bot_description:
Causes Isaac to fire 4 slowing tears in addition to his regular ones 0.68 times per second that deal 1.5 damage each.
^n^nUpon taking damage, there's a luck-based chance for Isaac's head to pop off and spawn Blue Spiders, releasing the intruder familiar.
^n^nThe familiar will leap at enemies, dealing up to 4.5 contact damage depending on how fast it's moving, 4.29 times per second, and will fire 4 slowing tears instead of Isaac, 1.88 times per second.
^n^nThe chance for the familiar to pop off goes up to 100% with 4 luck.
^n^nThe familiar only lasts for the current room, and reattaches to Isaac upon entering a new room.

item.name: Dirty Mind
item.bot_description:
Converts all enemy Dips and Drips into Dip familiars.
^n^nGrants a chance to replace rocks with poop when generated.
^n^nCauses poops to spawn 1-4 Dip familiars when destroyed, which will loosely follow Isaac, block enemy projectiles, and deal contact damage to enemies equal to 2x Isaac's damage.
^n^nDips can deal up to 2 ticks of contact damage and/or block 2 shots before dying.
^n^nDifferent poop variants grant different types of Dip familiars.
^n^nDip variants based on destroyed poop^n^n
^n• Corny Poop: Dips spawn a Blue Fly on death.
^n^n• Red Poop: Dips deal double damage and charge at enemies, but automatically die after 15 seconds.
^n^n• Golden Poop: Dips have a chance to inflict Midas' Touch on enemies they hit. They can take up to 5 hits before dying.
^n^n• Rainbow Poop: Dips charm enemies they hit and have a chance to drop half red hearts on death.
^n^n• Black Poop: Dips leave a trail of slowing creep on the ground.
^n^n• White Poop: Dips have the Hallowed Ground aura around them, and can take up to 3 hits.
^n^n• Stone Poop: Dips deal an additional 3.5 damage per hit, and can take up to 6 hits.
^n^n• Stinky Poop: Dips release toxic gas as they move, and a larger cloud of gas upon death. The gas does 50% of Isaac's damage per tick (~1.2x Isaac's damage per second) and poisons enemies. Clouds left behind while alive last 1.5 seconds, while the on-death cloud lasts 8 seconds.
^n^n• Fire Poop: Dips set enemies ablaze when hit, and leave behind a fire when they die. The burn deals 3.5 damage up to 6 times. The fire deals 8 damage at full durability, 6 after taking 1 hit, and 4 otherwise, for a total of 22 damage.

item.name: Damocles
item.description: A king's fortune... but at what cost?
item.unlock_method: Defeat The Lamb as {{i|Jacob and Esau}}.
item.bot_description:
Summons a sword above Isaac's head. As long as the sword is active, all item pedestals become doubled, spawning an additional free item next to them. Both items can be taken.
^n^nIt will also double items spawned via other means, e.g. via Machines, Beggars, via other items, cards, etc.
^n^nWill not double items spawned from chests, except for Mega Chests.
^n^nWill not double items that require payment, such as ones in Shops and Devil Deals.
^n^nThe additional item is pulled from the current room's item pool, even if the original item was from another pool.
^n^n<:stat_exclamation:1263940092494483568> After Isaac gets hit once the item has been activated, the sword can fall at any time and instantly kill Isaac. Self-sacrifice mechanics won't activate this effect.
^n^nThe sword has a 1/10000 chance every 4 frames to fall. This chance does not increase as more hits get taken.
^n^nThe sword falling can be survived if Isaac has invincibility at the time, or if he has an extra life. No more extra items will spawn once the sword has fallen.

item.name: Free Lemonade
item.bot_description: Spawns a lemonade pool on the ground that deals 8 damage per tick (24 per second) and lasts for ~19 seconds.

item.name: Spirit Sword
item.bot_description:
Replaces Isaac's tears with a sword that can be swung in front of him. The sword deals 3 × DamageStat + 3.5 damage and knocks back enemies it hits and Isaac.
^n^nThe sword has no fire rate limitation and can be swung as fast as the fire button can be pressed.
^n^nThe sword can be used to collect pickups.
^n^nIf Isaac's total health is equal to or greater than his number of red heart containers, the sword will fire a projectile when swung. This projectile deals DamageStat + 2 damage and has a cooldown of 2x Isaac's normal tear rate.
^n^nHolding an attack button charges a spin attack which damages all enemies around Isaac, deflects enemy projectiles, and launches a projectile regardless of Isaac's health.
^n^nThe circular swing deals 8 × DamageStat + 10 damage, while the projectile created from it deals 4 × DamageStat + 4.
^n^nThe charge time is based on Isaac's tear stat, at ~4x Isaac's normal tear rate.
^n^nWhile charging, the sword will damage the first enemy that comes in contact with it, canceling the spin attack.

item.name: Book of Shadows
item.bot_description:
Creates a protective shield around Isaac, negating all types of damage in the room for 10 seconds.
^n^nPrevents damage from Blood Donation Machines, Devil Beggars, Hell Games, and Confessionals.
^n^nDoes not prevent damage from IV Bag.

item.name: Red Key
item.unlock_method: Open {{i|Mom's Chest}} in the Home level.
item.bot_description:
*While held:*^nIndicates walls that can create a Red Room with a red outline.
^n^n*On use:*^nCreates a Red Room when used next to one of the red outlines on walls.
^n^nRed Rooms are most commonly same as normal rooms, but with a 10% chance to be any type of special room instead. It can create these types of rooms:
^n• Angel Room
^n• Arcade
^n• Bedroom
^n• Curse Room
^n• Devil Room
^n• Dice Room
^n• Library
^n• Mini-Boss Room
^n• Planetarium
^n• Sacrifice Room
^n• Secret Room
^n• Shop
^n• Super Secret Room
^n• Treasure Room
^n• Vault
^n^nRooms created by Red Key will always be 1x1 rooms with doors available on all sides.
^n^nIf a door leads Isaac outside of the 13x13 playable area of the floor, it will take Isaac to the I AM ERROR room.
^n^nSince Secret Rooms cannot be overwritten by Red Key, the lack of an red outline can be used as an indicator that a Secret Room is possibly located behind the wall.
^n^nIf a created Red Room is adjacent to the Ultra Secret Room, its entrance will immediately open along with a jingle sound.
^n^nHas no effect in <:stat_greed:1263944856376443104> Greed Mode and cannot normally be obtained there.
^n^n<:stat_exclamation:1263940092494483568> Can be used to open the hidden closet door in the Home level that unlocks the Tainted version for each character. If the character has already been unlocked, this room will contain Inner Child, or a Shopkeeper if not unlocked.

item.name: Psy Fly
item.bot_description:
Spawns an orbital fly familiar that rapidly chases and blocks enemy shots.
^n^nAfter blocking a certain amount of shots, it enters a shot cooldown period where it only orbits around Isaac, but can still block shots.
^n^nThe familiar deals 1 damage per tick (15 per second).

item.name: Wavy Cap
item.description: Tears up. A mind changing experience!
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> +0.75 fire rate.
^n<:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488><:stat_speed:1263940240675045417> -0.03 speed.
^n^nDistorts the screen and background music.
^n^nThe effects can be stacked multiple times, making the colors turn very bright and intense after multiple uses.
^n^nEach use increases the item's charge time which starts at 0.5 seconds and goes up to 15 seconds after the 9th use. After the 10th use, it will no longer recharge automatically over time.
^n^nLeaving the room doubles the speed penalty and multiplies the <:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> fire rate bonus by x0.4 for the uses in that room.
^n^nClearing a room removes one use's worth of penalties and bonuses.

item.name: Rocket in a Jar
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_bomb:1263944832515178559> +5 Bombs.
^n^nWhen placing a bomb while holding any fire button, an explosive rocket will be shot in the direction corresponding to the fire button held.
^n^nRockets deal the same amount of damage as regular bombs and inherit bomb synergies.
^n^nRockets are not affected by Isaac's shot speed.

item.name: Book of Virtues
item.display_type: Active + Passive item (4 rooms recharge time)
item.keywords: light blue cross angel wisp bethany orbital #type:active
item.bot_description:
*While held:*^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_angel:1263940933913804893> +25% chance for an Angel Room to appear after defeating a boss.
^n^nGuarantees the first deal encountered in a run 
to be an Angel Room.
^n^nAllows an Angel Room to spawn even if a Devil Deal was taken.
^n^nWhen used by itself^n^n
Spawns an orbital wisp that fires spectral tears alongside Isaac, block shots and deals contact damage to enemies. It will get destroyed after taking enough damage.
^n^nA normal wisp is summoned in the middle ring, has 2 health points and tears that deal 3 damage. It deals contact damage equal to 2x Isaac's tear damage.
^n^nAs the wisp takes damage, it shrinks in size.
^n^nWhile Isaac is invulnerable, wisps are also invulnerable.
^n^nMultiple wisps can be summoned at once, and are placed in 3 different rings around Isaac: inner ring (max 6 wisps), middle ring (max 8 wisps), and outer ring (max 12 wisps), for a total of 26 wisps.
^n^nIf a new wisp is summoned while having the maximum number of wisps, the most damaged wisp or most old will get replaced.
^n^nWhen used with another item^n^n
Picking up another active item while holding Book of Virtues will stack the new item on top of the book, essentially turning the book into a passive item.
^n^nUsing the active item will spawn unique wisps that are different for each item. For more details about each active item's unique wisps, check out an active item page.
^n^nUnique wisps come with their own appearances, modified attributes and special effects.

item.name: Alabaster Box
item.bot_description:
General information^n^n
The item starts with no charges and cannot be charged by clearing rooms or picking up batteries. It can only be charged by picking up Soul Hearts. Each Half Soul Heart increases the charge by 1 and gets directly added to the box rather than going to Isaac's health bar.
^n^nBoth Black Hearts and Soul Hearts can be used to recharge the box.
^n^nTaking a Devil Deal that requires Soul Hearts will take charges from the box before using Isaac's health. This also applies to The Lost.
^n^n*On use:*^nConsumes the item and spawns 3 Soul Hearts and 2 items from the Angel Room item pool.
^n^nIf a Devil Deal was previously taken, the reward is reduced to 2 Soul Hearts and 1 Angel Room item.
^n^nThere's a small chance for each Soul Heart to be replaced with an Eternal Heart instead.

item.name: The Stairway
item.description: May you get what you came for
item.bot_description:
Generates a ladder that leads to a special Angel Room Shop at the start of each floor.
^n^nThese shops will always contain the following:
^n• An item from the Angel Room item pool.
^n• Eternal Heart.
^n• Soul Heart.
^n• Key.
^n• Holy Card.
^n• Angel statue that can be fought for a Key Piece.
^n• Beggar or Rotten Beggar next to the entrance.
^n• Confessional, if unlocked.
^n^nItems and pickups can be on sale just like in normal shops.
^n^nThe ladder will disappear once Isaac leaves the starting room.
^n^nThe ladder will also appear in Greed Mode.

item.name: Sol
item.keywords: blue sun glow map boss sun
item.bot_description:
Shows the location of the Boss Room on the minimap.
^n^nAfter defeating the floor's boss^n^n
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +3 damage.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_luck:1263940158839849010> +1 luck.
^n^nActivates the effects of XIX - The Sun.
^n^nFully recharges Isaac's active item.
^n^nRemoves any curses.
^n^nThese effects apply for the rest of the floor.

item.name: Luna
item.description: The moon's blessing shines upon you
item.bot_description:
Adds an extra Secret Room and Super Secret Room on each floor. Does not apply to the floor the item was picked up on.
^n^nReveals one random Secret Room on the map on pickup, and at the start of each floor.
^n^nSecret Rooms will contain a shining beam of light that causes the following when entered:
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_halfsoul:1263940146504532049> +1 Half Soul Heart.
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> +1 fire rate for the first beam entered; +0.5 for all subsequent ones. Stat changes only apply for the current floor.
^n• Creates a strong shine around Isaac that is increased for every beam of light entered. It can be used to light up dark areas or fight the Curse of Darkness!.
^n^nBeams of light don't appear in Ultra Secret Rooms.
^n^nNo additional Secret Rooms are added in Greed Mode, Blue Womb, the Ascent, and Home.

item.name: Mercurius
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_speed:1263940240675045417> +0.4 speed.
^n^nOpens all normal doors after entering a room, along with the door Isaac came from. This allows Isaac to leave at any time without completing the room.
^n^nDoes not open doors that require pickups to unlock, such as Treasure Rooms, Shops, etc.
^n^nCannot open the Boss Rush door.

item.name: Venus
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_red:1263940190515232838> +1 full Red Heart container.
^n^nHeals 1 additional Red Heart.
^n^nContinuously charms enemies near Isaac. The effect wears off quickly after enemies move away from Isaac.

item.name: Terra
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +1 damage.
^n^nReplaces Isaac's tears with rocks that deal extra knockback and have a chance to destroy doors and obstacles.
^n^nRock tears deal varying damage between x0.5 and x2 Isaac's damage.
^n^nTears can destroy the armor of Tuff Twins and The Shell, and bypasses Blasters' damage reduction.

item.name: Mars
item.bot_description:
Isaac can dash by double-tapping a direction key.
^n^nWhile dashing, Isaac is immune to all sources of damage, with the exception of self-sacrifice mechanics such as Devil Beggars and Blood Donation Machines. However, it can be used to enter Curse Rooms and open Spiked Chests for free.
^n^nHe also gains 1 second of invulnerability after the dash, similar to the Book of Shadows effect.
^n^nThe dash deals 4 × DamageStat + 8 damage.
^n^nThe direction of the dash can be influenced by holding another movement button.
^n^nHitting an obstacle while dashing knocks back Isaac and surrounding enemies. This might cause them to take damage if they collide with another enemy or an obstacle.
^n^nThe knockback effect also creates rock waves in a small radius that deal 10 damage per tick (3-5 ticks in total), and can break obstacles.
^n^nThe dash has a 3-second cooldown.

item.name: Jupiter
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_red:1263940190515232838> +2 full Red Heart containers.
^n<:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488><:stat_speed:1263940240675045417> -0.3 speed.
^n^nStanding still causes Isaac to build up speed at a rate of +0.25 per second, up to a +0.5 total bonus.
^n^nIsaac Charges up while standing still. Moving releases a fart cloud that damages and poisons enemies that pass through it. This drains the speed buff at a rate of -0.25 per second. The clouds are active for the duration of the speed buff.
^n^nThe fart cloud deals 50% of Isaac's damage per tick (150% per second), and lasts ~2.5 seconds.
^n^nGrants immunity to poison clouds.

item.name: Saturnus
item.bot_description:
Creates a circle around Isaac that contains 7 orbiting spectral tears which copy Isaac's tear effects.
^n^nThe tears deal 1.5 × DamageStat + 5 damage.
^n^nThe tears fall to the ground after 13 seconds and are renewed upon entering a new room.
^n^nEnemy tears have a chance to be caught in the orbit, making them able to damage enemies. These tears disappear a shrot time after leaving the room.

item.name: Uranus
item.bot_description:
Turns Isaac's tears into icicles that freeze non-boss enemies upon death, turning them into ice statues.
^n^nPrevents on-death effects from occurring, such as enemies firing tears on death, exploding, splitting into other enemies, etc.
^n^nFrozen enemies can be kicked which makes them slide and leave damaging creep across the room. They shatter and release 10 icicle tears in a circle upon hitting an enemy or a wall.
^n^nThe on-shatter icicles will slow enemies for 4 seconds or turn them into more ice statues if they deal lethal damage. They deal damage equal to 6 + CurrentFloor, and don't inherit Isaac's tear effects.
^n^nThe creep rapidly deals 2 damage per tick (20 per second).
^n^nIce statues can be shattered if shot by 10 tears or enemy projectiles, or a single explosion.
^n^nSliding statues deal 35 flat damage to enemies.

item.name: Neptunus
item.keywords: blue trident spike devil charge tears neptune
item.bot_description:
While not firing tears, Isaac charges a special attack that fires multiple tears in rapid succession.
^n^nThe charge time and maximum tears per charge scales with Isaac's tears stat.
^n^nHas no effect on Isaac's tear rate when not charging.

item.name: Pluto
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> +0.7 tears.
^n<:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488><:stat_size:1263944884474347630> -50% size.
^n<:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488><:stat_size:1263944884474347630> -73% hitbox size.
^n^nAllows Isaac to squeeze between objects and makes some enemy shots pass over him, all as a result to his size decrease.

item.name: Voodoo Head
item.bot_description:
Spawns an additional Curse Room on each floor, whenever possible. Does not apply to the floor the item was picked up on.
^n^nImproves the layouts of Curse Rooms, often making them more beneficial.
^n^nMakes a penny spawn in every Curse Room.
^n^nHas no effect in <:stat_greed:1263944856376443104> Greed Mode.

item.name: Number One
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> +1.5 tears.
^n<:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488><:stat_range:1263940180163821659> -1.5 range.
^n<:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488><:stat_range:1263940180163821659> ×0.8 range multiplier.
^n^nTears turn yellow and are fired from Isaac's lower body rather than his head.

item.name: The Ladder
item.bot_description: Places a ladder across one-square gaps, allowing Isaac to walk over.^n^nEnemies cannot walk over the ladder.

item.name: Eye Drops
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> +40% fire rate to tears fired from the left eye.
^n^nCauses Isaac's tears to be fired at a staggered rate.
^n^nThe first shot after not firing for a while will always be a double shot.

item.name: Act of Contrition
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770> +1 Eternal Heart.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> +0.7 tears.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_angeldevil:1263940944848228474> +40% chance for a deal if Isaac has taken Red Heart damage. Additional +15% is added if the damage was taken against the boss.
^n^nAllows Angel Rooms to spawn even if a Devil Deal is/was taken.

item.name: Member Card
item.unlock_method: Spend over 40!c! in a single shop.
item.bot_description:
Each shop will contain a trapdoor that leads to a special underground shop that sells 2-5 of the following:
^n• Trinket (15¢).
^n• Item (15-30¢). Items are chosen from the following item pools: Secret Room, Shop, Devil Room, Angel Room and Boss. Devil/Angel items can cost up to 50¢ while Secret Room items can go up to 99¢.
^n• Card/Rune/Soul Stone (6-8¢).
^n• Black Heart/Bone Heart (8¢).
^n• Eternal Heart (15¢).
^n• Rotten Heart (5¢).
^n^nThe trapdoor will spawn even if Greed or Super Greed was fought in the shop.

item.name: Battery Pack
item.bot_description:
Spawns 2-4 random batteries.
^n^nFully charges Isaac's active item.

item.name: Mom's Bracelet
item.bot_description:
Picks up the obstacle in front of Isaac, allowing him to carry it around the room, or even different rooms.
^n^nPressing a fire button will launch the obstacle in the chosen direction. It will deal 40 damage to the enemy it hits, and break on impact. If it had any content inside it (e.g. a Tinted Rock), it will drop the contents normally.
^n^nAlternatively, the active item button can be pressed again to drop the object where Isaac is standing, without wasting the item's charge.
^n^nCan be used on Hosts to steal their skulls.
^n^nCan be used to pick up bombs, including Troll Bombs.
^n^nCan be used on friendly Dip familiars.
^n^nWhile carrying an obstacle, Isaac cannot travel to the next floor.
^n^nThrowing a Giant Poop at enemies will deal 320 damage.

item.name: The Scooper
item.keywords: ice cream icecream peep eye peeper
item.bot_description:
Summons The Peeper for the current room which also leaves a trail of red creep.
^n^nThe Peeper deals 12 damage per tick (45 per second), while the creep deals 2 damage per tick (20 per second).
^n^nThe Peeper can block enemy shots.
^n^nWhen active, Isaac gains <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +35% damage to tears shot from his right eye.

item.name: Ocular Rift
item.bot_description:
Grants Isaac a 5% chance to fire a special tear that creates a rift where it lands, which damages nearby enemies and pulls in enemies, pickups and tears/enemy projectiles for 2 seconds.
^n^nRifts deal 50% of Isaac's damage per tick (3x Isaac's damage per second).
^n^nEnemy projectiles pulled in by rifts will damage other enemies.
^n^nThe size of the rift scales with Isaac's damage.
^n^nThe chance to fire a rift is only slightly affected by luck.

item.name: Boiled Baby
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that follows Isaac and fires bursts of tears in all directions at random intervals while in a room with enemies.
^n^nThe familiar shoots faster the closer it is to an enemy.
^n^nEach tear fired by the familiar does either 3.5 or 5.25 damage.

item.name: Freezer Baby
item.keywords: ice cold white blue cube uranus
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that follows Isaac and shoots icicles which have a chance to petrify enemies and freeze them on kill.
^n^nIcicles deal 3.5 damage and are fired 1.36 times per second.
^n^nFrozen enemies obey the same rules as ice statues created by Uranus.

item.name: Eternal D6
item.bot_description:
Rerolls every item pedestal in the current room into another item from the current room's item pool, but has a 25% chance to delete the pedestal instead.
^n^nOnce unlocked, the item can be acquired by killing Florian last when fighting Ultra Pride.
^n^nThe chance to reroll items is not affected by luck.

item.name: Bird Cage
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar on top of Isaac's head that jumps onto the nearest enemy's head once Isaac takes damage, creating a rock wave in a random direction. After this, it will chase enemies around the room, dealing 3 damage per tick (6.43 per second).
^n^nThe familiar deals 45 damage to the enemy it lands, and 10 damage per rock wave that hits enemies.
^n^nRock waves can destroy obstacles.
^n^nIf damage is taken in a room without enemies, the familiar will directly go to the flying phase.

item.name: Larynx
item.bot_description:
Isaac shouts, damaging and pushing away nearby enemies, and destroying obstacles and doors.
^n^nCan be used when the item is not fully charged, which affects the damage and range of the shout.
^n^nDamage of the shout is equal to 20 + 28 × ChargesUsed. Extra ticks of damage are dealt to enemies that are close enough: 2.5 + 3.5 × ChargesUsed.
^n^nThe item gains 1 charge when Isaac takes damage.

item.name: Lost Soul
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that follows closely behind Isaac and dies in one hit, respawning at the start of the next floor.
^n^nIf the familiar survives and is taken down to a new floor, it will rewards Isaac with one of the following:
^n• 3 Soul Hearts.
^n• 2 Eternal Hearts.
^n• 1 item from the Treasure Room or Angel Room item pool.

item.name: Blood Bombs
item.bot_description:
*On pickup:*^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_red:1263940190515232838> +1 full Red Heart container.
^n^nHeals 5 Red Heart containers.
^n^n*While held:*^nAllows Isaac to place down bombs even when he doesn't have any, in exchange for half a heart of self-damage (prioritizes red hearts).
^n^nCauses Isaac's bombs to leave a pool of red creep on the ground upon exploding, that deals 2 damage per tick (20 per second) and lasts for 15 seconds.

item.name: Lil Dumpy
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that follows behind Isaac. When Isaac is about to take damage, the familiar farts and pushes away nearby enemies and projectiles. Enemies that collide with obstacles/walls, or other enemies, will take damage.
^n^nThe fart will protect Isaac from the damage he's about to take, serving as a shield.
^n^nAfter farting, the familiar goes on cooldown until Isaac walks up to him, or enters a new room.
^n^nThe familiar cannot prevent damage from environmental hazards.

item.name: Bird's Eye
item.keywords: red pepper chilli chili flame fire
item.bot_description:
Grants Isaac a chance to shoot fires alongside his tears that block enemy shots and deal damage to enemies, similarly to Red Candle.
^n^nFires can block up to 4 shots and/or deal 4 ticks of damage before being destroyed. They last for 10 seconds otherwise.
^n^nFires deal 4x Isaac's damage at full durability, 3x after taking damage once, and 2x otherwise, for a maximum possible damage of 11x Isaac's damage per fire.
^n^nThe chance to shoot a fire scales with Isaac's luck, and equals to 1 / (12 - LuckStat). At base luck, the chance is 8.33%, going up to 50% with 10 luck.
^n^nFlames' size scales with Isaac's tear size.
^n^nCauses Isaac's farts to also spawn a fire.
^n^nFlames will turn certain enemies into stronger, fire-like variants.
^n^nFlames can be used to destroy Shopkeepers.

item.name: Lodestone
item.bot_description:
Grants Isaac a luck-based chance to fire tears that magnetize enemies, giving them properties similar to those of Strange Attractor.
^n^nEnemies, pickups, tears and enemy projectiles that are near magnetized enemies are pulled towards them.
^n^nPulled enemy projectiles deal damage to enemies.
^n^nThe chance to fire magnetizing tears scales with luck, using the formula 1 / (6 - LuckStat)). It starts at 16.67% with 0 luck, going up to 100% with 5 luck.

item.name: Rotten Tomato
item.bot_description:
Grants Isaac a luck-based chance to fire red tears that Mark enemies. Marked enemies move slower and are attacked by other enemies until killed, or the effect wears off.
^n^nThe chance to fire Mark tears scales with luck, using the formula 1 / (6 - LuckStat). It starts at 16.67% with 0 luck, going up to 100% with 5 luck.
^n^nWhile a Marked enemy is present in the room, other enemies ignore Isaac and attack that enemy instead.

item.name: Birthright
item.bot_description:
Grants a passive ability that is unique for each character. This ability usually enhances the character's special traits or helps mitigate some of their downsides.
^n^nTo check the effect given to each character, use the `/birthright` command.

item.name: Charm of the Vampire
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +0.3 damage.
^n^nRestores half a red heart for every 13 enemies killed.
^n^nRemoves Isaac's reflection in the water.

item.name: Red Stew
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +21.6 temporary damage up.
^nFully heals Isaac.
^n^nThe damage boost scales down to 0 over the course of 3 minutes.
^n^nIsaac can extend the duration of the effect by killing enemies.
^n^nThe effect disappears once the damage bonus goes down to 0.

item.name: Genesis
item.keywords: globe blue white orb angel reset restart earth
item.unlock_method: Defeat Ultra Greedier as {{i|Jacob and Esau}}.
item.bot_description:
Resets all of Isaac's stats and transformations, removes the floor's curses, and removes all of Isaac's items, except his starting ones and those with the quest tag, and teleports him to a special Bedroom.
^n^nThe Bedroom contains a Bed, 2 random Chests, 2 Grab Bags, a random trinket, and a beam of light that can be used to exit the room and go down to the next floor.
^n^nFor every item removed by Genesis, a set of 3 choice-pedestals will spawn in the room containing items from the same item pool as the removed item. Only one of these items can be taken. Each set appears one after the other.
^n^nIf used on a final floor of the game, the beam of light will be replaced with a Crawl Space that leads back to the starting room of the floor.
^n^nTrinkets that were absorbed will simply be removed from Isaac's inventory with no extra item pedestals granted for them.
^n^nPicking up an active item from the choice of items will not drop it on the ground, but instead replace it with the new item.
^n^nGenesis affects all players in the run.

item.name: Sharp Key
item.bot_description:
*On pickup:*^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_key:1263944873510305925> +5 Keys.
^n^n*On use:*^nIsaac holds a key above his head that can be launched by pressing a fire button, consuming a key from his inventory.
^n^nThe key acts as a piercing projectile and deals damage to enemies equal to 5 × DamageStat + 30.
^n^nThe key will open any locked doors (including Secret Rooms) and chests it hits, as well as open up Key Blocks, but will break upon impact with one, or by hitting an obstacle.
^n^nEnemies killed by the key have a chance to spawn the contents of a chest.
^n^nKeys inherit Isaac's tear effects.

item.name: Booster Pack
item.bot_description: Spawns 5 random cards that have a high chance to be playing cards.

item.name: Mega Mush
item.unlock_method: Earn all Hard Mode completion marks for all non-tainted characters.
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> ×4 damage multiplier.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_range:1263940180163821659> +2 range.
^n<:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> -1.9 tears.
^n^nTurns Isaac into a invincible giant for 30 seconds, persisting between rooms and floors.
^n^nIsaac is able to destroy obstacles and doors by walking into them, as well as metal blocks. Cannot destroy doors that require a pickup in order to open.
^n^nIsaac deals massive amounts of rapid contact damage to enemies equal to 1 damage per tick (2400 per second).
^n^nDifferent types of weapons (e.g. Brimstone or Mom's Knife) are overwritten while the effect is active. Isaac is only able to shoot regular tears.
^n^nPrevents Isaac from using donation mechanics such as Blood Donation Machines or Devil Beggars, since they will get destroyed on contact.

item.name: Knife Piece 1
item.bot_description:
Can be acquired from the Treasure Room in the Mirrored World in Downpour/Dross II.
^n^nSpawns a knife handle familiar that follows Isaac.
^n^nMakes a special room generate in the Mines/Ashpit II that contains Knife Piece 2, the second piece of the knife.
^n^nWhen combined with the other piece, it forms a knife familiar that launches itself in the direction Isaac is shooting, dealing 25 damage to and piercing enemies it hits.
^n^n<:stat_exclamation:1263940092494483568> Can be launched at the red door at the end of Mausoleum/Gehenna to open the door leading to the Mother path, destroying the knife in the process.

item.name: Knife Piece 2
item.bot_description:
Can be acquired from the Mother chase scene in Mines/Ashpit II.
^n^nSpawns a knife blade familiar that follows Isaac.
^n^nWhen combined with the other piece, it forms a knife familiar that launches itself in the direction Isaac is shooting, dealing 25 damage to and piercing enemies it hits.
^n^n<:stat_exclamation:1263940092494483568> Can be launched at the red door at the end of Mausoleum/Gehenna to open the door leading to the Mother path, destroying the knife in the process.

item.name: Death Certificate
item.unlock_method: Earn all Hard Mode completion marks for all characters, including tainted ones.
item.bot_description:
Teleports Isaac to an abandoned and expanded version of the Home floor which contains a copy of every unlocked item in the game spread across different rooms.
^n^nAfter taking an item, Isaac returns to the room he used Death Certificate in.
^n^nThe area often contains pickups and chests. Picking them up or acquiring items from the chests will not cause Isaac to leave the area.
^n^nCurse of the Blind! has no effect in the area.
^n^nItems in the area show up in the order from the lowest ID to the highest.
^n^nModded items will also show up, expanding the area further.
^n^nItems that have the hidden tag and Dad's Note will not show up. Death Certificate itself cannot show up either.

item.name: Bot Fly
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that orbits Isaac, deals contact damage and fires shielded tears that destroy enemy projectiles.
^n^nThe shielded tears home in on projectiles, but not enemies. They deal 3 damage if they hit an enemy.
^n^nThe familiar deals 1 contact damage per tick (3.75 per second).
^n^nThe familiar will instantly kill specific fly enemies upon contact.

item.name: The Battery
item.bot_description:
Allows active items to store an additional full level of charge.
^n^nExtra charges appear as yellow bars on top of the normal charge meter.

item.name: Meat Cleaver
item.bot_description:
Splits each enemy into two smaller versions that have ~40% health each.
^n^nNormal enemies can be split up to 2 times, while champions and bosses up to 3 times. Attempting to split over the maximum allowed amount deals 25 damage to enemies instead.
^n^nSome enemies, such as Mr. Maw that has a cable holding the two parts, will be detached instead.
^n^nCannot split invincible enemies, including Hosts while lowered.
^n^nFinal bosses cannot be split.
^n^nDelirium has no limit on how many times it can split.
^n^nSome bosses have special behavior when split:
^n• Gemini will separate both of its pieces.
^n• Loki turns into Lokii.
^n• Chub / C.H.A.D. / Carrion Queen will instantly die.
^n• Gabriel / Uriel will make each copy spawn a Key Piece.
^n• Horny Boys will turn into Loki and Hornfel.

item.name: Evil Charm
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_luck:1263940158839849010> +2 luck.
^n^nMakes Isaac immune to status effects, such as burning, confusion, fear, gas clouds, and Dogma's Godhead projectiles.
^n^nGrants immunity to contact damage to fire places, poison from destroying mushrooms, and any enemy flame attacks.
^n^nAllows Isaac to walk over cobwebs on the ground without them affecting his speed.
^n^nAllows Isaac to stand in damaging creep for 1 second before receiving any damage.

item.name: Dogma
item.keywords: blue cross static beast fly flight protec shield
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +2 damage.
^n<:stat_speed:1263940240675045417> Prevents speed from going under 1.1.
^n^nIf Isaac has less than 6 hearts, gives enough hearts to get to 6 full hearts, first by restoring empty red heart containers, and then by granting soul hearts.
^n^nGrants a one-time-use Holy Mantle shield that wears off upon leaving the room.
^n^nGrants flight.
^n^nGrants The Wafer effect if playing on Normal Mode.
^n^n<:stat_exclamation:1263940092494483568> Automatically given to Isaac upon entering The Beast fight.

item.name: Purgatory
item.bot_description:
Makes a red crack spawn on a random position in the room while inside a room with enemies. Walking over the crack summons a ghost that homes in on the nearest enemy and explodes.
^n^nA new crack will appear once a ghost is summoned.
^n^nThe ghost explosion deals 2x Isaac's damage per tick, up to 4 times, and damages nearby enemies. It also destroys enemy projectiles.
^n^nThe explosion cannot hurt Isaac or damage the environment.

item.name: Stitches
item.bot_description:
*On pickup:*^nSpawns a familiar that can be controlled with the firing buttons, that deals 1.5 damage per tick (3 per second).
^n^n*On use:*^nCauses Isaac to swap places with the familiar, making him briefly invincible whilst teleporting.
^n^nTeleporting onto an enemy deals 3 × DamageStat + 40 damage to the enemy.
^n^nTeleporting onto a fire place will put it out, including fire places that require an explosion in order to destroy them.
^n^nThe brief immunity can be used to enter Curse Rooms and open Spiked Chests for free.

item.name: R Key
item.bot_description:
Restarts the run by returning Isaac to the beginning of Chapter 1, but without removing any items, pickups or consumables he has.
^n^nAngel Rooms become available again if a Devil Deal was previously taken.
^n^nThe Donation Machine becomes unjammed if it was previously used or blown up.
^n^nItem and pill pools are not reset.
^n^nThe in-game timer is not reset, meaning Boss Rush and Blue Womb requirements will not be reset either.

item.name: Knockout Drops
item.bot_description:
Grants a luck-based chance to shoot red fist-shaped tears that deal huge knockback to enemies and confuse them for 2 seconds.
^n^nEnemies take 8 + 2 × CurrentFloor damage if they are knocked into a wall or an obstacle, or when hit by another knocked back enemy.
^n^nThe chance to fire first tears scales with luck, starting at 10% with 0 luck, going up to 100% with 9 luck.

item.name: Eraser
item.bot_description:
Makes Isaac hold the Eraser above his head that can be thrown with a shooting button in the desired direction.
^n^nUpon hitting an enemy, the type of enemy will be permanently erased and will no longer appear for the rest of the run. This is indicated by a pink puff appearing when such an enemy attempts to spawn.
^n^nIf a boss is hit, it will instead deal 15 damage to him. If this damage is enough to kill it, the boss will be erased for the rest of the run.
^n^nCannot be recharged normally. Only recharges automatically upon entering a new floor.

item.name: Yuck Heart
item.bot_description: <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770> +1 Rotten Heart.

item.name: Steam Sale
item.bot_description:
Cuts in half the price of all items that can be purchased with money.
^n^nItems that cost 15¢ are reduced to 7¢, while pickups that cost 5¢ are reduced to 3¢.
^n^nPicking up multiple copies of Steam Sale will further reduce the price, with each copy lowering prices less. The following formula is applied: price / (SteamSaleCopies + 1).^n^n<:stat_exclamation:1263940092494483568> Prevents shops from having natural discounts on top of the Steam Sale discount.^n^nCan be dropped as a rare drop from shopkeepers, as well as from the Greed mini-boss, and from the Super Greed mini-boss before unlocking A Quarter.

item.name: Urn of Souls
item.bot_description:
Makes Isaac pull out (or put away) the Urn that, while out, can be fired by holding the shooting buttons in any direction.
^n^nThe Urn shoots a constant stream of blue flames that deal 22.5-31.5 damage per second, depending on how far the flames have travelled, plus an additional 4.5 × CurrentFloor damage.
^n^nIsaac is pushed backwards while shooting the Urn.
^n^nThe flames can destroy enemy projectiles and other fires, but will bounce off of rocks.
^n^nThe Urn can only be recharged by picking up enemy souls that spawn when killing enemies. Up to 20 souls can be stored at once.
^n^nBosses' souls grant a larger boost.
^n^nEach soul charge can shoot up to 15 flames over the course of half a second.

item.name: Akeldama
item.bot_description:
Creates a trail of tears while in a room with enemies that Isaac drags behind him.
^n^nEach tear in the trail deals 3.5 damage.
^n^nThe shorter the trail is, the faster it grows. The trail consists of 20 tears at its maximum length.
^n^nClearing the room will stop the trail for regenerating.
^n^nAnother trail of tears may appear if the trail is cut in the middle.

item.name: Magic Skin
item.bot_description:
*On use:*^n<:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488> -1 Heart Container, Bone Heart or 2 Soul Hearts (chosen by priority as shown).
^n<:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488> +1 Broken Heart which can never be filled, permanently reducing Isaac's maximum possible health.
^n^nSpawns an item from the current room's item pool.
^n^nDisappears after being used 12 times (or 18 times if playing as Magdalene with Birthright).
^n^nThe Lost and Tainted Lost can only use the item once before it disappears.
^n^n*While held:*^nAfter using Magic Skin, if Isaac drops the item, any item that spawns in the future will have a chance to be replaced by Magic Skin.
^n^nThe chance for this to happen is 33% after the first use, 50% after 2 uses, and 100% after 3 uses. This chance is drastically reduced if Magic Skin is on a pedestal somewhere on the current floor.

item.name: Revelation
item.keywords: holy angelic laser beam fly flight
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_soul:1263940226758479953> +2 Soul Hearts.
^n^nGrants flight.
^n^nWhilst shooting, Isaac charges a special attack indicated by a charge bar that takes 2.35 seconds to fully charge. Releasing the fire button will shoot out a holy beam of light that deals Isaac's damage per tick up to 15 times.
^n^nThe laser inherits some tear effects, such as homing.

item.name: Consolation Prize
item.bot_description:
Gives Isaac one of the following stat boosts based on which of his stats is the lowest:
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +1 flat damage.
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> +0.5 fire rate.
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_speed:1263940240675045417> +0.2 speed.
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_range:1263940180163821659> +2.5 range.
^n^nAlso drops either 3 coins, 1 bomb, or 1 key, depending on what Isaac has the least of. For the purposes of this calculation, each key or bomb is equivalent to 3 coins.
^n^nIf Isaac has the same amount of 2 lowest stats, one of them is selected randomly.
^n^nHaving temporary stat boosts, such as those given by cards, will affect the payout given by the item.
^n^nA Soul Heart may be dropped as Bethany, or 2 Hearts as Tainted Bethany.
^n^nPoop Nuggets may be dropped as Tainted ???. The game will check for his regular bomb count when doing this which which is always 0.

item.name: Tinytoma
item.bot_description:
Spawns a large familiar that slowly orbits around Isaac, and repels enemies that touch it, dealing 3.5 damage per tick (3.5 per second).
^n^nAfter blocking 3 shots and/or dealing 3 ticks of contact damage, the familiar splits into 2 smaller ones that orbit opposite of each other. They can only take 2 hits before being destroyed, and burst into 3 Blue Spiders in the process.
^n^nAfter both orbitals are destroyed, the familiar regenerates in its full size after 5 seconds.

item.name: Brimstone Bombs
item.unlock_method: Break Hornfel's minecart and kill him before he escapes.
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_bomb:1263944832515178559> +5 Bombs.
^n^nMakes Isaac's bombs fire 4 Brimstone lasers in the cardinal directions upon exploding.
^n^nEach laser deals 8 damage per tick (120 per second) and can hit enemies up to 19 times.

item.name: 4.5 Volt
item.description: Beat the juice out of them!
item.bot_description:
Prevents Isaac's active items from charging normally when clearing rooms.
^n^nInstead, active items are now charged when enemies take damage from any source.
^n^nCharges are gained at a rate of 40 + 20 × CurrentStage. For example, in Basement I it takes 60 damage to gain 1 charge, while in Home it takes 300 damage.
^n^nIf an enemy receives more damage than their maximum amount of health, the excess amount will not be counted towards the recharge formula.

item.name: Fruity Plum
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that mimics Baby Plum's attack of shooting tears and propelling itself diagonally around the room.
^n^nThe familiar deals 2 damage per tick (8.57 per second). It fires 15 tears per second while moving which deal 3 damage each.
^n^nThe familiar will prioritize moving towards nearby enemies.
^n^nIf there are no enemies in the room, the familiar will loosely orbit Isaac.

item.name: Anarchist Cookbook
item.bot_description: Spawns 6 Troll Bombs near the center of the room.^n^nBombs are affected by bomb modifiers.^n^nCan drop from the Pride mini-boss.

item.name: Plum Flute
item.unlock_method: Spare Baby Plum's life by waiting enough time instead of defeating her.
item.bot_description:
Summons a friendly version of Baby Plum that fights for Isaac in the current room for 10 seconds.
^n^nThe familiar will always twirl, jump, then spit blood and bounce around the room before flying away.
^n^nThe familiar deals 12 contact damage per tick (36 per second), 5 when jumping in place, 3.5 per shot, 3-4 per shot while bouncing diagonally, and 2 damage per tick with creep (20 per second).
^n^nCan be obtained by using its unlock method.

item.name: Star of Bethlehem
item.keywords: white glowing ball angel bethelem betlehem betlem bethem
item.bot_description:
Spawns a glowing star that slowly travels towards the Boss Room using the shortest possible route.
^n^nThe star is surrounded with a glowing aura that gives Isaac the following when standing inside it:
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> ×1.8 damage multiplier.
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> ×2.5 fire rate multiplier.
^n• Homing tears.
^n• 50% chance to block damage.
^n^nOnce the star reaches the Boss Room, it will center itself in the room for the rest of the floor.
^n^nThe speed of the star changes based on whether Isaac is in front or behind it in correlation to the Boss Room. It will speed up if it's lacking behind, or slow down if Isaac is behind.
^n^nThe star may travel through Secret Rooms and Curse Rooms on its path to the Boss Room. It may also travel through Red Rooms if they create an optimal path to the Boss Room.
^n^nWith Curse of the Labyrinth! active, the star will travel to the second Boss Room.
^n^nIn the Void, the star will travel to Delirium's Boss Room.
^n^nIn <:stat_greed:1263944856376443104> Greed Mode, the star will always center itself in the starting room, except on the final floor, where it will move to the Ultra Greed fight.
^n^nThe star won't appear in The Beast fight.
^n^nIf the Mega Satan door is opened, the star will travel to that fight instead.

item.name: Cube Baby
item.bot_description:
Spawns a frozen ice cube familiar that cannot move on its own, and requires Isaac to kick it, causing it to slide around the room and deal contact damage to enemies.
^n^nThe cube can be kicked by walking into it, melee attacked, or be shot at. It can also be picked up by using Mom's Bracelet.
^n^nThe familiar deals up to 11 contact damage based on how fast it's traveling, 4.29 times per second.
^n^nThe familiar will slow enemies it touches while moving.
^n^nEnemies killed by the familiar are frozen, and obey the same rules as ice statues created by Uranus.
^n^nThe familiar blocks enemy projectiles.

item.name: Vade Retro
item.bot_description:
*While held:*^nEnemies leave behind small, red ghosts upon death.
^n^n*On use:*^nCauses all red ghosts to explode, dealing damage to nearby enemies and destroying projectiles.
^n^nThe explosion cannot hurt Isaac or damage the environment.
^n^nThe explosion deals damage equal to 3 + 0.04 × EnemyMaxHealth + (CurrentFloor - 1) × 0.5. Each explosion can hit the same enemy up to 4 times.
^n^nThe blast radius scales with how powerful the explosion is.
^n^nInstantly kills any enemy that has the "ghost" tag and is at 50% or less HP, including bosses. This can even be used to kill Delirium if it transforms into such an enemy. Enemies that are currently not visible on screen are not detonated.
^n^nDetonates Isaac's ghost after his death, dealing 200 damage to nearby enemies.
^n^nGhosts can be slightly pushed around by shooting at them.

item.name: False PHD
item.bot_description:
*On pickup:*^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_black:1263940054078849086> +1 Black Heart.
^n^n*While held:*^nIdentifies all pills.
^n^nConverts all pills into their bad counterparts, but gives them positive secondary effects. Neutral pills don't gain a secondary effect.
^n^nStat down pills will also grant <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +0.6 damage, or +1.2 if it was a horse pill.
^n^nOther bad pills will drop a Black Heart.
^n^nThe item's effects work retroactively, giving stat boosts for each stat down pill taken before picking up the item.
^n^nWhen combined with PHD or other items that convert pills, the effects neutralize themselves allowing both types of pills to exist again.

item.name: Spin to Win
item.bot_description:
*While held:*^nSpawns a spinning wheel familiar that orbits Isaac, blocks enemy shots and deals 3.5 damage per tick (26.25 per second).
^n^n*On use:*^nHolding the active item button makes the wheel spin rapidly around Isaac, giving him <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_speed:1263940240675045417> +0.5 speed, and increasing the contact damage of all of Isaac's familiars, even if they normally don't do any.
^n^nOrbital familiars also spin much faster and knock back both enemies and Isaac while dealing damage.
^n^nThe contact damage is boosted to 1.5 × ContactDamage + 6. If a familiar does not do contact damage normally, it still received the +6.
^n^nThis means that Spin to Win deals 11.25 damage per tick (84.38 per second) while spinning.
^n^nAlso affects Blue Flies and Blue Spiders, and they don't die while the item is in use.
^n^nThe recharge time is gradually drained over 3 seconds while the item is being used. It can be used even when the charge bar is not full.
^n^nIsaac's effective speed can exceed the 2.0 limit, even if the HUD doesn't show it.

item.name: Vasculitis
item.bot_description:
Makes enemies release 1-16 friendly tears in random directions upon death. Tears appear as large red blood clots which may make them hard to distinguish from enemy projectiles. They also inherit Isaac's tear effects thus may appear in a different color.
^n^nThe amount of tears released is based on the enemy's max health points.
^n^nBurst tears deal a set amount of damage: 3.2 + 0.3 × CurrentStage.
^n^nIf an enemy is killed while affected by a status effect, the burst tears will inherit that status effect.

item.name: Giant Cell
item.bot_description:
Taking damage summons a miniature Isaac familiar known as Minisaac, that chases enemies and fires tears on its own.
^n^nMinisaacs' tear damage is based on the formula: 1.20 + 0.15 × CurrentFloor.
^n^nThe familiar shoots 3 times per second.
^n^nMinisaacs persist between rooms and floors.
^n^nEach Minisaac starts with 15 health points that are constantly drained with a rate of 0.4 per second, until it reaches 0.8 HP.
^n^nWhenever Isaac takes damage, all Minisaacs are healed back to their full health.
^n^nMinisaacs take damage from enemy projectiles and contact damage. They can also be damaged by Isaac's bombs.
^n^nMinisaacs are immune to spikes and lasers.
^n^nNo more than 16 Minisaacs can exist at a time.
^n^nWhen playing as The Forgotten, a special Minisaac variant will spawn that inherits the bone club attack. This familiar deals 8.1 + 0.9 × CurrentFloor damage, and swings its bone club 1.5 times per second.
^n^nMinisaacs receive wings if Isaac has any form of flight.

item.name: The Hourglass
item.bot_description: Slows down all enemies in the room for 8 seconds.

item.name: Card Reading
item.tags: summonable offensive nocantrip stars lazarussharedglobal nogreed
item.bot_description:
Creates 2 portals at the beginning of each floor. They can spawn at random with different colors, each taking Isaac to a different room:
^n• b Boss Room.
^n• b Treasure Room.
^n• b Secret Room.
^n• b Shop.
^n^nThe portals disappear once the starting room is left.
^n^nFrom Chapter 4 onward, only 1 portal will spawn.
