item.name: Quints
item.bot_description:
Spawns a stationary familiar in the place of killed enemies, up to 5 per room. Familiars appear colorless.
^n^nThe following familiars can be spawned:
^n• Abel
^n• Boiled Baby
^n• Brother Bobby
^n• Demon Baby
^n• Freezer Baby
^n• Ghost Baby
^n• Guardian Angel
^n• Harlequin Baby
^n• Lil Brimstone
^n• Little Steven
^n• Multidimensional Baby
^n• Robo-Baby
^n• Rotten Baby
^n• Seraphim
^n• Sister Maggy
^n^nThe same type of familiar can spawn multiple times per room.

item.name: Tooth and Nail
item.bot_description:
Causes Isaac to turn to stone and sprout spikes every 6 seconds. Isaac is immune to damage while in this state, and deals 40 damage per tick (80 per second). The effect lasts for 1 second.
^n^nIsaac will flash white 4 times before turning into stone on the 4th flash. These flashes are accompanied with a ticking sound.
^n^nCan be used to enter Curse Rooms and open Spiked Chests for free, but cannot be used to play Blood Donation Machines and Devil Beggars for free.

item.name: Binge Eater
item.bot_description:
*On pickup:*^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_red:1263940190515232838> +1 full Red Heart container.
^n^nFully heals Isaac.
^n^n*While held:*^nCauses item pedestals to have an additional food item which cycles alongside the original item.
^n^nPicking up the food item grants Isaac with the following: ^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +3.6 damage which fades over 30 seconds. This boost cannot be stacked and will be reset to 3.6 by picking up additional food items.
^n• <:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488><:stat_speed:1263940240675045417> 0.03 speed.
^n• A permanent boost to 2 stats depending on the food item consumed.
^n• +1 additional red heart heal.
^n^nStat boosts are different based on the item consumed:
^n• Breakfast: <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_shotspeed:1263940211591876651> +0.2 shot speed, <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_range:1263940180163821659> +2.5 range.
^n• Dessert: <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +1 flat damage, <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_shotspeed:1263940211591876651> +0.2 shot speed.
^n• Dinner: <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> +0.5 tears, <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_shotspeed:1263940211591876651> +0.2 shot speed.
^n• Lunch: <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> +0.5 tears, <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_range:1263940180163821659> +2.5 range.
^n• Midnight Snack: <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +1 flat damage, <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_luck:1263940158839849010> +1 luck.
^n• Rotten Meat: <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +1 flat damage, <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_range:1263940180163821659> +2.5 range.
^n• A Snack: <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_shotspeed:1263940211591876651> +0.2 shot speed, <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_luck:1263940158839849010> +1 luck.
^n• Supper: <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> +0.5 tears, <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_luck:1263940158839849010> +1 luck.
^n^nStat boosts also work retroactively, meaning that picking up Binge Eater will grant all relevant stat boosts from food items previously collected, excluding the additional healing provided by them.
^n^nCertain item pedestals that are required to progress the game won't gain the additional food item.

item.name: Guppy's Eye
item.bot_description:
Shows the contents of Chests, Fire Places, Grab Bags and Shopkeepers before they're opened/destroyed.
^n^nUp to 4 contents can be displayed at a time, with higher-quality pickups like Bombs, Keys and Soul Hearts having priority on the display.

item.name: Strawman
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_bomb:1263944832515178559> +1 Bomb.
^n^nSpawns Keeper as an extra controllable character alongside Isaac. The familiar will receive the same inputs as Isaac, but can be separated by holding down the "drop" button.
^n^nThe Keeper will have his base stats, except speed which is shared between both characters. He won't receive any of his starting items.
^n^nThe Keeper is able to pick up items on his own, thus having a separate inventory. He is not able, however, to pick up active items, trinkets, or consumables.
^n^nThe Keeper's health is displayed over his head, and he can heal normally by picking up coins. Curse of the Unknown will hide his health bar.
^n^nDevil Room items will cost money instead of health while The Keeper is alive.
^n^nPlacing a bomb will also make The Keeper place a bomb free of charge.
^n^nThe Keeper is not able to walk through doors on his own, but he can enter the beams of light and the ending chest.
^n^nUnlocks for The Keeper cannot be earned by using this item.
^n^nWhen The Keeper dies, he spawns 5 Blue Spiders and the item is removed from Isaac's inventory. None of the items collected by The Keeper are dropped.

item.name: Dad's Note
item.bot_description:
Initiates the Ascent sequence, teleporting Isaac to the backward floors, ultimately leading to the Home floor and The Beast fight.
^n^nThe item cannot be rerolled or destroyed.
^n^n<:stat_exclamation:1263940092494483568> Can be acquired by entering the Strange Door that appears in the beginning of Depths II by using The Polaroid or The Negative on it. This will take Isaac to the Mausoleum/Gehenna, where the Boss Room will contain the item.
^n^nHas no effect if obtained outside the special Boss Room, except for the music slowly fading out.

item.name: Sister Maggy
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that follows Isaac around and shoots red tears that deal 6 damage.
^n^nThe familiar shoots 1.36 times per second.

item.name: Options?
item.bot_description:
Makes 2 room clear rewards spawn instead of 1, but only one of them can be taken, while the other one disappears.
^n^nIf one of the rewards is a Troll Bomb, picking up the other reward will not make the Troll Bomb disappear.

item.name: Candy Heart
item.bot_description:
*On pickup:*^nSpawns a Heart.
^n^n*While held:*^nGives Isaac one of the following stat boost per half heart healed by picking up Red Hearts or Rotten Hearts:
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_speed:1263940240675045417> +0.02 speed.
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> +0.05 tears.
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +0.10 flat damage.
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_range:1263940180163821659> +0.25 range.
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_shotspeed:1263940211591876651> +0.02 shot speed.
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_luck:1263940158839849010> +0.10 luck.
^n^nItems that heal Isaac won't grant any boosts. Only hearts picked up off the ground count.
^n^nDoes not work when adding to Tainted Bethany's blood charges.

item.name: A Pound of Flesh
item.bot_description:
Items that require health to purchase now require money instead, and vice-versa.
^n^nConsumables in Shops no longer have a cost, but are instead surrounded by spikes that deal a full heart of damage. The pickups inside the spikes cannot be pushed by an explosion.
^n^nBuying Shop items for health does not prevent Angel Rooms from appearing.
^n^nImmunity from spikes does not prevent damage from the special spikes inside Shops. Invincibility frames or invulnerability from certain items will disallow Isaac from taking the pickups.

item.name: Redemption
item.bot_description:
Makes a white inverted cross appear over Isaac's head upon entering a Devil Room. If Isaac goes to the next floor with the cross active, he will gain <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_soul:1263940226758479953> +1 Soul Heart and <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +1 damage.
^n^nTaking anything generated by the Devil Room will result in the icon going away. This includes both items, chests and pickups.
^n^nIt is safe to pick up stuff that have been spawned after room generation, e.g. enemy drops or room clear rewards.
^n^nIf a Red Chest generates an item, the item can be taken without the cross disappearing.
^n^nThe item can be acquired from a Confessional or a Sacrifice Room after a devil deal has been taken.

item.name: Spirit Shackles
item.bot_description:
Upon death, Isaac turns into a ghost linked to Isaac's dead body, and can continue fighting with 1/2 of a heart for 10 seconds, after which he comes back to life.
^n^nIsaac gains flight while in ghost form.
^n^nThe effect cannot occur again until a half or full Soul Heart or Black Heart is picked up. Doing so will charge the item without adding to Isaac's health.
^n^nThe Shackles appear blue when ready to be used, and grey when they aren't.

item.name: Cracked Orb
item.bot_description:
Taking damage activates the following effects:
^n• Unlocks all locked doors in the room. It can even unlock the Mega Satan door and the Strange Door in Depths II.
^n• Opens the Secret Room and Super Secret Room if adjacent to the current room.
^n• Reveals a random unmapped room on the floor. It can also reveal the Ultra Secret Room.
^n• Destroys all Tinted Rocks and rocks with a Crawl Space.
^n^nCannot open Challenge Rooms from the outside, and regular rooms in the Chest or Dark Room.
^n^nCannot open the door leading to Boss Rush or Blue Womb.

item.name: Empty Heart
item.bot_description:
Adds an empty heart container at the beginning of each floor if Isaac has one red heart or less.
^n^nDoes nothing with characters that cannot have red hearts.

item.name: Astral Projection
item.bot_description:
Taking damage for the first time in an uncleared room will stop time for 2 seconds, and turn Isaac into a ghost, leaving his body behind.
^n^nWhile in ghost form, Isaac gains flight, spectral tears, increased speed, and can shoot at a very fast rate, despite this not being shown on the HUD, as it's a result of time being slowed down.
^n^nIsaac will re-enter the body when the room is cleared, or if he takes damage, which will negate the damage.

item.name: C Section
item.bot_description:
Replaces Isaac's tears with a short-delay charge attack that fires homing, piercing, spectral fetus-like tears. The charge attack fires on its own after fully charged.
^n^nFetus tears do 75% of Isaac's damage, 3.75 times per second, until they run out of range.
^n^nCharge time depends on Isaac's <:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> fire rate: 30 / (RoundUp(TearDelay × 3) + 1). This cannot exceed 15.
^n^nThe size of the fetuses scales with Isaac's damage.
^n^nFetuses inherit Isaac's tear effects, and some special weapon effects, such as Mom's Knife or The Forgotten's bone club.

item.name: Lil Abaddon
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that follows Isaac and creates a black ring after charging for 1 second.
^n^nThe ring deals 3.5 damage per tick (52.5 per second), and lasts for 1 second.

item.name: Technology
item.bot_description: Replaces Isaac's tears with a laser beam that has unlimited range and pierces through enemies.^n^nThe laser is fired from Isaac's left eye.

item.name: Montezuma's Revenge
item.bot_description:
Continuously shooting for 2.35 seconds allows Isaac to fire a short-range brown Brimstone laser and corn shots behind him.
^n^nThe laser deals Isaac's damage per tick, 15 times per second, and lasts for ~1.28 seconds.
^n^nCorn shots deal 6 damage, and a random amount of them are created with each blast.

item.name: Lil Portal
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that follows Isaac and can be launched by double-tapping a shooting key.
^n^nThe familiar will consume pickups and trinkets in its path, converting them into Blue Flies while increasing its size.
^n^nUpon consuming 1 + 1 × CurrentFloor pickups, it will spawn a purple portal that leads to a special room. The contents of this room remain unchanged for the duration of the run, and it may be accessed from any floor by creating the portal again.
^n^nThe portal remains in the same place it was initially created, even after Isaac leaves the room. Its location will be marked on the map.
^n^nAfter creating a portal, the familiar disappears until the next floor, where another portal can be created that leads back to the same room.
^n^nDamage dealt by the familiar is equal to 2 + 2 × ConsumablesDestroyed + 2 per tick, ticking up to 10 times per second. This damage cannot exceed 6.
^n^nThe familiar does not deal damage or consume pickups while following behind Isaac. It must be launched in order to do so.
^n^nAny trapdoors created in the portal room will lead to the I AM ERROR room.

item.name: Worm Friend
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that burrows out of the ground and grabs enemies every 5 seconds, holding them in place for 5 seconds.
^n^nGrabbed enemies take 4 damage per tick (8 per second).
^n^nAlso applies slowness on grabbed enemies, which affects their shots as well.

item.name: Bone Spurs
item.bot_description:
Enemies spawn 1-2 floating bones upon death, which block enemy shots and damage/repel enemies that touch them.
^n^nBones can block up to 2 shots and/or deal 2 ticks of damage before breaking.
^n^nBones deal damage equal to Isaac's damage in the moment they were created.

item.name: Hungry Soul
item.bot_description:
Grants enemies a 33% chance to spawn a friendly red ghost upon death, which chases down enemies and deals contact damage to them.
^n^nGhosts deal damage equal to 50% of Isaac's damage (2x Isaac's damage per second).
^n^nThe ghost explodes after 7 seconds, dealing 7 damage to nearby enemies up to 3-4 times. This explosion cannot damage Isaac or the environment.
^n^nEnemies killed by ghosts won't spawn additional ghosts, except for those killed by the ghost's explosion.

item.name: Jar of Wisps
item.bot_description:
Spawns a wisp that orbits Isaac, fires tears, blocks enemy shots, and deals contact damage to enemies, much like the ones spawned by Book of Virtues.
^n^nThe Jar will initially spawn 1 wisp, but the amount is increased each time the jar is used, up to a total of 12 wisps. The amount of wisps the jar will spawn is indicated by both a counter and the jar visually filling up with wisps.

item.name: Soul Locket
item.bot_description:
*On pickup:*^nSpawns a Soul Heart.
^n^n*While held:*^nGives Isaac one of the following stat boosts per half heart gained by picking up Soul Heart or Black Hearts off the ground:
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_speed:1263940240675045417> +0.04 speed.
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> +0.1 tears.
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +0.2 flat damage.
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_range:1263940180163821659> +0.5 range.
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_shotspeed:1263940211591876651> +0.04 shot speed.
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_luck:1263940158839849010> +0.20 luck.

item.name: Friend Finder
item.unlock_method: Defeat The Beast as {{i|Jacob and Esau}}.
item.bot_description:
Spawns a random friendly monster that mimics Isaac's movement and attacks.
^n^nCan spawn the following monsters:
^n• Black Bony.
^n• Blaster.
^n• Bony.
^n• Chubber.
^n• Clot.
^n• Clotty.
^n• Coal Boy.
^n• Danny.
^n• Dople.
^n• Double Vis.
^n• Drowned Hive.
^n• Evil Twin.
^n• Grilled Clotty.
^n• Gurgle.
^n• Hive.
^n• Holy Bony.
^n• Holy Mulligan.
^n• I.Blob.
^n• Maw.
^n• Nest.
^n• Vis.
^n^nCertain enemies will have a crosshair that indicates where they're shooting.
^n^nBlasters will only fire by pressing the active item button.

item.name: Inner Child
item.unlock_method: Defeat Ultra Greed as {{i|Jacob and Esau}}.
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770> +1 Extra Life.
^n^nUpon death, Isaac respawns in the current room with half a red heart (or half soul heart if he doesn't have any red heart containers), and receives:
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_speed:1263940240675045417> +0.2 speed.
^n<:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488><:stat_size:1263944884474347630> -50% size.
^n<:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488><:stat_size:1263944884474347630> -73% hitbox size.
^n^nRespawning as the inner child emits a blood explosion that deals 35 damage to nearby enemies.
^n^nAfter unlocking, the item is guaranteed to spawn in the hidden closet in the Home floor once the tainted version of the current character has been unlocked.

item.name: Glitched Crown
item.bot_description:
Causes newly generated item pedestals to indefinitely cycle between 5 random items from the current room's item pool, at a very quick rate of once every 0.2 seconds.
^n^nDoes not affect quest items.
^n^nAlso affects items during Curse of the Blind!, but none of the items can be seen.

item.name: Chocolate Milk
item.bot_description: Isaac can hold down the shoot button to fire a more powerful tear depending on the charge.^n^nDamage scales from 10% at minimum to 400% at full charge.^n^nA higher tear stat can increase the minimum damage but decrease the maximum.

item.name: Belly Jelly
item.bot_description:
Enemies and projectiles that touch Isaac have a 50% chance to bounce off of him and propel in the opposite direction. When this happens, damage to Isaac is negated.
^n^nBounced off enemies will take damage upon hitting a wall or an obstacle, or another enemy. The damage is equal to 8 + 2 × CurrentFloor.
^n^nOnly enemies that normally deal contact damage can be bounced off.
^n^nBounced off projectiles deal 6 damage if they would deal half a heart of damage, or 7 if they would deal a full heart.
^n^nLasers cannot be bounced off.
^n^nThe bouncing mechanic also works for Fire Places and spikes enemies such as Poky, Slide and Grudge, granting a chance to avoid unintentional damage.

item.name: Sacred Orb
item.bot_description:
Decreases the chances of low-quality items appearing by affecting newly created pedestals in the following way:
^n• Rerolls items with quality 0-1.
^n• Has a 33% chance to reroll items with quality 2.
^n^nItems with the quest tag cannot be rerolled.

item.name: Sanguine Bond
item.bot_description:
Spawns a special set of spikes in every Devil Room that deal a full heart of damage per use. Taking damage from the spikes has a chance to yield a reward:
^n• 35% - nothing.
^n• 33% - <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +0.5 damage.
^n• 15% - 6 pennies.
^n• 10% - 2 Black Hearts.
^n• 5% - random item from the Devil Room pool.
^n• 2% - Leviathan transformation.
^n^nThe spikes will deal damage to enemies that walk or fly over them.
^n^nCauses all other spikes in the Devil Room to retract.

item.name: The Swarm
item.bot_description:
*On pickup:*^nSpawns 8 orbital flies.
^n^n*While held:*^nEach time one of the flies blocks a projectile, it will turn into a Blue Fly.
^n^nAn additional orbital fly is spawned upon clearing a room, up to a maximum of 16 at a time.

item.name: Heartbreak
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488> +3 Broken Hearts.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +0.25 damage for every Broken Heart Isaac has.
^n^nCauses every fatal hit to add 2 more Broken Hearts instead of killing Isaac, and deal 40 damage to all enemies in the room.
^n^nThis effect won't prevent death from Devil Deals.

item.name: Bloody Gust
item.bot_description:
When Isaac takes damage, he gains stat boosts for the rest of the floor, up to a maximum of 6 times per floor:
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_speed:1263940240675045417> +0.04 × HitsTaken + 0.07 speed
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> +0.1 × HitsTaken + 0.25 fire rate

item.name: Salvation
item.keywords: white blue glowing fish ichtys halo thorns
item.bot_description:
Creates an angelic halo around Isaac that, when an enemy comes in contact with, a beam of light starts forming above them. If they stay in the halo for about a second, a beam of light will strike down on them, dealing damage to them and creating 4 more beams in the cardinal directions.
^n^nThe initial beam does 3.5 damage per tick, up to 15 times, and the others deal 1.75 per second, up to 15 times.
^n^nThe halo will grow in size each time Isaac takes damage, up to a maximum of 10 times. The size resets after leaving the floor.

item.name: Vanishing Twin
item.bot_description:
Spawns a fetus familiar that follows Isaac.
^n^nAfter entering a Boss Room, the familiar will move to the center of the room, and transform into a clone of the boss. Isaac must defeat both bosses in order to proceed.
^n^nWhen this happens, both the original boss and its copy will be set to 75% of their maximum health, and will gain slightly reduced movement and attack speed.
^n^nUpon dying, the clone will drop an item from the Boss item pool, even before the fight is over. The original boss will also grant another item.
^n^nThe cloning can happen only once per floor.
^n^nThe familiar cannot clone mini-bosses and final bosses such as Mom, Mom's Heart, Isaac, Satan, etc.
^n^nThe familiar can clone the boss even after it's been defeated.
^n^nOn floors with multiple boss rooms, the familiar will act only on the first boss encountered.
^n^nIf it clones Great Gideon, 2 extra waves of enemies are added to the battle.
^n^nThe item has no effect in <:stat_greed:1263944856376443104> Greed Mode.

item.name: Twisted Pair
item.bot_description:
Spawns 2 familiars that float by the left and right side of Isaac, and fire tears alongside him that copy his stats and tear effects.
^n^nEach familiar deals 37.5% of Isaac's damage. When playing as Lilith or Tainted Lilith, they instead deal 50% damage each.

item.name: Azazel's Rage
item.bot_description:
Upon clearing a room, Isaac builds up rage that is indicated by the patch of skin spreading around his face, as well as 4 sections of the horn lighting up red one at a time.
^n^nAfter clearing 4 rooms, Isaac's head will flash red. Upon entering room with enemies, a large Brimstone laser is fired for ~3.33 seconds, that deals Isaac's damage per tick, 15 times per second.

item.name: Echo Chamber
item.description: I can see see the future future future
item.bot_description:
When Isaac uses a consumable (card, pill, rune, soul stone, etc), he also uses a copy of the 3 previous consumables used after picking up Echo Chamber.
^n^nConsumables used with mimic items, such as Blank Card, Placebo or Clear Rune, won't get added to the queue.

item.name: Isaac's Tomb
item.keywords: black silver grey gray dark old chest
item.bot_description:
Makes an Old Chest appear at the start of each floor.
^n^nThe chest won't spawn on the Home floor.

item.name: Vengeful Spirit
item.bot_description:
Upon taking damage, spawns an invulnerable red wisp that fires spectral tears and deals contact damage, but does not block projectiles.
^n^nWisps are destroyed when leaving the floor. Up to 6 wisps can be created per floor.
^n^nWisps' tears are shot once per second, and deal damage equal to 2.9 + 0.1 × CurrentFloor.
^n^nContact damage is equal to 50% of Isaac's damage per tick, and is dealt 15 times per second.

item.name: Esau Jr.
item.bot_description:
Swaps between the current character and Esau Jr., a separate character that has 3 Black Hearts, <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +2 flat damage, and flight.
^n^nCoins, bombs, and keys are shared between the 2 characters, but a separate inventory exists for everything else (health, items, consumables, trinkets).
^n^nWhen used for the first time, Esau Jr. receives random items equal to the number of items the original characters has. Each item is chosen from the same item pool as the original item. Only passive items are given substitutes. Items with the quest tag and set drops (such as The Small Rock) are not counted and won't get a substitute item.
^n^nIf either character dies, they will both die.
^n^nEsau Jr. will receive any passive starting item the original character had, however, if said items are rerollable, they will count towards the number of items he should get, resulting in both the staring item and 1 extra to be obtained.
^n^n<:stat_exclamation:1263940092494483568> Using 5 different copies of Esau Jr. one after the other, starting from the 5th copy, Esau Jr.'s jar will break and create a familiar that behaves like Abel, and deals 7.5 damage per shot but at a faster fire rate.

item.name: Berserk!
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_speed:1263940240675045417> +0.4 speed.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +3 flat damage.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> +2 fire rate.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> ×0.5 fire rate multiplier.
^n^nReplaces Isaac's tears with a jaw bone similar to The Forgotten's club. It also uses the same synergies as the club.
^n^nThis effect lasts for 5 seconds.
^n^nThe jaw bone deals 3x Isaac's damage when swung, and 1.5x Isaac's damage when thrown.
^n^nSwinging the jaw bone will reflect enemy shots, and is able to pick up pickups from a distance.
^n^nKilling an enemy while in Berserk mode will increase the duration of the effect by 1 second, and grant very brief invincibility that prevents damage from exploding enemies. Duration cannot be increased by more than 5 seconds.
^n^nEach enemy killed will also grant <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_speed:1263940240675045417> +0.4 speed until the effect ends.
^n^nIsaac is unable to die while in Berserk mode. His health can go down to 0, but he will not die until the effect ends. During this time, he can heal himself and cheat death.
^n^nThe item starts at 50% charge when picked up. It is charged by dealing damage to enemies instead of clearing rooms or picking up batteries. To fully charge it, Isaac must deal damage equal to 120 + 40 × CurrentFloor.

item.name: Dark Arts
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_speed:1263940240675045417> +1 speed.
^n^nAllows Isaac to walk through enemies/bullets for 1 second, or until he shoots. Walking through them will freeze them until the effect ends, then deal damage to them equal to 2 × DamageStat + 3.5. If multiple enemies/projectiles get caught in the attack, each consecutive attack deals an additional 3.5 damage.
^n^nAt the end of the effect, an area of blast is created, dealing more damage the more enemies or projectiles were pierced during the effect.
^n^nWhen used as Black Judas or Tainted Judas, they will gain a temporary <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +1 damage bonus for every enemy/projectile walked through, that wears off at a rate of -0.25 every half a second.
^n^nDuring the effect, Isaac is unable to collect pickups or use machines/beggars.
^n^nThe effect can be used to walk freely through Curse Rooms and walk over spikes, or open Spiked Chests.
^n^nInvulnerable enemies will still grant bonuses even if they cannot be damaged.

item.name: Abyss
item.bot_description:
Consumes all item pedestals in the room and gives a unique red locust familiar for each item consumed.
^n^nThe locusts are permanent once created, and up to 64 can exists at a time. Consuming more items after this number will replace older locusts. This limit is shared with Blue Flies and Blue Spiders.
^n^nThe locusts loosely follow Isaac similarly to Blue Flies, and charge in the direction he's firing until they hit an enemy, wall, or obstacle.
^n^nLocusts deal various damage 4.29 times per second, based on the consumed item's quality, and have a different size multiplier:
^n• Quality 0: 0.5x Isaac's damage, 0.8x size.
^n• Quality 1: 0.75x Isaac's damage, 0.9x size.
^n• Quality 2: 1x Isaac's damage, 1x size.
^n• Quality 3: 1.5x Isaac's damage, 1.1x size.
^n• Quality 4: 2x Isaac's damage, 1.2x size.
^n^nSome items, when consumed, will produce a unique locust with different behavior. Check the respective item pages to see if Abyss would create such a locust.
^n^nIf at the limit of 64 locusts and multiple item pedestals are present in the room, Abyss will only consume half of the items.
^n^nItems can be consumed while the pick-up animation is playing, i.e. Isaac is holding the item above his head.
^n^nAbsorbing items counts as Isaac taking them, thus will activate Boss Rush, Challenge Rooms, and similar mechanics.
^n^nIf Abyss is used in a room with linked choice item pedestals, only one of them will be absorbed, while the others will vanish as if Isaac took them.

item.name: Supper
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_red:1263940190515232838> +1 full Red Heart container.
^n^nHeals 1 additional Red Heart.

item.name: Stapler
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +1 damage.
^n^nPrevents Isaac from firing tears from his left eye.

item.name: Suplex!
item.bot_description:
Causes Isaac to dash a short distance. If he runs into an enemy while dashing, he will pick them up and a crosshair spawns under him that can be controlled with the shooting buttons.
^n^nAfter 1 second, Isaac leaps up and slams down on the crosshair with the enemy, dealing damage to them and any enemies he lands on. This also creates a circular wave of rocks that damages nearby enemies and destroys projectiles.
^n^nIsaac is invulnerable while dashing and holding an enemy, except to damage from Blood Donation Machines and Devil Beggars.
^n^nThe damage of the slam is equal to 50 ± S, where S is the number of size ups/downs Isaac has.
^n^nEach spike in the rock wave deals 10 damage, and the range of the wave scales with Isaac's size.
^n^nIsaac can also Suplex bombs, bosses, shopkeepers, TNT, stone enemies, fire places, furniture in the Home level, etc.

item.name: Mini Mush
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_speed:1263940240675045417> +0.3 speed.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_range:1263940180163821659> +1.5 range.
^n^n<:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488><:stat_size:1263944884474347630> Reduces Isaac's size by 20%, and his hitbox by 36%.
^n^nCan very rarely drop when destroying mushrooms.

item.name: Bag of Crafting
item.bot_description:
Upon use, pressing an attack button will cause a swipe attack that deals 3 damage to enemies and knocks them back. The size of the swipe scales with Isaac's size, and is affected by his range.
^n^nThe swipe can be used to open chests and block projectiles.
^n^nSwiping a pickup off the floor will add it to the bag. Up to 8 pickups can be stored in the bag. These pickups cannot be dropped.
^n^nDouble pickups will add 2 copies of the pickup into the bag.
^n^nPickups can also be collected from the Shop, if Isaac has enough money to buy them first.
^n^nOnce 8 pickups have been collected, the bag can be used once more to create an item based on the types of pickups (components) collected.
^n^nA random recipe is chosen for each item when the run starts. This is seeded per run.
^n^nIf the bag would grant an item that hasn't been unlocked yet, a random item will be crafted instead.
^n^nSome recipes are fixed and exist in every run. Click here to check them out.
^n^nThe crafted item is chosen from one of the following pools:
^n• 40% → Boss
^n• 40% → Shop
^n• 20% → Treasure Room
^n^nPickups added into the bag have different qualities. Some pickups grant a chance to craft an item from a different pool. See more details.
^n^nBased on the overall quality of all components in the bag, the crafted item can be chosen from a special pool (Angel Room, Devil Room, or Secret Room), or other pools based on previously explained criteria.
^n^nThe overall quality of components in the bag also affects the crafted item's possible quality.^n^n

 
 Special pool
 Other pool
 Item quality
 
 
 40+
 35+
 4
 
 
 32-39
 27-34
 3-4
 
 
 28-31

 24-27

 20-23

 14-19

 0-13
 0-8
 0-1
 


When playing as Tainted Cain^n^n^n
The item that would be crafted is displayed in the bottom-right corner of the screen.
^n^nGetting more than 8 pickups in the bag will shift its contents left and up, deleting the top-left slot and adding to the bottom-right.
^n^nTapping the drop key will cycle the bag's contents left and up in a loop. Holding the use button will craft the displayed item.
^n^nCrafting an active item while already holding one will turn the old one into pickups, just like collecting it would.
^n^nCurse of the Blind! will hide the crafting preview.


 
 Fixed recipes
 
 
 
 
 The following recipes will always grant the same items, if unlocked.
^n* The order of components is irrelevant.^n^n


 
 The Poop
 →

 →

 →

 →

 →
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 



 
 PHD
 →

 →

 →

 →

 →
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 



 
 Mama Mega!
 →

 →
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 



 
 D infinity
 →
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 



 
 Red Key
 →
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 



 
 Pickup qualities
 
 
 
 
 Below is a table of each pickup's quality, and their added effect, if any.^n^n
(0) Poop Nugget: +10% chance per component to craft a Shell Game item
^n^n(1) Penny
^n^n(1) Heart
^n^n(2) Rotten Heart: +10% chance per component to craft a Curse Room item
^n^n(2) Bomb
^n^n(2) Any card
^n^n(2) Cracked Key: +10% chance per component to craft a Red Chest item
^n^n(2) Key
^n^n(2) Micro Battery
^n^n(2) Any pill
^n^n(3) Nickel
^n^n(4) Dice Shard
^n^n(4) Lil' Battery
^n^n(4) Any rune or soul stone: +10% chance per component to craft a Planetarium item, if the bag does not contain a Penny, Bomb, Key, or Heart
^n^n(4) Soul Heart
^n^n(5) Black Heart: +10% chance per component to craft a Devil Room item
^n^n(5) Bone Heart: +5% chance per component to craft a Secret Room item
^n^n(5) Charged Key
^n^n(5) Dime
^n^n(5) Eternal Heart: +10% chance per component to craft a Angel Room item
^n^n(5) Gold Heart: +10% chance per component to craft a Golden Chest item
^n^n(7) Golden Battery
^n^n(7) Golden Bomb
^n^n(7) Golden Key
^n^n(7) Golden Penny
^n^n(7) Golden Pill
^n^n(8) Lucky Penny
^n^n(8) Mega Battery
^n^n(10) Giga Bomb

item.name: Flip
item.keywords: red blue life death lazarus reroll
item.bot_description:
*While held:*^nWhen Isaac enters a room containing an item, the item pedestal will appear with a secondary ghostly item behind it.
^n^nOnly the real item can be interacted with. The ghostly one will vanish if Isaac leaves the room and there is no real item on the pedestal.
^n^nItem pedestals that are spawned after room generation, e.g. Boss Room items, items from chests, etc., won't have a ghostly item.
^n^nBuying an item from a Shop or Devil Deal will also buy the ghostly version of it for free.
^n^n*On use:*^nCycles between the real and ghostly items on pedestals, allowing Isaac to collect the ghostly variant.
^n^nDoes not affect pedestals that don't have a ghostly item on them.
^n^nIf playing as Tainted Lazarus, it will switch between the dead and alive form of the character, and the item will have only 4 charges rather than 6.

item.name: Lemegeton
item.bot_description:
Grants an orbital wisp that takes the form of a random passive item.
^n^nThe summoned item will act as if Isaac owns it, but is active only while the wisp is alive.
^n^nThe item has a 25% chance to be chosen from the current room's item pool, otherwise a random pool is selected.
^n^nOnly items with the summonable tag can be generated.
^n^nThe wisps can block up to 4 shots and/or get hit by 2 explosions before destroyed.
^n^nWisps deals contact damage equal to 2x Isaac's damage per tick, 2 times per second. They also receive contact damage.
^n^nA total of 24 wisps can be created. Using the item when this limit is reached will replace the oldest wisp.
^n^nItem wisps do not exhaust item pools, meaning Isaac can still normally find these items in a run, and multiple of the same item wisp can be obtained.
^n^nWisps do not contribute towards transformations, or the Collection Page.
^n^nItems that would normally grant pickups or health, will not do so when summoned as wisps.

item.name: Sumptorium
item.bot_description:
When used by any character other than Tainted Eve^n^n
Removes half a heart of health and creates a blood clot familiar.
^n^nBlood clots mimic Isaac's movement, shooting, and inherit tear, effect, including weapon effects.
^n^nHolding down the drop button allows Isaac to move independently from the clots.
^n^nThe familiar start with 15 HP that slowly decays down to 1 HP over time, or 5 HP for clots created by non-red hearts.
^n^nClots are immune to hazards such as spikes, fire places, and lasers.
^n^nEnemies deal 1 point of contact and projectile damage when they hit them.
^n^nIsaac's bombs and Troll Bombs deal 2 points of damage.
^n^nEach type of heart generates a unique type of blood clot, however red hearts are prioritized when using the item:
^n• Red Heart: 35% damage.
^n• Soul Heart: 35% damage; 22.5 HP.
^n• Black Heart: 43% damage; Dark Matter tears.
^n• Eternal Heart: 52% damage; Sacred Heart tears.
^n• Golden Heart: 35% damage; Midas' Touch tears (scales with luck).
^n• Bone Heart: 35% damage; Compound Fracture tears.
^n• Rotten Heart: 35% damage; 7.5 HP.
^n^nWhen playing as Tainted Eve^n^n
Holding down the fire button will create blood clot familiars every 2 seconds and drain half a heart.
^n^nActivating the item will recall all previously created blood clots and heal Tainted Eve for the same type of hearts used to generate the clots.
^n^nBlood clots deal 3x Tainted Eve's damage to enemies they pass through when returned to her.
^n^nIf more blood clots get returned that the amount of health she can have, excess blood clots will drop next to her.
^n^nThe item has a recharge time of 1 second instead of 10.
^n^nA maximum of 29 clots can be absorbed at once.

item.name: Recall
item.bot_description:
<:stat_exclamation:1263940092494483568> Only has an effect when playing as Tainted Forgotten, and can only be obtained via his Birthright.
^n^nRetreives The Forgotten's body automatically, even from a distance.
^n^nTainted Soul is invincible while the body is returning to him, except to forms of self-damage such as Devil Beggars.
^n^nTainted Forgotten will deal ~4-6x Isaac's damage to enemies that collide with it while it's returning to the Soul.
^n^nThe item cannot be used while the Soul is holding the body or the body is traveling after it has been thrown.

item.name: Hold
item.bot_description:
<:stat_exclamation:1263940092494483568> Only has an effect when playing as Tainted ???.
^n^nRemoves Tainted ???'s leftmost poop, storing it inside of the jar and cycling to the next poop.
^n^nUsing Hold while a poop is inside it will remove the poop and use it as expected.

item.name: Keeper's Sack
item.bot_description:
*On pickup:*^nSpawns 3 random coins and 1 Key.
^n^n*While held:*^nGrants stat upgrades for each item/pickup purchased with money. It can give the following upgrades:
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +0.5 damage.
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_range:1263940180163821659> +0.25 range.
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_speed:1263940240675045417> +0.03 speed.
^n^nEvery 3¢ spent in a shop will give boosts to a specific stat, going in the order of damage -> range -> speed.
^n^nBuying 15¢ items gives the same amount of stats as buying 5 3¢ items.

item.name: Keeper's Kin
item.bot_description:
While in a room with enemies, rocks and obstacles will occasionally spawn Blue Spiders.
^n^nCauses 0-2 Blue Spiders to spawn when destroying a rock.

item.name: Keeper's Box
item.bot_description:
Spawns a random Shop pickup or item that must be bought for its normal shop price. The item will be chosen from the Shop item pool.
^n^nHas an equal ~11.1% chance to spawn a card, pill, bomb, key, battery, item, soul heart, red heart, or a grab bag.
^n^nIf used inside of a Devil Room, pickups will be surrounded by spikes that damage Isaac for a full heart, and items will cost hearts.

item.name: Rosary
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_soul:1263940226758479953> +3 Soul Hearts.^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> +0.5 tears.
^n^nAdds 5 copies of The Bible to all item pools, unless it has previously been picked up.
^n^nThe Bible can be found multiple times even in the same pool unless it is picked up, after which it is removed from everywhere.

item.name: Everything Jar
item.bot_description:
Spawns a different pickup based on the number of charges the item had when used:
^n• 1: poop.
^n• 2: Penny.
^n• 3: Bomb.
^n• 4: Key.
^n• 5: Heart.
^n• 6: pill.
^n• 7: card, rune, or soul stone.
^n• 8: Soul Heart.
^n• 9: Gold Heart.
^n• 10: Golden Key.
^n• 11: Golden Bomb.
^n^nIf the item was fully charged, it instead does one of the following:
^n• Spawns a random amount of various pickups.
^n• Spawns a neutral fly.
^n• Spawns a bunch of friendly Dips, Blue Flies, and Blue Spiders.
^n• Closes the room's doors and spawns random enemies in front of each door, including Secret Room entrances.
^n• Spawns an item pedestal that cycles between 9 different items, 30 times per second, Items are selected from the current room's item pool.
^n• Spawns many different colored beams of light that deal damage to enemies and scale with Isaac's damage.
^n• Fills the room with poop.
^n• Spawns 6 Troll Bombs.
^n• Invokes the effects of Dataminer.
^n• Spawns a bunch of Shopkeepers.
^n• Spawns a Giga Bomb pickup that has a chance to be lit and explode.
^n• Does nothing.

item.name: TMTRAINER
item.description: Isaac and his mother lived alone in a small house on a hill
item.bot_description:
*On pickup:*^nPetrifies all enemies in the room and sets them on fire.
^n^nFades out the music, making it silent until another music track starts playing.
^n^n*While held:*^nCauses all future items to become glitched, causing them to become random combinations of 2-3 effects based on other items, as well as effects that are not normally controlled by Isaac, such as enemy spawns.
^n^nItem sprites are also combined from other item sprites, often appearing in different colors.
^n^nThis does not apply to quest items.
^n^nGlitched items can be either active or passive. There is a 75% chance for them to be passive.
^n^nRandom effects can be assigned on random events, such as upon taking damage, enemy death, room clear, etc.
^n^nGlitched items will have random prices in shops.

item.name: Anima Sola
item.bot_description:
Chains down the nearest enemy, completely preventing them from acting for 5 seconds.
^n^nUsing the item again, even if not fully charged, will release the enemy immediately.
^n^nThe effect also works on enemies that are invulnerable.
^n^nWhen playing as Tainted Jacob^n^n
The chain will always be set on Dark Esau, if he is present. Releasing Dark Esau will immediately cause him to charge at Tainted Jacob.
^n^nDark Esau deals no contact damage to Jacob while chained down.
^n^nIf used in a room without any enemies before Dark Esau has spawned, it will immediately summon him without wasting a charge.

item.name: Spindown Dice
item.bot_description:
Rerolls all items in the current room by subtracting their internal ID number by 1 until a valid item is rolled.
^n^nLocked items and items with the hidden tag are skipped.
^n^nTo check which item is next in the reroll queue, use the `/spindown` command.
^n^nItems that are generated via this type of reroll are not removed from item pools and can be found again during the run, unless picked up.

item.name: Hypercoagulation
item.bot_description:
Taking damage or donating health makes a red heart launch out of Isaac that disappears after 1.5 seconds.
^n^nThe heart depends on the amount of health spent: half heart spent will produce half a heart, while a full heart will produce a full heart.
^n^nDamage sources that scale up from half a heart to a full heart, starting from Chapter 4, will still only produce half a heart.
^n^nNo hearts are spawned when spending heart containers in Devil Deals.

item.name: IBS
item.bot_description:
After dealing enough damage to enemies, Isaac begins to flash red. Once this happens, releasing the fire button activates one of Tainted ???'s unique poop abilities.
^n^nIBS cannot activate if Isaac is currently holding a poop.

item.name: Hemoptysis
item.bot_description:
Double-tapping a fire button causes Isaac to sneeze blood that deals damage to enemies in front of him and knocks back pickups, enemies and projectiles.
^n^nThe amount of damage the sneeze does is equal to 1.5x Isaac's damage.
^n^nEnemies knocked back take 8 + 2 × CurrentFloor damage if they hit a wall or an obstacle, and deal the same damage to other enemies they hit.
^n^nThe sneeze has a cooldown period of 1 second.
^n^nThe sneeze applies a Brimstone curse to enemies for 5 seconds which makes them take more damage from Brimstone-like laser beams and explode on death from such an attack, damaging and spreading the curse to nearby enemies.
^n^nThe amount of damage cursed enemies receive from lasers is equal to 2 × DamageStat + 3. This damage also applies to lasers shot by enemies.
^n^nThe range of the sneeze attack is affected by Isaac's <:stat_shotspeed:1263940211591876651> shot speed.

item.name: Ghost Bombs
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_bomb:1263944832515178559> +5 Bombs.
^n^nCauses Isaac's bombs to create ghosts when they explode, that rapidly chase and deal contact damage to enemies equal to 50% of Isaac's damage per tick, 3.75 times per second.
^n^nGhosts explode after 10 seconds, dealing 7 damage to nearby enemies up to 3 times, and destroying enemy projectiles. Isaac and the environment are immune to the explosion.

item.name: Gello
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that's attached to Isaac, and can be controlled in the direction Isaac is shooting. While Isaac is shooting, the familiar will shoot at the closest enemy.
^n^nThe familiar inherits Isaac's damage, tears, range, shoot speed, tear effects, and tear modifiers.
^n^nLaunching the familiar deals 3x Isaac's damage to enemies it hits.
^n^nGello's tears deal 75% of Isaac's damage, or 100% if playing as Lilith or Tainted Lilith.

item.name: Decap Attack
item.bot_description:
Throws Isaac's head, allowing him to shoot from the spot it lands. The head will block enemy shots and deal contact damage. The body cannot shoot tears while the head is detached.
^n^nThe head does 24 damage on impact and 4 damage per tick (12 per second) while on the ground.
^n^nThe head can return to Isaac by touching it, or by using the item again which won't waste charges. Both throwing and retaking the head deals 24 damage to enemies passing through.

item.name: Cube of Meat
item.bot_description:
Spawns an orbital familiar which blocks shots and deals contact damage.
^n^nThe familiar can be upgraded up to 4 times by obtaining additional Cubes of Meat. Each level has its own characteristics.
^n^nLevel 1: Blocks projectiles and deals 7 damage per tick (52.5 per second).
^n^nLevel 2: Gains the ability to shoot tears alongside Isaac, 1.36 times per second, that deal 3.5 damage.
^n^nLevel 3: Transforms from an orbital to a follower that chases nearby enemies and deals 5 damage per tick (12.5 per second). Loses the ability to shoot tears and block shots.
^n^nLevel 4: Increases the size of Meat Boy and now deals 10 damage per tick (25 per second).
^n^nObtaining additional Cubes of Meat will create a new level 1 cube and start the cycle again.
^n^nCan drop after defeating a Harbinger.

item.name: Stye
item.bot_description:
Tears fired from Isaac's right eye gain the following:
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +28.6% damage.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_range:1263940180163821659> +6.5 range.
^n<:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488><:stat_shotspeed:1263940211591876651> -0.3 shot speed.

item.name: Mom's Ring
item.bot_description:
*On pickup:*^nDrops a random rune or soul stone.
^n^n*While held:*^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +1 damage.

item.name: A Quarter
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_coin:1263944839830179950> +25¢.
^n^nCan drop from destroying urns or killing Super Greed.

item.name: PHD
item.bot_description:
*On pickup:*^nHeals 2 red hearts.
^n^nSpawns a random pill on the ground.
^n^n*While held:*^nIdentifies all pills upon pickup.
^n^nConverts negative pills into their positive counterparts or removes their negative effects.
^n^nAdds 0-2 coins to the payout every time a Blood Donation Machine or IV Bag is used.
^n^nIn <:stat_hard:1263944869878173857> Hard Mode, adds exactly 1 coin to the payout.

item.name: X-Ray Vision
item.bot_description: Permanently opens up Secret Room and Super Secret Room entrances.

item.name: My Little Unicorn
item.bot_description:
Gives invulnerability and <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_speed:1263940240675045417> +0.28 speed for 6 seconds.
^n^nIsaac cannot shoot any tears while active, but can instead deal 20 damage per tick (40 per second).
^n^nAlso speeds up the game's music.

item.name: Book of Revelations
item.keywords: bible soul heart devil angel harbinger
item.bot_description:
*While held:*^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_angeldevil:1263940944848228474> +17.5% devil/angel chance.
^n^n*On use:*^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_soul:1263940226758479953> +1 Soul Heart.
^n^nGuarantees a Harbinger boss to replace the current floor's boss, if possible.
^n^nOnly 1 Harbinger can spawn per chapter:
^n• Famine in Chapter 1.
^n• Pestilence in Chapter 2.
^n• War in Chapter 3.
^n• Death or Conquest (if unlocked) in Chapter 4.
^n• The Headless Horseman on any floor.
^n^nDoes not affect bosses in alt path and final bosses.

item.name: Brother Bobby
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that follows Isaac around and shoots tears that deal 3.5 damage.
^n^nThe familiar shoots 1.88 times per second.

item.name: The Pact
item.keywords: heart damage tears blood paper red

item.name: Dead Cat
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770> +9 extra lives.
^n^nGrants a familiar that follows Isaac.
^n^nSets Isaac's red heart containers to 1.
^n^nDoes not remove Soul Hearts or Black Hearts unless picked up as a character that cannot use red hearts.
^n^nDoes not remove Bone Hearts unless picked up as The Forgotten.
^n^nUpon death respawns Isaac in the previous room and sets his red heart containers to 1 again.
^n^nThe item is removed from Isaac's inventory after it respawns Isaac 9 times.
^n^nCan drop from the Super Pride mini-boss.

item.name: Lord of the Pit
item.keywords: red black cross fly flight speed devil
item.bot_description: <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_speed:1263940240675045417> +0.3 speed.^n^nGrants flight.

item.name: The Nail
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_halfblack:1263940106969026731> +1 Half Black Heart.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +2 damage.
^n<:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488><:stat_speed:1263940240675045417> -0.18 speed.
^n^nGrants the ability to destroy obstacles by walking into them.
^n^nAllows Isaac to deal 20 contact damage per tick (40 per second) to enemies.
^n^nChanges the color of Isaac's tears to red.
^n^nIsaac makes a demonic sound when taking damage in a room where the item was used.
^n^nIf used multiple times in the same room, the speed penalty applies only once, but the damage bonus stacks.
^n^nAll bonuses apply only for the current room.

item.name: We Need To Go Deeper!
item.bot_description:
Spawns a trapdoor that leads to the next floor.
^n^nIf used on a tile with a special graphic (e.g. grass, piece of garbage, etc), it will instead spawn a Crawl Space once per floor.
^n^nIf used in Womb II, the trapdoor will always lead to Sheol.
^n^nCan only spawn a Crawl Space trapdoor if used in any floor after Womb. Regular trapdoors won't be spawned in these floors.
^n^nCan be used on a dirt patch in the Dark Room to get a random chest.

item.name: Deck of Cards
item.bot_description: Gives Isaac a random card.^n^nHas a rare chance to give Dice Shard or Cracked Key.

item.name: Monstro's Tooth
item.bot_description: Spawns a friendly Monstro that jumps onto a random enemy and deals 120 damage, while destroying nearby obstacles.^n^nCan also damage Isaac and will target him if used in a room with no enemies.

item.name: Loki's Horns
item.bot_description:
Adds a chance to shoot tears in 4 cardinal directions.
^n^nThe chance starts at 25% with 0 luck and goes up to 100% with 15 luck.

item.name: Little Chubby
item.bot_description: Spawns a familiar that follows Isaac and charges across the room when Isaac shoots, dealing 3.5 damage per tick (105 per second) to any enemies in its path, until it hits a wall or obstacle.

item.name: Spider Bite
item.bot_description: Adds a 25% chance to shoot slowing tears that reduce the movement speed of enemies and any projectiles fired by them.^n^nThe slowness lasts for 2.5 seconds.^n^nThe chance to fire a slowing tear goes up to 100% at 15 luck.

item.name: Skatole
item.bot_description:
Causes some fly enemies to transform into neutral flies that deal no damage: Attack Fly, Dart Fly, Eternal Fly, Ring Fly, Army Fly and Swarm.
^n^nCauses the following flies to move slower and deal no contact damage: Moter, Level 2 Fly, Bulb, Mama Fly, Bloodfly, Ultra Famine Fly and Ultra Pestilence Fly.
^n^nPrevents Pooters and Super Pooters from shooting and makes them slower, prevents Moters from splitting and Bulbs from draining energy.
^n^nThe following flies move slower and deal no contact damage, but can still damage Isaac through other means: Full Fly, Boom Fly, Red Boom Fly, Drowned Boom Fly, Sucker, Soul Sucker, Split, Ink, Willo, Level 2 Willo, Dragon Fly, Dragon Fly X, Bone Fly, Sick Boom Fly, Tainted Boom Fly and Tainted Sucker.
^n^nCan be obtained as a final reward from a Shell Game.

item.name: The Small Rock
item.keywords: damage speed tears grey gray silver stone
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +1 damage.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> +0.2 tears.
^n<:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488><:stat_speed:1263940240675045417> -0.2 speed.
^n^nHas a small chance to drop when destroying a Tinted Rock.

item.name: Spelunker Hat
item.bot_description: Reveals map icons and layout up to 2 rooms from where Isaac is located.^n^nCan also reveal Secret Rooms and Super Secret Rooms.^n^nCompletely prevents damage from projectiles falling from above.

item.name: Super Bandage
item.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_red:1263940190515232838> +1 full Red Heart container.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_soul:1263940226758479953> +2 Soul Hearts.
^n^nHeals 1 Red Heart container.

item.name: The Gamekid
item.bot_description:
Turns Isaac into a Pac-Man-like creature for 6 seconds and provides the following effects:
^n^nGives invulnerability.
^n^nInflicts fear to all enemies in the room.
^n^nRemoves the ability to shoot tears.
^n^nAllows Isaac to deal 20 contact damage per tick (40 per second).
^n^nReplenishes half a red heart for every 2 enemies killed.
^n^nSpeeds up the game's music.

item.name: Sack of Pennies
item.bot_description: Spawns a sack familiar that follows Isaac around and drops a random coin every 2 rooms.^n^nThe first drop happens after 1 room.

item.name: Robo-Baby
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that follows Isaac and shoots spectral Technology lasers that deal 3.5 damage.
^n^nThe familiar shoots 1.36 times per second.

item.name: Little C.H.A.D.
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that follows Isaac and drops a Half Red Heart every 3 rooms.
^n^nThe first drop happens after 2 rooms.^n^nCan drop when defeating C.H.A.D.

item.name: The Book of Sin
item.bot_description:
Spawns a random pickup, pill, card or rune.
^n^nCannot spawn Micro Batteries. Other battery types can spawn normally.

item.name: The Relic
item.bot_description:
Spawns a small blue cross familiar that follows Isaac around and drops a Soul Heart every 8 rooms.
^n^nThe first Soul Heart is dropped after 7 rooms.

item.name: Little Gish
item.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that follows Isaac around and fires slowing tears that deal 3.5 damage.
^n^nThe familiar shoots 1.36 times per second.
^n^nCan drop by defeating Gish.

trinket.name: Swallowed Penny
trinket.bot_description:
Spawns 1 coin of any type after taking damage.
^n^nIf held by Keeper or Tainted Keeper, spawns 0-1 coins instead.
^n^nCan be found by destroying urns, buckets, and special shopkeepers.

trinket.name: Wiggle Worm
trinket.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> +0.4 tears.
^n^nGrants spectral tears.
^n^nIsaac's tears travel in a wave-like pattern.

trinket.name: Vibrant Bulb
trinket.bot_description:
Grants the following stat increases when Isaac's active item is fully charged:
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_speed:1263940240675045417> +0.25 speed.
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_range:1263940180163821659> +0.75 range.
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> +0.2 tears.
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_shotspeed:1263940211591876651> +0.1 shot speed.
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +0.5 damage.
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_luck:1263940158839849010> +1 luck.
^n^nDoes not grant stats when holding an item that has no charge bar.

trinket.name: Dim Bulb
trinket.bot_description:
Grants the following stat increases when Isaac's active item is completely uncharged:
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_speed:1263940240675045417> +0.5 speed.
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_range:1263940180163821659> +1.5 range.
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> +0.5 tears.
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_shotspeed:1263940211591876651> +0.3 shot speed.
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +1.5 damage.
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_luck:1263940158839849010> +2 luck.
^n^nDoes not grant stats when holding an item that has no charge bar.

trinket.name: Fragmented Card
trinket.bot_description:
Entering a new floor while holding this trinket will generate an additional Secret Room.
^n^nHas no effect in <:stat_greed:1263944856376443104> Greed Mode.

trinket.name: Equality!
trinket.bot_description: When Isaac has the same amount of coins, bombs, and keys, every pickup spawned on the ground transforms into its double variant.

trinket.name: Wish Bone
trinket.bot_description: Upon taking damage, there's a 5% chance to destroy the trinket and spawn a random item from the current room's item pool.

trinket.name: Bag Lunch
trinket.bot_description: Upon taking damage, there's a 5% chance to destroy the trinket and spawn Lunch.

trinket.name: Lost Cork
trinket.bot_description: Increases the radius of creep produced by Isaac and his familiars.

trinket.name: Crow Heart
trinket.bot_description:
Causes Red Heart damage to be taken before any Soul Heart, Black Heart, or Rotten Heart damage.
^n^nBone Hearts will be depleted, but not broken before Red Hearts.

trinket.name: Walnut
trinket.description: That's a hard nut to crack!
trinket.bot_description:
Getting hit by an explosion has a 33% chance to destroy the trinket and spawn a coin, heart, key, and another trinket.
^n^nPickups dropped from the trinket can be of any variant.
^n^nTaking damage from explosions is not required. This can also be accomplished while Isaac is invulnerable.

trinket.name: Duct Tape
trinket.bot_description:
Stops orbital familiars from rotating around Isaac.
^n^nStops shooting familiars from moving.
^n^nStops mimicking familiars from moving.
^n^nFamiliars are stopped in the exact position they were when the trinket was picked up.

trinket.name: Ring Worm
trinket.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> +0.4 tears.
^n^nGrants spectral tears.
^n^nIsaac's tears travel in a high-speed spiral pattern.

trinket.name: Silver Dollar
trinket.bot_description:
Allows Shops to appear in Chapter 4.
^n^nThe trinket must be held prior to entering the floor in order to take effect.

trinket.name: Bloody Crown
trinket.bot_description:
Allows Treasure Rooms to appear in Chapter 4.
^n^nThe trinket must be held prior to entering the floor in order to take effect.

trinket.name: Pay To Win
trinket.keywords: green blue coin money reroll restock machine treasure
trinket.bot_description:
Causes a Shop Restock Machine to always appear in Treasure Rooms.
^n^nThe trinket must be held prior to entering the floor in order to take effect.
^n^nDoes not affect the Treasure Rooms in Blue Womb.

trinket.name: Locust of War
trinket.bot_description:
Upon entering an unexplored room, spawns a Red Locust that detonates upon impact with enemies, dealing 2x Isaac's damage for the impact, and 60 for the explosion.
^n^nThe explosion synergizes with Isaac's bomb effects.
^n^nThe explosion can damage Isaac and the environment.

trinket.name: Locust of Pestilence
trinket.bot_description: Upon entering an unexplored room, spawns a Green Locust that dies upon impact with enemies, dealing 2x Isaac's damage for the impact, and poisons the enemy, dealing Isaac's amount of damage for 2 ticks.

trinket.name: Locust of Famine
trinket.keywords: gray grey fly abyss yellow slow
trinket.bot_description: Upon entering an unexplored room, spawns a Grey Locust that dies upon impact with enemies, dealing 2x Isaac's damage for the impact, and slows the enemy.

trinket.name: Locust of Death
trinket.bot_description: Upon entering an unexplored room, spawns a Black Locust that dies upon impact with enemies, dealing 4x Isaac's damage for the impact.

trinket.name: Locust of Conquest
trinket.bot_description: Upon entering an unexplored room, spawns 1-4 White Locusts that die upon impact with enemies, dealing 2x Isaac's damage for the impact.

trinket.name: Bat Wing
trinket.bot_description: Killing an enemy has a 5% chance to grant flight for the rest of the room.

trinket.name: Stem Cell
trinket.bot_description: Traveling to a new floor heals 50% of Isaac's empty Red Heart and Bone Heart containers. Must heal a minimum of half a heart.

trinket.name: Flat Worm
trinket.bot_description:
Makes Isaac's tears 50% wider, and gives them an oblong appearance.
^n^nSlightly increases tear knockback.

trinket.name: Hairpin
trinket.bot_description: Fully recharges Isaac's active item upon entering an unexplored Boss Room.

trinket.name: Wooden Cross
trinket.bot_description: Once per floor, grants a one-time-use Holy Mantle shield that negates one hit.

trinket.name: Butter!
trinket.bot_description:
Causes active items to drop onto a pedestal when used.
^n^nGrants a 2% chance to drop one of Isaac's passive items upon taking damage.

trinket.name: Filigree Feather
trinket.keywords: silver grey gray white feather filgree feather
trinket.bot_description: Angel statues will drop items from the Angel Room item pool instead of Key Pieces when defeated, unless Isaac already holds one of the Key Pieces.

trinket.name: Door Stop
trinket.unlock_method: Blow up 50 doors and/or Secret Room entrances.
trinket.bot_description:
Makes the last door that Isaac went through to stay open, allowing him to leave the room before completing it.
^n^nDoes not prevent Challenge Room and Boss Rush doors from closing.
^n^nDoes not affect the Mom boss room.
^n^nDoes not work in <:stat_greed:1263944856376443104> Greed Mode.

trinket.name: Extension Cord
trinket.unlock_method: Add {{i|The Battery}}, {{i|9 Volt}}, and {{i|Car Battery}} to the Collection Page.
trinket.bot_description:
Causes bolts of electricity to arc between each of Isaac's familiars, damaging enemies caught between them.
^n^nThe bolts do 6 damage per strike.
^n^nThey flow through each familiar in reverse order of acquisition, and reach Isaac last.
^n^nA bolt arcs every 2 seconds with one familiar; 3 of them arc per second with 2 familiars; 7.5 per second arc with 3 or more familiars.

trinket.name: Rotten Penny
trinket.unlock_method: Have 20 Blue Flies at the same time.
trinket.bot_description: Spawns a Blue Fly every time a coin is picked up.

trinket.name: Baby-Bender
trinket.unlock_method: Use {{i|I - The Magician}} or {{i|Telepathy For Dummies}} while already having homing tears.
trinket.bot_description: Grants Isaac's familiars homing shots.

trinket.name: Finger Bone
trinket.bot_description: Grants a 4% chance to gain a Bone Heart upon taking damage.

trinket.name: Jawbreaker
trinket.bot_description:
Adds a luck-based chance to fire a tooth shot that deals 3.2x Isaac's damage.
^n^nThe chance to fire a tooth shot scales with luck using the formula 1 / (10 - LuckStat), starting at 10% with 0 luck, and going up to 100% with 9 luck.

trinket.name: Store Credit
trinket.keywords: money cash dollar bill dolar silver gray grey
trinket.bot_description: Makes all shop items free, but destroys the trinket once an item has been purchased.

trinket.name: Chewed Pen
trinket.bot_description:
Adds a luck-based chance to fire a shot that slows down enemies.
^n^nThe chance to fire a slowing shot scales with luck using the formula 1 / (10 - (LuckStat / 2)), starting at 10% with 0 luck, and going up to 100% with 18 luck.

trinket.name: Blessed Penny
trinket.bot_description:
Grants a chance to drop a Half Soul Heart when collecting coins.
^n^nThe chance is based on the coin's worth:
^n• Penny: 16.6% chance.
^n• Double Penny: 30.5% chance.
^n• Nickel: 59.7% chance.
^n• Dime: 83.3% chance.

trinket.name: Broken Syringe
trinket.bot_description: Entering a new room has a 25% chance of granting the effects of a random syringe item.

trinket.name: Short Fuse
trinket.bot_description:
Isaac's bombs explode much faster, in 0.66 seconds.
^n^nIncreases Isaac's bombs' damage by 15%.

trinket.name: Gigante Bean
trinket.bot_description:
Increases the size and radius of farts produced by Isaac or enemies.
^n^nMakes Isaac's farts deal 10 damage to enemies.

trinket.name: A Lighter
trinket.bot_description:
Entering a new room has a luck-based chance to set some enemies on fire.
^n^nThe burning deals Isaac's damage per tick, up to 5 times.
^n^nThe chance for the effect to occur scales with luck, going up to 100% with 40 luck.
^n^nRemoves the Tick when picked up.

trinket.name: Broken Padlock
trinket.bot_description:
Doors that require a pickup in order to unlock can be opened up with explosions instead.
^n^nThis also includes any types of chests, even if they don't require a pickup, except Haunted Chests and Mom's Chest.
^n^nAlso works on Key Blocks and the Strange Door in Depths II.
^n^nDoors that require 2 keys only require one bomb to open.
^n^nLocked doors can be bombed through even before the room has been completed.
^n^nMega Chests require multiple explosion in order to open.

trinket.name: Myosotis
trinket.bot_description: Entering a new floor spawns up to 4 pickups that were left on the previous floor.

trinket.name: 'M
trinket.bot_description:
Rerolls Isaac's active item every time it's used.
^n^nThe rerolled active item will start with no charges.
^n^nTransformations will not be given from active items acquired via this trinket, even if the item was dropped and picked back up again.
^n^nActive items that have costs associated with using them (e.g. coins for Magic Fingers), will still be rerolled even if they cannot be used.
^n^nThe active item's charge must be fully expended in order for it to reroll.
^n^nOne-time-use items will disappear before being rerolled.

trinket.name: Teardrop Charm
trinket.bot_description:
Increases the chance of luck-based tear effects occurring.
^n^nThe bonus is equivalent to +4 luck.

trinket.name: Callus
trinket.bot_description:
Grants immunity to creep and spikes on the floor.
^n^nDoes not prevent damage from Curse Room, Spiked Chests, Spider Rocks, and the Greed Mode button.
^n^nDoes not prevent using the Sacrifice Room.

trinket.name: Apple of Sodom
trinket.bot_description:
Picking up Red Hearts has a 50% chance to convert them into Blue Spiders instead of using them for healing. The chance goes up to 100% if Isaac cannot normally pick up the heart (e.g. has full health).
^n^nThe number of Blue Spiders spawned depends on the type of heart that was picked up:
^n• Heart (half): 1-3 spiders.
^n• Heart: 3-5 spiders.
^n• Heart (double): 6-8 spiders.
^n^nCharacters that cannot obtain Red Hearts can convert them into Blue Spiders.
^n^nCan also be used on Red Hearts inside of Shops which won't consume any money, but Isaac must have enough money to purchase the heart.

trinket.name: Forgotten Lullaby
trinket.keywords: music note paper sheet familiar siren
trinket.unlock_method: Blow up The Siren's skull after defeating her.
trinket.bot_description:
Doubles the fire rate of Isaac's familiars.
^n^nDoes not affect wisps.

trinket.name: Beth's Faith
trinket.bot_description: Spawns 4 normal Book of Virtues wisps at the beginning of each floor, up to a total of 8.

trinket.name: Old Capacitor
trinket.bot_description:
Prevents active items from charging normally when clearing rooms.
^n^nAdds a luck-based chance to spawn a Lil' Battery when clearing a room, alongside the original drop.
^n^nThe chance to spawn a battery is equal to 20% + 3% × LuckStat, starting at 20% with 0 luck, but maxing out at 33% with 4.34 luck.
^n^nThe room must drop a clear reward in order for the chance to apply.

trinket.name: Brain Worm
trinket.bot_description:
Isaac's tears snap 90 degrees to target enemies that they may have missed.
^n^nWon't work if Isaac is too close to enemies.

trinket.name: Perfection
trinket.description: Luck way up. Don't lose it!
trinket.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_luck:1263940158839849010> +10 luck.
^n^n<:stat_exclamation:1263940092494483568> The trinket is destroyed upon taking non-self damage.
^n^nCan be obtained by clearing 3 consecutive floors without taking damage. It will drop upon the final boss room of the 3rd floor.
^n^nWill also drop in Greed Mode, when defeating the first boss of the 3rd floor.

trinket.name: Devil's Crown
trinket.bot_description:
Replaces Treasure Rooms with special Red Treasure Rooms that contain items from the Devil Room item pool. Items inside must be payed for with heart containers, just like a regular Devil Deal.
^n^nThe trinket will immediately convert Treasure Rooms if they haven't been previously visited. The same goes vice-versa, dropping the trinket will convert the room back to a normal one.
^n^nDoes not affect the Silver Treasure Rooms in <:stat_greed:1263944856376443104> Greed Mode.

trinket.name: Charged Penny
trinket.unlock_method: Get an item payout from {{i|Battery Bum|machine|Battery Bums}} 5 times.
trinket.bot_description:
Picking up coins has a chance to add one charge to Isaac's active item.
^n^nThe chance is equal to 1/6th of the coin's value.

trinket.name: Friendship Necklace
trinket.bot_description: Causes familiars that normally follows Isaac to orbit him instead.

trinket.name: Panic Button
trinket.bot_description:
Forces Isaac's active item to activate right before he is about to take damage.
^n^nSince the item is activated before damage is taken, the trinket can be used as a damage-negation mechanic with certain items, such as Book of Shadows.
^n^nDoes not activate active items in the consumables slot.
^n^nSuper-charged items will use both of their charges.

trinket.name: Lucky Rock
trinket.bot_description:
Rocks and their variants have a 33% chance to drop a penny when destroyed.
^n^nNo other coin variants can be dropped.

trinket.name: Blue Key
trinket.bot_description:
Entering a room that requires a key or coin does not consume the key or coin, but instead takes Isaac to a newly generated Blue Womb room that is not a part of the current floor's layout, but acts as an in-between passage of the 2 rooms.
^n^nThese rooms contain assortments of Blue Womb-styled enemies, such as Blue Gapers, Blue Boils and Blue Conjoined Fatties, and are always long rooms.
^n^nThe rooms can give a reward when cleared, just like normal rooms.
^n^nOnce exited, the blue room cannot be re-entered.
^n^nThe door leading to The Hush fight will also create a blue passage room.

trinket.name: Flat File
trinket.bot_description:
Causes all spikes to retract, preventing them from dealing damage.
^n^nWorks on Curse Room doors, Spiked Rocks, Spiked Chests, Spike-enemies, and Spikeballs (unless spawned by Singe).
^n^nAlso retracts the spikes in Sacrifice Rooms, but the trinket can be dropped in order to use the room.
^n^nDoes not prevent spiked attacks from The Pile or Mama Gurdy.

trinket.name: Telescope Lens
trinket.unlock_method: Obtain any 3 items with the {{tag|stars}} tag in a single run.
trinket.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_planetarium:1263940169824866316> +15% Planetarium chance.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_planetarium:1263940169824866316> raises the default chance for a Planetarium to spawn from 1% to 10%.
^n^nThis also works after having entered a Planetarium, resetting the chance to 10% instead of 1%.
^n^nAllows Planetariums to appear in Chapter 4.

trinket.name: Mom's Lock
trinket.unlock_method: Defeat Isaac, ???, Satan, and The Lamb as {{i|Tainted Isaac}}.
trinket.bot_description: Has a 1/3 chance to grant the effects of a random passive mom item upon entering a room.

trinket.name: Dice Bag
trinket.bot_description:
Grants a 50% chance to give Isaac a one-time-use Dice item in the consumable slot when he enters a new room. The item disappears after leaving the room.
^n^nCan grant the following items:
^n• D1
^n• D4
^n• The D6
^n• Eternal D6
^n• D7
^n• D8
^n• D10
^n• D12
^n• D20
^n• D100

trinket.name: Holy Crown
trinket.description: Walk the path of the saint
trinket.keywords: white glow angel shop treasure cathedral
trinket.unlock_method: Defeat Isaac, ???, Satan, and The Lamb as {{i|Tainted Magdalene}}.
trinket.bot_description:
Causes a Treasure Room and Shop to generate in the Cathedral.
^n^nThe trinket must be held prior to entering the floor in order to take effect.

trinket.name: Mother's Kiss
trinket.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_red:1263940190515232838> +1 Heart Container (will be filled the first time the trinket is picked up).
^n^n<:stat_exclamation:1263940092494483568> The trinket will be destroyed if the heart container given by it is the last one, and it is traded/consumed.
^n^n<:stat_exclamation:1263940092494483568> Isaac will instantly die if he drops the trinket when the only heart container he has is the one given by it.
^n^nThe extra container can exceed the maximum coin heart limit of Keeper and Tainted Keeper.

trinket.name: Torn Card
trinket.bot_description:
Every 15 shots, Isaac will shoot an Ipecac + My Reflection tear with a very high range value.
^n^nThe tear will follows Isaac until it hits an enemy or lands, where it will explode, dealing damage to Isaac if nearby.

trinket.name: Torn Pocket
trinket.keywords: silver grey gray coin money pickup
trinket.unlock_method: Defeat Isaac, ???, Satan, and The Lamb as {{i|Tainted Lazarus}}.
trinket.bot_description:
Isaac drops 2 random pickups from his inventory (coins, bombs, or keys) upon taking damage.
^n^nDropped pickups can be converted to other types of pickups which often results in a net positive. E.g. a coin can turn into a dime.

trinket.name: Gilded Key
trinket.unlock_method: Defeat Isaac, ???, Satan, and The Lamb as {{i|Tainted Cain}}.
trinket.bot_description:
*On pickup:*^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_key:1263944873510305925> +1 Key.
^n^n*While held:*^nAll new chests that spawn will be replaced with Locked Chests, unless they were an Old Chest or Mega Chest.
^n^nModifies the contents of Locked Chests, making them able to contain one or more cards, runes, batteries, and trinkets, alongside regular pickups.
^n^nRed Chests in the starting room of Dark Room will also get changed to Locked Chests.

trinket.name: Mom's Toenail
trinket.bot_description:
Causes Mom's foot to stomp a random spot in the room every 20 seconds, dealing 300 damage.
^n^nThe stomp deals a full heart of damage to Isaac.
^n^nThe stomp can break obstacles and doors.

trinket.name: Lucky Sack
trinket.bot_description: Spawns a Grab Bag in the beginning of every floor.

trinket.name: Wicked Crown
trinket.description: Walk the path of the wicked
trinket.unlock_method: Defeat Isaac, ???, Satan, and The Lamb as {{i|Tainted Azazel}}.
trinket.bot_description:
Causes a Treasure Room and Shop to generate in Sheol.
^n^nThe trinket must be held prior to entering the floor in order to take effect.

trinket.name: Azazel's Stump
trinket.bot_description:
Clearing a room has a chance to visually turn Isaac into Azazel, giving him a short-range Brimstone beam, the ability to fly, and <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> x1.5 damage multiplier.
^n^nThe effects last until clearing and leaving another room.

trinket.name: Dingle Berry
trinket.unlock_method: Defeat Isaac, ???, Satan, and The Lamb as {{i|Tainted ???}}.
trinket.bot_description:
Spawns a random friendly Dip upon clearing a room.
^n^nTurns enemy Dips into friendly Dips.

trinket.name: Ring Cap
trinket.bot_description: Upon placing a bomb, places an additional bomb free of charge.

trinket.name: Nuh Uh!
trinket.unlock_method: Defeat Isaac, ???, Satan, and The Lamb as {{i|Tainted Eden}}.
trinket.bot_description:
Starting from Chapter 4, every coin and key is replaced with a random pickup:
^n• Bomb: 26.6%
^n• Heart: 26.6%
^n• Pill: 16.6%
^n• Card: 16.6%
^n• Trinket: 6.6%
^n• Battery: 6.6%
^n^nIf the pickup is a coin, it also has a 20% chance of being replaced with a neutral Fly.
^n^nDoes not apply only to normal pickup spawns, but rather to any method of them spawning.
^n^nHas no effect in <:stat_greed:1263944856376443104> Greed Mode.

trinket.name: Modeling Clay
trinket.bot_description:
Entering a new room has a 50% chance to grant a random passive item from the current room's item pool, that lasts for the rest of the room.
^n^nCan only mimic the effects of items with the summonable tag.
^n^nThe trinket takes the form of the given item in the HUD.

trinket.name: Polished Bone
trinket.unlock_method: Defeat Isaac, ???, Satan, and The Lamb as {{i|Tainted Forgotten}}.
trinket.bot_description: Clearing a room has small a chance to spawn a friendly Bony.

trinket.name: Hollow Heart
trinket.bot_description: Grants a Bone Heart upon entering a new floor.

trinket.name: Kid's Drawing
trinket.keywords: guppy cat white portrait paper sheet child's drawing
trinket.unlock_method: Defeat Isaac, ???, Satan, and The Lamb as {{i|Tainted Lost}}.
trinket.bot_description:
Acts as one of the 3 items required for the Guppy transformation.
