^n^nDropping the trinket will also remove it from the Guppy transformation counter. Even if Isaac already got the transformation, it can remove it if the trinket was the third item.

trinket.name: Black Lipstick
trinket.bot_description: Doubles the chances of Black Hearts appearing.

trinket.name: Crystal Key
trinket.bot_description:
Clearing a room has a 33% chance to open a neighboring Red Room.
^n^nThe chance is reduced to 12.5% if already inside a Red Room.
^n^nFor more info about red rooms, check the Red Key page.

trinket.name: Keeper's Bargain
trinket.unlock_method: Defeat Isaac, ???, Satan, and The Lamb as {{i|Tainted Keeper}}.
trinket.bot_description:
Grants a 50% chance for items that cost heart containers to cost money instead.
^n^nThe trinket's effects can be immediately disabled when dropped inside a room with converted prices.

trinket.name: Cursed Penny
trinket.bot_description:
Teleports Isaac to a random room upon picking up a coin.
^n^nCan teleport to any room except an undiscovered Ultra Secret Room.
^n^nThe teleportation effect can be removed with Black Candle.

trinket.name: Your Soul
trinket.unlock_method: Defeat Isaac, ???, Satan, and The Lamb as {{i|Tainted Judas}}.
trinket.bot_description:
Can be used in exchange for a Devil Deal or other item that costs heart containers.
^n^nUsing it will destroy the trinket.

trinket.name: Number Magnet
trinket.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_angeldevil:1263940944848228474> +10% Devil/Angel Room chance.
^n^nPrevents Krampus from appearing in the Devil Deal.
^n^nReplaces the Devil Deal's room layout with one of many unique layouts that often contain better rewards and pickups.

trinket.name: Strange Key
trinket.unlock_method: Defeat Isaac, ???, Satan, and The Lamb as {{i|Tainted Eve}}.
trinket.bot_description:
Unlocks the passageway to Blue Womb regardless of the run's duration.
^n^nUsing Pandora's Box while holding the trinket will ignore the regular effects of the box, and instead spawn 6 higher quality items from a set of item pools, consuming both the item and trinket in the process.
^n^nThe items are chosen from the following pools: Treasure Room, Shop, Boss, Devil Room, Angel Room, Secret Room, Library, Golden Chest, Curse Room, Planetarium.
^n^nThe Treasure Room pool has a much higher chance to be chosen than the others that have an equal chance.

trinket.name: Lil Clot
trinket.bot_description:
Spawns a Sumptorium clot familiar that moves and shoots using the same inputs as Isaac.
^n^nThe familiar uses Isaac's tears, range, shot speed, and tears effects. It deals 0.35x Isaac's damage.
^n^nThe clot will die after getting hit 3 times, and will respawn in the next room.

trinket.name: Temporary Tattoo
trinket.unlock_method: Defeat Isaac, ???, Satan, and The Lamb as {{i|Tainted Samson}}.
trinket.bot_description:
Spawns a chest after clearing a Challenge Room.
^n^nSpawns an extra item after clearing a Boss Challenge Room.

trinket.name: Swallowed M80
trinket.bot_description:
Isaac has a 50% chance to explode upon taking damage, and deal 185 damage to nearby enemies.
^n^nThe explosion uses Isaac's bomb synergies.
^n^nThe explosion can also trigger when playing Blood Donation Machines, Devil Beggars, etc. It cannot destroy a Blood Donation Machine, and it instead makes it drop some coins and hearts.

trinket.name: RC Remote
trinket.unlock_method: Defeat Isaac, ???, Satan, and The Lamb as {{i|Tainted Jacob}}.
trinket.bot_description:
Familiars no longer follow behind Isaac or shot on their own, and are now controlled with Isaac's inputs.
^n^nHolding the drop button allows Isaac to move independently from his familiars.

trinket.name: Bible Tract
trinket.bot_description: Increases the chances of Eternal Hearts appearing.

trinket.name: Found Soul
trinket.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that uses Isaac's inputs (movement and shooting), and shoots spectral tears.
^n^nThe familiar uses Isaac's speed, tears, range, shot speed, tear effect, and trinkets, and deals 0.5x Isaac's damage.
^n^nHolding the drop button allows Isaac to move independently from the familiar.
^n^nThe familiar will place a bomb for free when Isaac places one.
^n^nThe familiar will die in one hit, respawning on the next floor.
^n^nThe familiar will also copy most of Isaac's item effects, and even use active items alongside Isaac.

trinket.name: Expansion Pack
trinket.unlock_method: Defeat Isaac, ???, Satan, and The Lamb as {{i|Tainted Bethany}}.
trinket.bot_description:
When Isaac uses an active item, the effects of another random active item are activated in addition to the original item.
^n^nCan only grant active items that have a charge time of 1 or 2 rooms.
^n^nTimed recharge and infinite use items will trigger the effect only once per room.

trinket.name: Beth's Essence
trinket.keywords: blue wisp bethany angel beggar donat
trinket.bot_description:
Spawns 5 regular wisps upon entering an Angel Room.
^n^nDonating to Beggars has a chance to spawn a random wisp.

trinket.name: The Twins
trinket.unlock_method: Defeat Isaac, ???, Satan, and The Lamb as {{i|Tainted Lilith}}.
trinket.bot_description:
Entering a room has a 50% chance to duplicate one of Isaac's familiars.
^n^nIf Isaac has no familiars, it spawns Brother Bobby or Sister Maggy instead.

trinket.name: Adoption Papers
trinket.bot_description:
Allows Shops and Black Markets to sell items from the Baby Shop item pool.
^n^nMakes items sold in shops cost 10¢.

trinket.name: Cricket Leg
trinket.unlock_method: Defeat Isaac, ???, Satan, and The Lamb as {{i|Tainted Apollyon}}.
trinket.bot_description: Grants a chance to spawn a random 7 Seals locust when an enemy dies.

trinket.name: Apollyon's Best Friend
trinket.bot_description: Spawns an Abyss locust with a 1.5x damage multiplier.

trinket.name: Broken Glasses
trinket.bot_description:
Grants a 50% chance of adding an extra blind item in Treasure Rooms. When one of the items is taken, the other disappears.
^n^nGrants a 50% chance to reveal the blind item on alternate floors.

trinket.name: Ice Cube
trinket.bot_description:
Upon entering a room, each enemy has a 20% chance to be petrified, and freeze when killed.
^n^nPetrification lasts for 4 seconds, and enemies can be frozen up to 2 more seconds after the petrificaton effect.
^n^nThe chance for enemies to be petrified scales with luck, reaching 100% at 40 luck.
^n^nThe freezing effect is the same one granted by Uranus. Check the item page for more details about ice statues.
^n^nBosses can get petrified, but won't get frozen.

trinket.name: Sigil of Baphomet
trinket.bot_description:
Grants a shield that negates all types of damage for 1 second after killing an enemy.
^n^nUp to 5 seconds of invincibility can be accumulated by killing multiple enemies in quick succession.

trinket.name: Paper Clip
trinket.bot_description:
Allows Isaac to unlock Locked Chests without using keys.
^n^nDoes not work on Mega Chests.
^n^nCan be dropped from Key Masters.

trinket.name: Petrified Poop
trinket.bot_description:
Increases the pickup drop rate from poops to 50%.
^n^nHas a chance to drop when breaking poop.

trinket.name: Monkey Paw
trinket.bot_description:
Drops a Black Heart when Isaac has half a heart or less after taking damage.
^n^nThe effect can trigger up to 3 times, which is indicated by the trinket's display icon. After this, the trinket will disappear.

trinket.name: Mysterious Paper
trinket.bot_description:
On every frame, has a very high chance to grant the effects of one of the following:
^n• The Polaroid
^n• The Negative (does not include the damage bonus)
^n• A Missing Page
^n• Missing Poster
^n^nThe item's effects can be used to enter the special paths they open, e.g. The Polaroid to go to the Chest. However, it cannot be used to open the Strange Door in Depths II.
^n^nDropped from Divorce Papers.

trinket.name: Daemon's Tail
trinket.bot_description:
Replaces 80% of hearts from room clear rewards with keys.
^n^nDecreases chances for heart drops from all sources, and increases chances for other rewards to be selected instead.
^n^nFor example, it will decrease heart drop chances from Blue Fire Places, as the heart drops can be replaced with nothing.
^n^nAll heart drops turn into Black Hearts whenever possible.

trinket.name: Missing Poster
trinket.keywords: book page paper respawn revive white
trinket.bot_description:
Respawns Isaac as The Lost in the previous room upon death.
^n^nIf playing as Tainted Lost, it will respawn as that character instead.
^n^n<:stat_exclamation:1263940092494483568> Dying in a Sacrifice Room while holding this trinket will unlock The Lost.

trinket.name: Butt Penny
trinket.bot_description:
Upon picking up a coin, Isaac farts, knocking back nearby enemies and projectiles, and inflicting poison on enemies.
^n^nAdds a 20% chance for coins to drop when destroying poops.
^n^nCan be dropped from Special Shopkeepers, and buckets in Dross.

trinket.name: Mysterious Candy
trinket.bot_description:
Grants Isaac a chance to fart or poop every 30 seconds.
^n^nFarts deal 6 damage to enemies and blow projectiles away.

trinket.name: Hook Worm
trinket.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> +0.4 tears.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_range:1263940180163821659> +1.5 range.
^n^nGrants spectral tears.
^n^nIsaac's tears move shifting left to right on a square-wave-like path.

trinket.name: Broken Ankh
trinket.keywords: silver grey gray cross respawn revive blue baby ???
trinket.bot_description:
Has a 22.22% chance to revive Isaac as ??? upon death, putting him in the most recent non-hostile room.
^n^nIf playing as Tainted ???, will revive as that character instead.
^n^nThe effect can occur multiple times per run.

trinket.name: Fish Head
trinket.bot_description: Spawns a Blue Fly upon taking damage.

trinket.name: AAA Battery
trinket.bot_description:
Fully recharges the held active item when it gains the second to last charge, effectively reducing the charge time by 1 bar.
^n^nDoes not affect items with only one bar of charge, or those with automatic recharge.

trinket.name: Pinky Eye
trinket.bot_description:
Adds a chance to shoot poison tears that deal damage to enemies over time.
^n^nThe poison deals Isaac's amount of damage up to 2 times.
^n^nThe chance to shoot such a tear scales with luck using the formula 1 / (10 - (LuckStat / 2)). The chance is 10% with 0 luck, and goes up to 100% with 18 luck.

trinket.name: Push Pin
trinket.bot_description:
Adds a chance to shoot piercing and spectral tears.
^n^nThe chance to shoot such a tear scales with luck using the formula 1 / (10 - (LuckStat / 2)). The chance is 10% with 0 luck, and goes up to 100% with 18 luck.

trinket.name: Liberty Cap
trinket.bot_description:
Upon entering a room, grants a 25% chance of triggering one of the following item effects:
^n• Mini Mush
^n• Odd Mushroom
^n• Odd Mushroom
^n• Blue Cap
^n• God's Flesh
^n• Magic Mushroom
^n^nCan drop from destroying mushrooms.

trinket.name: Umbilical Cord
trinket.bot_description:
When Isaac enters a room and is at half a red heart or no red hearts at all, a Little Steven familiar spawns until health is restored and entering another room.
^n^nHas a high chance to spawn a Gemini familiar for the current room upon taking damage. This effect is stackable.
^n^nCan drop from destroying polyps in The Womb.

trinket.name: Child's Heart
trinket.description: It calls out to its brothers
trinket.bot_description:
Grants a 10% chance of replacing the room clear reward with a heart.
^n^nChests, Tinted Rocks, Slot Machines and Fortune Telling Machines gain a chance of adding a heart to their rewards.
^n^nCan drop from Blood Donation Machines.

trinket.name: Rusted Key
trinket.bot_description:
Grants a 10% chance of replacing the room clear reward with a key.
^n^nChests, Tinted Rocks, Slot Machines and Fortune Telling Machines gain a 33% chance of adding a key to their rewards.

trinket.name: Mom's Pearl
trinket.bot_description: Adds a 5% chance to turn any non-specific heart drop into a Soul Heart.

trinket.name: Broken Remote
trinket.bot_description: Triggers the Teleport! effect whenever an active item is used.

trinket.name: Red Patch
trinket.bot_description:
Upon taking damage, Isaac has a 20% chance of gaining <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +1.8 damage for the current room.
^n^nThe chance is affected by luck and goes up to 100% with 8 luck.

trinket.name: Match Stick
trinket.bot_description:
Grants a 10% chance of replacing the room clear reward with a bomb.
^n^nChests, Tinted Rocks, Slot Machines and Fortune Telling Machines gain a chance of adding a bomb to their rewards.
^n^nRemoves the Tick when picked up.
^n^nCan drop from TNT barrels, and Match Book.

trinket.name: Lucky Toe
trinket.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_luck:1263940158839849010> +1 luck.
^n^nAdds an additional pickup when opening a Locked Chest.
^n^nHas a 33% chance to add an additional pickup when destroying a Machine or blowing up a Tinted Rock.
^n^nIncreases the chances of getting a room clear reward.

trinket.name: Cursed Skull
trinket.bot_description: When left at half a heart or less after taking damage, Isaac will be teleported to a random room.

trinket.name: Safety Cap
trinket.bot_description:
Grants a 10% chance of replacing the room clear reward with a pill.
^n^nChests, Tinted Rocks, Slot Machines and Fortune Telling Machines gain a chance of adding a pill to their rewards.

trinket.name: Ace of Spades
trinket.bot_description:
Grants a 10% chance of replacing the room clear reward with a card.
^n^nChests, Tinted Rocks, Slot Machines and Fortune Telling Machines gain a chance of adding a card/rune to their rewards.

trinket.name: Isaac's Fork
trinket.bot_description:
Grants a luck-based chance of healing for half a red heart upon clearing a room.
^n^nThe chance goes up to 100% with 18 luck.

trinket.name: A Missing Page
trinket.bot_description:
Adds +40 damage to The Necronomicon and similar effects, such as Black Hearts.
^n^nGrants a luck-based chance to activate The Necronomicon upon taking damage. The chance goes up to 50% with very high luck (50-65).

trinket.name: Bloody Penny
trinket.bot_description:
Grants a chance to drop a Half Heart when collecting coins.
^n^nThe chance is based on the coin's worth:
^n• Penny: 25% chance.
^n• Double Penny: 43.75% chance.
^n• Nickel: 76.27% chance.
^n• Dime: 94.37% chance.
^n^nCan be dropped from Special Shopkeepers.

trinket.name: Purple Heart
trinket.bot_description: Doubles the chances of champion enemies appearing, including champion bosses.

trinket.name: Burnt Penny
trinket.bot_description:
Grants a chance to drop a bomb when collecting coins.
^n^nThe chance is based on the coin's worth:
^n• Penny: 25% chance.
^n• Double Penny: 43.75% chance.
^n• Nickel: 76.27% chance.
^n• Dime: 94.37% chance.
^n^nBombs can be of any type.
^n^nCan be dropped from TNT barrels and Special Shopkeepers.

trinket.name: Flat Penny
trinket.bot_description:
Grants a chance to drop a key when collecting coins.
^n^nThe chance is based on the coin's worth:
^n• Penny: 25% chance.
^n• Double Penny: 43.75% chance.
^n• Nickel: 76.27% chance.
^n• Dime: 94.37% chance.
^n^nKeys can be of any type.
^n^nCan be dropped from Special Shopkeepers.

trinket.name: Counterfeit Penny
trinket.unlock_method: Play the {{i|Shell Game}} or {{i|Hell Game}} 100 times.
trinket.bot_description:
Picking up a coin has a chance to increase the coin's value by 1.
^n^nThe chance is based on the coin's worth:
^n• Penny: 50% chance.
^n• Double Penny: 75% chance.
^n• Nickel: 96.88% chance.
^n• Dime: 99.9% chance.
^n^nCan be dropped from Special Shopkeepers, Golden Poop, killing a Beggar, or winning a Shell Game.

trinket.name: Tick
trinket.bot_description:
Removes 15% HP of enemies that have over 60 HP, including bosses.
^n^nHeals a Red Heart container upon entering an unexplored Boss Room.
^n^n<:stat_exclamation:1263940092494483568> Cannot be dropped unless Match Stick or A Lighter is picked up.

trinket.name: Isaac's Head
trinket.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that follows Isaac and fires piercing tears that deal 3.5 damage per shot.
^n^nThe familiar shoots 1.36 times per second.

trinket.name: Maggy's Faith
trinket.bot_description: Grants an Eternal Heart at the start of every floor.

trinket.name: Judas' Tongue
trinket.bot_description:
Makes items in the Devil Deal cost only 1 red heart container.
^n^nNo effect on items that require Soul Hearts in order to purchase.

trinket.name: ???'s Soul
trinket.bot_description:
Spawns a familiar that floats diagonally around the room and fires spectral and homing tears.
^n^nTears are fired 1.36 times per second and deal 3.5 damage.

trinket.name: Samson's Lock
trinket.bot_description:
Each time an enemy dies, grants a 1/15 chance to grant <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +0.5 damage for the current room.
^n^nThe effect can activate up to 10 times per room.
^n^nThe chance scales with luck, and goes up to 100% with 10 luck.

trinket.name: Cain's Eye
trinket.bot_description:
Grants a 25% chance to gain the effects of The Compass when starting a new floor, for the rest of the floor.
^n^nThe chance scales with luck, and goes up to 100% with 3 luck.

trinket.name: Broken Magnet
trinket.bot_description: Pulls all types of coins towards Isaac.

trinket.name: Eve's Bird Foot
trinket.bot_description:
When an enemy dies, grants a luck-based chance to spawn a Dead Bird familiar for the current room. This can happen only once per room.
^n^nThe familiar deals 2 damage per tick (4.29 per second).
^n^nThe chance to spawn the familiar scales with luck, starting at 5% with 0 luck, going up to 100% with 8 luck.

trinket.name: The Left Hand
trinket.description: The left-hand path reaps dark rewards
trinket.unlock_method: Defeat Ultra Pride as any character, or ??? as {{i|Judas}}.
trinket.bot_description:
Replaces all chests with Red Chests, except those spawned before picking up the item.
^n^nWill not convert Old Chests and Mega Chests.
^n^nLocked Chests in the starting room of The Chest will also get changed to Red Chests.

trinket.name: Shiny Rock
trinket.bot_description: Causes Tinted Rocks and rocks with Crawl Spaces to flash upon entering a room, and every 10 seconds afterward.

trinket.name: Safety Scissors
trinket.bot_description:
Converts Troll Bombs into bomb pickups before they explode. Each type of Troll Bomb is converted to a different type of bomb pickup:
^n• Troll Bomb → Bomb
^n• Megatroll Bomb → Double Bomb
^n• Golden Troll Bomb → Golden Bomb
^n• Giga Bomb (fused) → Giga Bomb

trinket.name: Rainbow Worm
trinket.bot_description:
Isaac's tears gain a random worm trinket effect that changes every 3 seconds. Can give the following effects:
^n• Pulse Worm
^n• Ring Worm
^n• Tape Worm
^n• Whip Worm
^n• Wiggle Worm
^n• Flat Worm
^n• Hook Worm
^n• Lazy Worm
^n• Ouroboros Worm
^n• Brain Worm
^n^nThe given effects always follow the above-displayed order.

trinket.name: Cracked Dice
trinket.bot_description:
Has a 50% chance of activating one of the following effects when taking damage:
^n• The D6
^n• D8
^n• D10
^n• D12
^n• D20
^n^nEach die effect has an equal chance of being selected.

trinket.name: Super Magnet
trinket.bot_description:
Attracts enemies and pickups towards Isaac.
^n^nRed Hearts are only attracted when Isaac can pick them up.
^n^nDoes not attract trinkets, chests, or grab bags.

trinket.name: Faded Polaroid
trinket.bot_description:
Isaac occasionally blends into the ground, which briefly confuses all enemies in the room.
^n^nCan be used as a replacement for The Polaroid or The Negative in order to open the Strange Door in Depths II leading to the Home floor. This effect won't work if the trinket is smelted.

trinket.name: Rosary Bead
trinket.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_angel:1263940933913804893> Increases the chance of an Angel Room replacing the Devil Room from 50% to 75%.
^n^nIncreases the chance of finding The Bible to 45% in Libraries, and 13% in Shops.

trinket.name: Louse
trinket.bot_description:
While in an uncleared room, Isaac has a chance to spawn a Blue Spider every 30 seconds.
^n^nAfter the first spider is spawned, there is a 50% chance of spawning another after 30 seconds, and a guaranteed spawn a minute later.

trinket.name: Bob's Bladder
trinket.bot_description: Isaac's bombs leave green creep when placed and moved around, that deals 23.33 damage per tick (233.3 per second) and lasts for 7 seconds.

trinket.name: Watch Battery
trinket.bot_description:
Increases the chance of a random battery pickup spawning after clearing a room by 6.67%.
^n^nIncreases the chance of random pickups being replaced with batteries by 2%.
^n^nHas a 5% chance to add an extra charge to Isaac's active item upon clearing a room.

trinket.name: Blasting Cap
trinket.bot_description: Isaac's bombs gain a 10% chance to drop a bomb pickup after exploding.

trinket.name: Stud Finder
trinket.bot_description:
Grants rocks an additional chance to reveal a Crawl Space when broken. This chance is applied when a rock is destroyed.
^n^nThe effect can occur only once per floor.

trinket.name: Error
trinket.bot_description:
Grants a random trinket effect in every room. The trinket's appearance on the HUD changes based on the currently granted effect.
^n^nEach trinket effect is locked for the room, meaning that re-entering the same room will grant the same effect.

trinket.name: Poker Chip
trinket.bot_description:
If a chest would contain hearts, coins, bombs and/or keys, it has a 50/50 chance to either drop extra consumables or replace all of the chest's contents with an Attack Fly.
^n^nHas no effect on Red Chests, Old Chests, or chests that contain other types of pickups.

trinket.name: Blister
trinket.bot_description: Applies additional knockback to Isaac's tears.

trinket.name: Second Hand
trinket.bot_description: Doubles the duration of most status effects applied by Isaac's items, e.g. poison, burn, charm, etc.

trinket.name: Endless Nameless
trinket.keywords: black grey gray card pill consumable
trinket.bot_description: Grants a 25% chance to spawn another copy of the used consumable (card, pill, etc).

trinket.name: Cartridge
trinket.bot_description:
Grants a ~5% chance to trigger The Gamekid effect upon taking damage.
^n^nThe activation chance scales with luck, and goes up to 100% with 38 luck.

trinket.name: Black Feather
trinket.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +0.5 damage for each of the following items/trinkets possessed:
^n• Abaddon
^n• Black Candle
^n• Black Lipstick
^n• Ceremonial Robes
^n• Daemon's Tail
^n• False PHD
^n• Goat Head
^n• Match Book
^n• Missing Page 2
^n• Safety Pin
^n^nMultiple copies of said items will further increase the damage bonus.

trinket.name: Blind Rage
trinket.bot_description:
Doubles the invincibility frames gained after taking damage.
^n^nAlso works for the invincibility frames granted by effects such as the Holy Mantle.

trinket.name: Golden Horse Shoe
trinket.bot_description:
Adds a +15% chance for Treasure Rooms to contain 2 item pedestals.
^n^nOnly one of the items can be taken, the other will disappear.
^n^nDoes not apply to the Treasure Room on the floor that the trinket was picked up on.

trinket.name: Store Key
trinket.unlock_method: Donate 666 coins to the {{i|Greed Donation Machine}}.
trinket.bot_description: Allows Shops to be opened without the use of keys.

trinket.name: Rib of Greed
trinket.bot_description:
Prevents Greed and Super Greed from appearing in Shops and Secret Rooms.
^n^nIncreases the chance of coin drops when clearing rooms at the expense of heart drops.
^n^nPicking up the trinket after Greed has been fought in one of the rooms, and re-entering the room will regenerate it into a regular Shop or Secret Room.

trinket.name: Karma
trinket.bot_description:
Donating to a Donation Machine has a 33% chance to do one of the following:
^n• 40% → return 1¢ to Isaac's inventory
^n• 40% → heal Isaac for a full Red Heart
^n• 15% → grant <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_luck:1263940158839849010> +1 luck
^n• 5% → spawn a Beggar

trinket.name: Lil Larva
trinket.bot_description:
Destroying poop will spawn a Blue Fly.
^n^nCan drop from destroying polyps in Corpse.

trinket.name: Mom's Locket
trinket.bot_description:
Using a key to unlock a door, Locked Chest, or Key Block, will heal Isaac for half a red heart.
^n^nConverts all Half Hearts into Hearts. This works retroactively.
^n^nAlso works for Keeper's coin hearts.
^n^nWill only work when a key is consumed from Isaac's inventory, meaning that having a Golden Key will not provide healing.

trinket.name: NO!
trinket.bot_description:
Prevents active items from spawning whenever possible.
^n^nThey can still appear if the item pool's passive items are exhausted or become scarce.
^n^nAlso works for most fixed active item drops.

trinket.name: Child Leash
trinket.bot_description: Causes familiars to stay closer to Isaac.

trinket.name: Pulse Worm
trinket.bot_description:
Causes Isaac's tears to pulsate in size between 1-1.6x as they travel.
^n^nThe effect affects the hitbox, but not the tears' damage.

trinket.name: Brown Cap
trinket.bot_description:
Causes poops to explode when destroyed, dealing 100 damage.
^n^nDoes not affect red poops.

trinket.name: Meconium
trinket.bot_description:
Adds a chance for any poop to turn into Black Poop.
^n^nAdds a chance for Black Poops to drop a Black Heart when destroyed.

trinket.name: Cracked Crown
trinket.unlock_method: Win 5 Daily Challenges in a row. They don't have to be played every day, but you mustn't lose one.
trinket.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_speed:1263940240675045417> +20% speed.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_range:1263940180163821659> +20% range.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_shotspeed:1263940211591876651> +20% shot speed.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +20% damage.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> +20% tears.
^n^nThe above stats are only applied if they're above their base values for the current character.
^n^nCalculations are made after all other calculations, effectively increasing stat bonuses given by other items.
^n^nDoes not affect direct fire rate modifiers, such as Mom's Perfume.

trinket.name: Used Diaper
trinket.bot_description:
Grants a 15% chance to trigger the Skatole effect in each room, making certain fly enemies harmless or less dangerous.
^n^nThe chance for this to occur is seeded per room.

trinket.name: Fish Tail
trinket.bot_description: Causes items and effects that generate Blue Flies or Locusts to generate twice as many.

trinket.name: Black Tooth
trinket.bot_description:
Grants a luck-based chance to fire a black tooth that deals 2x Isaac's damage and poisons enemies.
^n^nThe poison deals Isaac's amount of damage for 2 ticks.
^n^nThe chance scales with luck very slowly, with barely noticeable increase until around 30 luck. Reaching 32 will max out the chance at 100%.

trinket.name: Ouroboros Worm
trinket.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> +0.4 tears.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_range:1263940180163821659> +1.5 range.
^n^nCauses Isaac's tears to travel in a large spiral pattern.
^n^nGrants a luck-based chance to fire homing tears, reaching 100% with 9 luck.

trinket.name: Tonsil
trinket.bot_description:
After taking 6-12 hits, spawns a familiar that follows Isaac and blocks enemy shots.
^n^nThe effect can happen only 2 times, after which the trinket disappears.

trinket.name: Nose Goblin
trinket.keywords: green booger poison toxic sinus infection
trinket.bot_description:
Adds a 10% chance to fire a booger tear that sticks to enemies and deals damage to them over time.
^n^nBooger tears have a 50% chance to be homing.
^n^nBoogers deal Isaac's amount of damage each second, and last for 10 seconds.

trinket.name: Super Ball
trinket.bot_description: Grants a 10% chance to fire tears that bounce off of enemies, walls, and obstacles.

pickup.name: Heart
pickup.bot_description: Heals a full red heart container.

pickup.name: Blended Heart
pickup.bot_description:
Acts as either a Heart or Heart (soul) based on Isaac's current health.
^n^nIf Isaac has an empty red heart container, it will refill one, otherwise it will add a soul heart.
^n^nIf Isaac is missing only a half red heart container, it will fill it, and grant a half soul heart.

pickup.name: Bone Heart
pickup.bot_description:
Adds an empty bone heart container.
^n^nBone hearts can be refilled with red hearts, and take 3 hits to deplete.
^n^nWhen depleted, bone hearts break and cannot be regenerated.
^n^nIf obtained as a character that cannot have red health, the bone heart cannot be filled and will break in 1 hit.

pickup.name: Rotten Heart
pickup.keywords: green red health fly rot heart
pickup.unlock_method: Enter the Corpse for the first time.
pickup.bot_description:
Fills a whole red heart container, causing it to be depleted in just 1 hit.
^n^nEach rotten heart spawns 2 Blue Flies upon clearing a room.
^n^nCannot be picked up by characters that cannot have red health.

pickup.name: Heart (half)
pickup.bot_description: Heals a half red heart container.

pickup.name: Heart (soul)
pickup.bot_description:
Adds a full soul heart.
^n^nSoul Hearts are added to the end of the health bar. They are not permanent; once lost, they cannot be replenished.

pickup.name: Heart (eternal)
pickup.bot_description:
Grants an eternal heart.
^n^nEternal hearts are placed on top of the second half of the last red heart container, or other heart container if Isaac has no red heart containers.
^n^nWhen carried to the next floor, or another one is picked up, the eternal heart becomes a permanent red heart container.

pickup.name: Heart (double)
pickup.bot_description:
Heals 2 full red heart containers.
^n^nHas a 1/20 spawn rate in Normal Mode, and 1/50 in Hard Mode.

pickup.name: Black Heart
pickup.bot_description:
Adds a full black heart.
^n^nWhen depleted, black hearts activate The Necronomicon effect, dealing 40 damage to all enemies in the room.

pickup.name: Gold Heart
pickup.keywords: golden heart yellow health coin money
pickup.bot_description:
Adds a golden heart.
^n^nGolden hearts do not serve as any form of protection. They simply form an outline around the last heart in Isaac's health bar. When that heart is depleted, the golden heart will break and do the following:
^n• Drop 3-8 coins.
^n• Turn enemies near Isaac into gold for 6 seconds, similar to Midas' Touch. Golden enemies drop coins when killed.

pickup.name: Heart (half soul)
pickup.bot_description:
Adds a half soul heart.
^n^nSoul Hearts are added to the end of the health bar. They are not permanent; once lost, they cannot be replenished.

pickup.name: Scared Heart
pickup.unlock_method: Quick-restart by holding down the R button 7 times in a row.
pickup.bot_description:
Heals a full red heart container.
^n^nActs and looks identical to a normal Heart, but pulses faster and runs away from Isaac when approached.

pickup.name: Sticky Nickel
pickup.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_coin:1263944839830179950> +5¢.
^n^nCannot be picked up unless blasted off with an explosion.

pickup.name: Golden Penny
pickup.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_coin:1263944839830179950> +1¢.
^n^nSpawns another golden penny in a random spot in the same room after being picked up, but has a 10% chance of disappearing instead.

pickup.name: Golden Key
pickup.bot_description: Grants infinite keys for the rest of the floor.

pickup.name: Charged Key
pickup.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_key:1263944873510305925> +1 key.
^n^nAdds 6 charges to Isaac's active item.

pickup.name: Red Chest
pickup.bot_description:
Does not have a requirement to open.
^n^nPossible drops^n^n
^n• 15% - 2 Troll Bombs
^n• 15% - 2 pills
^n• 13% - 2 enemy Spiders/Striders
^n• 13% - Megatroll Bomb
^n• 10% - item from the Red Chest item pool
^n• 7.5% - 1 Soul Heart
^n• 7.5% - 2 Soul Hearts
^n• 7% - 3 Blue Flies
^n• 7% - 3 Blue Spiders
^n• 5% - teleport to the Devil/Angel Room (0% chance if opened inside a Devil/Angel Room)

pickup.name: Mom's Chest
pickup.bot_description:
Does not have a requirement to open.
^n^nCannot be duplicated with any item.
^n^nContains Red Key when opened for the first time, or an item from the Mom's Chest item pool otherwise.
^n^nSpawns in Mom's room in the Home level.

pickup.name: Bomb
pickup.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_bomb:1263944832515178559> +1 bomb.
^n^nBombs can be placed down with a keybind (default: E). They explode after 1.5 seconds and deal 100 damage to nearby enemies.
^n^nBombs deal a full heart of damage to Isaac.

pickup.name: Troll Bomb
pickup.bot_description:
Spawns ignited and explodes after 1.5-2.5 seconds.
^n^nThe bomb deals 100 damage to enemies, and a full heart of damage to Isaac.
^n^nCannot be picked up.

pickup.name: Golden Bomb
pickup.bot_description: Grants infinite bombs for the rest of the floor.

pickup.name: Megatroll Bomb
pickup.bot_description:
Spawns ignited and explodes after 1.5-2.5 seconds, whilst homing in on Isaac if he is close enough.
^n^nThe bomb deals 100 damage to enemies, and a full heart of damage to Isaac.
^n^nCannot be picked up.

pickup.name: Golden Troll Bomb
pickup.bot_description:
Spawns ignited and explodes infinitely, once every 3 seconds.
^n^nThe bomb deals 100 damage to enemies, and a full heart of damage to Isaac.
^n^nCannot be picked up.

pickup.name: Giga Bomb
pickup.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:giga:1283119055972335780> +1 giga bomb. This is indicated by the bomb indicator in the HUD appearing with a giga bomb icon.
^n^nIt can be placed down like a normal bomb that explodes after 1.5 seconds, dealing 300 damage to nearby enemies, and a full heart of damage to Isaac.
^n^nThe explosion destroys 13 tiles in a diamond shape, creating holes in the ground. These holes cannot be created in such a way that paths to doors in the room become blocked, including Secret Room entrances.
^n^nThe explosion also scatters around big rock pebbles across the room that deal 15 damage to enemies, and 99 damage to enemies standing close to the explosion. These rocks cannot hurt Isaac.

pickup.name: Throwable Bomb (pickup)
pickup.bot_description:
Once picked up, immediately ignites and explodes after 1.5 seconds. Can be thrown with the fire buttons while held.
^n^nDeals 100 damage to enemies, and a full heart of damage to Isaac.
^n^nSpawned by Bomb Grimaces.

pickup.name: Poop Nugget
pickup.bot_description:
Drops from Tainted ??? while dealing damage to enemies, and only has an effect when playing as this character.
^n^nAdds 1 poop nugget to the inventory.

pickup.name: Big Poop Nugget
pickup.bot_description:
Every bomb spawned when playing as Tainted ??? gets replaced with this, and only has an effect when playing as this character.
^n^nAdds 3 poop nuggets to the inventory.

pickup.name: Chest
pickup.bot_description:
Does not have a requirement to open.

^n^nPossible drops^n^n
^n• 1-3 coins
^n• Bomb
^n• Key
^n• Heart
^n• Trinket
^n• Pill
^n• A smaller chest with new contents

pickup.name: Bomb Chest
pickup.bot_description:
Requires an explosion to open.
^n^nHas the same contents as a Locked Chest.

pickup.name: Spiked Chest
pickup.bot_description:
Requires half a heart of damage to open.
^n^nHas the same contents as a regular Chest.

pickup.name: Eternal Chest
pickup.bot_description:
Requires a key to open.
^n^nHas the same contents as a Locked Chest.
^n^nOnce opened, it will close itself after 2 seconds, generating new content, but after the first time it's been opened, it has a 25% chance to give nothing and stay open, making it no longer usable.
^n^nThe chest will also stay open if it contains an item, making it its final payout.

pickup.name: Mimic Chest
pickup.bot_description:
Turns into a Spiked Chest when Isaac gets too close, requiring half a heart of damage to open.
^n^nHas the same contents as a regular Chest.
^n^nWhen the chest converts into a Spiked Chest, the contents inside it change.

pickup.name: Old Chest
pickup.bot_description:
Requires a key to open.
^n^nPossible drops^n^n
^n• 43% - 1-3 soul hearts
^n• 42% - 3 trinkets
^n• 10% - item from the Old Chest item pool
^n• 5% - item from the Angel Room item pool

pickup.name: Wooden Chest
pickup.bot_description:
Does not have a requirement to open.

^n^nPossible drops^n^n
^n• 45% - 2 cards/runes
^n• 45% - 2-3 pills
^n• 10% - item from the Wooden Chest item pool

pickup.name: Mega Chest
pickup.keywords: big chest locked chest treasure chest
pickup.bot_description:
Requires 1-7 keys to open.
^n^nHas a 1% chance to replace any Locked Chest.
^n^nPossible drops^n^n
^n• 2 items from the Treasure Room item pool
^n• The contents of 5 Locked Chests (excluding items)

pickup.name: Haunted Chest
pickup.bot_description:
When approached, a Polty ghost comes out of the chest and throws it at Isaac, after which it opens. The chest deals half a heart of damage if touched before being open, and when thrown.
^n^nIf Isaac leaves the room while the ghost is carrying it, it will disappear.
^n^nHas the contents of a regular Chest.

pickup.name: Locked Chest
pickup.keywords: treasure chest golden chest gold chest
pickup.bot_description:
Requires a key to open.
^n^nPossible drops^n^n
^n• 58% - 2-6 random pickups
^n• 20% - Item from the Golden Chest item pool
^n• 10% - Trinket
^n• 10% - Card
^n• 1% - A smaller regular chest with new contents
^n• 1% - A smaller locked chest with new contents

pickup.name: Grab Bag
pickup.bot_description:
Spawns 1-4 random pickups when touched.
^n^nCannot spawn hearts, pill, chests, or items.
^n^nHas an increased chance to spawn batteries.
^n^nCan be sold for 7 cents in shops.

pickup.name: Black Sack
pickup.bot_description:
Spawns 2-3 pills, black/bone hearts, and/or bombs when touched.
^n^nOnly 1 heart can spawn per sack.
^n^nHas a 1% chance to replace any regular Grab Bag.

pickup.name: Lil' Battery
pickup.bot_description: Adds 6 charges to Isaac's active item.

pickup.name: Micro Battery
pickup.bot_description: Adds 2 charges to Isaac's active item.

pickup.name: Mega Battery
pickup.bot_description:
Fully charges Isaac's active item, and adds an entire overcharge.
^n^nHolding multiple active items will charge all of them twice.

pickup.name: Golden Battery
pickup.bot_description:
Adds 6 charges to Isaac's active item.
^n^nDeals a full heart of damage to Isaac.
^n^nRespawns in a random room on the floor when picked up, however it does not show up on the map until found again.

consumable.name: Item Card
consumable.bot_description:
<:stat_exclamation:1263940092494483568> Only available during the Cantripped! challenge.
^n^nGrants an active item in the consumable slot based on the card's internal id.
^n^nCan be replaced by obtaining a different Item Card, which will replace the currently selected active item in the consumable slot.
^n^nHas a 20% chance to drop when killing enemies during the challenge, and drops upon each room clear.
^n^nReplaces all item pedestals when they appear.

consumable.name: Golden Pill
consumable.bot_description:
Activates the effects of a random pill that is not present in the run's pill pool.
^n^nCan be used multiple times, but has a chance to disappear when used.

consumable.name: Golden Horse Pill
consumable.unlock_method: Defeat Mega Satan as {{i|Tainted Cain}}, and have regular Horse Pills unlocked.
consumable.bot_description:
Activates the effects of a random horse pill that is not present in the run's pill pool.
^n^nCan be used multiple times, but has a chance to disappear when used.

consumable.name: 0 - The Fool
consumable.bot_description:
Teleports Isaac back to the starting room of the floor.
^n^nGuaranteed to drop when destroying the Marked Skull in Depths.

consumable.name: IX - The Hermit
consumable.description: May you see what life has to offer
consumable.bot_description:
Teleports Isaac to the current floor's Shop.
^n^nActs as a random teleport if no Shop is available on the floor.

consumable.name: X - Wheel of Fortune
consumable.bot_description: Spawns a Slot Machine or Fortune Telling Machine.

consumable.name: XI - Strength
consumable.bot_description:
Grants the effects of Magic Mushroom for the current room.
^n^nThe extra heart container given from the item is not removed if it would kill Isaac.

consumable.name: XII - The Hanged Man
consumable.bot_description: Grants the effects of Transcendence for the current room.

consumable.name: XIII - Death
consumable.description: Lay waste to all that oppose you
consumable.bot_description: Activates The Necronomicon effect, dealing 40 damage to all enemies in the room.

consumable.name: XIV - Temperance
consumable.description: May you be pure in heart
consumable.bot_description:
Spawns a Blood Donation Machine.
^n^nIn <:stat_greed:1263944856376443104> Greed Mode, spawns a Devil Beggar instead.

consumable.name: XV - The Devil
consumable.description: Revel in the power of darkness
consumable.bot_description: Grants the effects of The Book of Belial for the current room.

consumable.name: XVI - The Tower
consumable.bot_description: Spawns 6 Troll Bombs, essentially activating the effects of Anarchist Cookbook.

consumable.name: XVII - The Stars
consumable.description: May you find what you desire
consumable.bot_description:
Teleports Isaac to the Treasure Room, or the Planetarium, if one has spawned.
^n^nActs as a random teleport if no Treasure Room is available on the floor.
^n^nIf multiple Treasure Rooms are present, teleports to a random one.

consumable.name: XVIII - The Moon
consumable.description: May you find all you have lost
consumable.bot_description:
Teleports Isaac to the Secret Room.
^n^nActs as a random teleport if no Secret Room is available on the floor.
^n^nIf multiple Secret Rooms are present, teleports to a random one.

consumable.name: I - The Magician
consumable.description: May you never miss your goal
consumable.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_range:1263940180163821659> +3 range for the current room.
^n^nGrants homing tears for the current room.

consumable.name: XIX - The Sun
consumable.description: May the light heal and enlighten you
consumable.bot_description:
Fully heals all of Isaac's Red Heart containers.
^n^nDeals 100 damage to all enemies in the room.
^n^nReveals the entire floor map, except for the Super Secret Room and Ultra Secret Room.
^n^nRemoves Curse of Darkness!.

consumable.name: XX - Judgement
consumable.bot_description:
Spawns a Beggar.
^n^nThe Beggar has a rare chance to be of a different variant.

consumable.name: XXI - The World
consumable.bot_description: Reveals the entire floor map, except for the Super Secret Room and Ultra Secret Room.

consumable.name: 2 of Clubs
consumable.bot_description: Doubles Isaac's <:stat_bomb:1263944832515178559> bombs, or gives 2 if he doesn't have any.

consumable.name: 2 of Diamonds
consumable.bot_description: Doubles Isaac's <:stat_coin:1263944839830179950> coins, or gives 2 if he doesn't have any.

consumable.name: 2 of Spades
consumable.bot_description: Doubles Isaac's <:stat_key:1263944873510305925> keys, or gives 2 if he doesn't have any.

consumable.name: 2 of Hearts
consumable.bot_description: Doubles Isaac's current amount of filled red hearts, or fills one empty red heart container if all of them are empty.

consumable.name: Ace of Clubs
consumable.bot_description: Turns all pickups, chests, and non-boss enemies in the room into random bombs.

consumable.name: Ace of Diamonds
consumable.unlock_method: Defeat The Lamb in under 20 minutes.
consumable.bot_description: Turns all pickups, chests, and non-boss enemies in the room into random coins.

consumable.name: Ace of Spades
consumable.unlock_method: Defeat The Lamb without taking hearts, coins, or bombs through the entire run.
consumable.bot_description: Turns all pickups, chests, and non-boss enemies in the room into random keys.

consumable.name: II - The High Priestess
consumable.bot_description:
Causes Mom's foot to stomp down on the enemy with the most health, dealing 300 damage.
^n^nIf used in a room with no enemies, or against Mom, it will stomp Isaac instead.

consumable.name: Ace of Hearts
consumable.unlock_method: Complete an entire chapter after Basement while having a total of only half a heart or less. {{i|The Lost}} can be used for this.
consumable.bot_description: Turns all pickups, chests, and non-boss enemies in the room into random hearts.

consumable.name: Joker
consumable.bot_description:
Teleports Isaac to the Devil Room or Angel Room.
^n^nAlso works if the floor cannot normally spawn such a room.

consumable.name: Hagalaz
consumable.bot_description: Destroys all obstacles in the room, excluding Metal Blocks, Pillars and Key Blocks.

consumable.name: Jera
consumable.bot_description:
Duplicates all pickups and chests in the room, excluding item pedestals.
^n^nWill also duplicate pickups that require payment, e.g. ones inside the shop.
^n^nCloned chests will contain the exact same type of contents.
^n^nCannot be used to clone other Jera runes, or trinkets.

consumable.name: Ehwaz
consumable.bot_description: Activates the effects of We Need To Go Deeper!, creating a trapdoor leading to the next floor, or a guaranteed Crawl Space if used on a special tile.

consumable.name: Dagaz
consumable.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_soul:1263940226758479953> +1 Soul Heart.
^n^nRemoves any curses on the current floor, except Curse of the Labyrinth!.

consumable.name: Ansuz
consumable.bot_description: Reveals the entire map, except the Ultra Secret Room.

consumable.name: Perthro
consumable.bot_description: Activates the effects of The D6, rerolling all item pedestals in the room.

consumable.name: Berkano
consumable.bot_description: Spawns 3 Abyss locusts with a 1x damage multiplier for the duration of the room.

consumable.name: Algiz
consumable.unlock_method: Complete challenge #8: Cat Got Your Tongue.
consumable.bot_description: Grants a shield similar to Book of Shadows that lasts for 20 seconds.

consumable.name: III - The Empress
consumable.bot_description: Grants the effects of Whore of Babylon for the current room, activating them immediately.

consumable.name: Blank Rune
consumable.bot_description:
Grants a random rune effect.
^n^nHas a 25% chance to drop another Blank Rune upon use.

consumable.name: Black Rune
consumable.keywords: consume blue fly spider stat necronomicon void
consumable.bot_description:
Activates the effects of The Necronomicon, dealing 40 damage to all enemies in the room.
^n^nConverts all pickups in the room into Blue Flies and Blue Spiders.
^n^nConverts all item pedestals in the room into random stat upgrades, similarly to consuming a passive item with Void. Will also consume active items but turn them into stats as well.

consumable.name: Chaos Card
consumable.bot_description:
Throws the card in the direction Isaac's body is facing (movement direction). Anything that crosses the card's path gets instantly destroyed, including enemies, bosses and obstacles.
^n^nThe card has a short range, but can pass through multiple enemies.
^n^nCan also kill indestructible enemies, except Dark Esau.
^n^nWill blow open doors, just like a regular bomb explosion.
^n^nCannot kill Delirium, The Beast, and Mother's Shadow.
^n^nUsing it on some multi-phase bosses will only defeat their current phase: Satan (if used on the Fallen phase), Mega Satan, Hush, Ultra Greed, Mother, Dogma.
^n^nUsing it on Great Gideon will reveal a secret crawlspace underneath him that contains several chests and items.

consumable.name: Credit Card
consumable.bot_description:
Removes all price tags from items in the current room, making them instantly takeable without payment.
^n^nWorks both for items that require coins or heart containers in order to purchase.

consumable.name: Rules Card
consumable.bot_description:
Displays a random message on the screen, similarly to a Fortune Telling Machine.
^n^nThese messages will often contain hints, or special seeds.

consumable.name: A Card Against Humanity
consumable.unlock_method: Complete challenge #12: When Life Gives You Lemons.
consumable.bot_description: Fills the entire room with poop.

consumable.name: Suicide King
consumable.bot_description: Instantly kills Isaac and spawns 10 pickups and/or items from the current room's item pool.

consumable.name: Get Out Of Jail Free Card
consumable.bot_description: Opens all doors in the room, essentially activating the effects of Dad's Key.

consumable.name: ? Card
consumable.bot_description:
Activates Isaac's active item without wasting a charge, or making one-time-use items disappear.
^n^nDoes not work for active items that are in the consumables slot.
^n^n<:stat_exclamation:1263940092494483568> When used with Blank Card, it will teleport Isaac to the I AM ERROR room, consuming both Blank Card and the ? Card in the process.

consumable.name: Dice Shard
consumable.bot_description: Activates the effects of The D6 and D20 at the same time.

consumable.name: IV - The Emperor
consumable.bot_description:
Teleports Isaac to the current floor's Boss Room.
^n^nActs as a random teleport if no Boss Room is available on the floor.
^n^nIf Curse of the Labyrinth! is active, it will teleport Isaac to the second Boss Room.

consumable.name: Emergency Contact
consumable.bot_description:
Causes 2 of Mom's Hands to come down and grab 2 random enemies, dealing 40 damage to them.
^n^nIf enemies have 40 or more HP, they are temporarily pinned to the ground, unable to move or shoot.

consumable.name: Holy Card
consumable.bot_description: Grants a one-time-use Holy Mantle shield, that protects against one instance of damage.

consumable.name: Huge Growth
consumable.unlock_method: Increase in size 5 times in a run by acquiring size-up items or consumables.
consumable.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +7 flat damage.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_range:1263940180163821659> +3 range.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_size:1263944884474347630> +60% size. Does not affect the hitbox.
^n^nGrants Isaac the ability to crush obstacles by walking over them.
^n^nEffects last only for the current room.

consumable.name: Ancient Recall
consumable.bot_description:
Spawns 3 random cards.
^n^nCan also spawn special cards, such as Cracked Key, Dice Shard, or Emergency Contact.

consumable.name: Era Walk
consumable.keywords: slow stop watch broken watch stopwatch
consumable.unlock_method: Add both {{i|Broken Watch}} and {{i|Stop Watch}} to your collection page.
consumable.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_speed:1263940240675045417> +0.5 speed.
^n<:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488><:stat_shotspeed:1263940211591876651> -1 shot speed.
^n^nSlows down enemies.
^n^nEffects last for the current room.

consumable.name: Rune Shard
consumable.bot_description:
Activates one of the following weaker rune effects:
^n• Algiz: grants a shield that lasts 3 seconds.
^n• Ansuz: reveals the map up to 3 rooms away from Isaac.
^n• Berkano: spawns an Abyss locust for the duration of the room.
^n• Dagaz: gives half a soul heart.
^n• Hagalaz: destroys only some rocks.
^n• Jera: duplicates only one pickup.
^n• Perthro: rerolls only one item.
^n^nCan spawn as a replacement for any other rune that hasn't been unlocked yet. This means that once all runes have been unlocked, Rune Shard will no longer be able to spawn.

consumable.name: 0 - The Fool?
consumable.keywords: drop pickups quarter boom skeleton key
consumable.bot_description:
Drops all of Isaac's hearts and pickups on the ground, leaving him at only half a heart.
^n^nDropped pickups may be combined in items equal to their worth, such as A Quarter, A Dollar, Boom!, and Skeleton Key.

consumable.name: I - The Magician?
consumable.description: May no harm come to you
consumable.bot_description: Grants a blue aura that repels enemies and projectiles for 60 seconds, similar, but much stronger than The Soul.

consumable.name: II - The High Priestess?
consumable.bot_description: Causes Mom's leg to repeatedly stomp down on Isaac's location for 60 seconds.

consumable.name: III - The Empress?
consumable.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_red:1263940190515232838> +2 full Red Heart containers.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> +1.5 fire rate.
^n^nEffects last for 60 seconds.
^n^nIf losing the heart containers gained from the card would result in killing Isaac, he will get left with only 1 heart instead.

consumable.name: V - The Hierophant
consumable.bot_description: Spawns 2 Soul Hearts.

consumable.name: IV - The Emperor?
consumable.description: May you find a worthy opponent
consumable.bot_description:
Teleports Isaac to an extra Boss Room that is not part of the floor layout. The room is chosen from the boss pool 2 floors deeper than the current floor (cannot be a final boss).
^n^nDefeating the extra boss will spawn an item normally, but no trap door or Devil/Angel Room can appear there. Isaac can exit the room normally to get back to where he was previously.

consumable.name: V - The Hierophant?
consumable.bot_description: Spawns 2 Bone Hearts.

consumable.name: VI - The Lovers?
consumable.description: May your heart shatter into pieces
consumable.bot_description: Activates the effects of Magic Skin, spawning a random item from the current room's item pool in exchange of converting a red heart container (or 2 soul hearts) into a Broken Heart.

consumable.name: VII - The Chariot?
consumable.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> x4 fire rate multiplier.
^n^nTurns Isaac into an invulnerable statue that can be slightly moved.
^n^nEffects last for 10 seconds.

consumable.name: VIII - Justice?
consumable.description: May your sins come back to torment you
consumable.bot_description: Spawns 2-4 Locked Chests.

consumable.name: IX - The Hermit?
consumable.description: May you see the value of all things in life
consumable.bot_description:
Sells all items and pickups on the ground for their usual Shop price, spawning a matching amount of coins.
^n^nIf there is nothing to sell, spawns a single Penny instead.

consumable.name: X - Wheel of Fortune?
consumable.bot_description: Invokes a random Dice Room effect.

consumable.name: XI - Strength?
consumable.bot_description:
Slows all enemies in the room and causes them to take double damage from all sources.
^n^nThe effects lasts for 60 seconds, or until the room is left.

consumable.name: XII - The Hanged Man?
consumable.description: May your greed know no bounds
consumable.bot_description:
Isaac visually turns into Keeper for 30 seconds, gaining triple shot, and <:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488><:stat_speed:1263940240675045417> -0.1 speed.
^n^nEnemies killed by the converted character while the effect is active drop random coins.

consumable.name: XIII - Death?
consumable.description: May life spring forth from the fallen
consumable.bot_description: Activates the effects of Book of the Dead, turning enemies killed in the room into bone familiars or friendly Bonies.

consumable.name: VI - The Lovers
consumable.description: May you prosper and be in good health
consumable.bot_description: Spawns 2 Hearts.

consumable.name: XIV - Temperance?
consumable.bot_description: Forces Isaac to eat 5 random pills in quick succession.

consumable.name: XV - The Devil?
consumable.description: Bask in the light of your mercy
consumable.bot_description: Activates the effects of The Bible, and grants a Seraphim familiar for 30 seconds.

consumable.name: XVI - The Tower?
consumable.bot_description:
Creates up to 7 clusters of random rocks and other obstacles.
^n^nThese clusters will often contain tinted rocks, with the possibility of more than one tinted rock appearing in the same room.

consumable.name: XVII - The Stars?
consumable.bot_description:
Spawns 2 random items from the current room's item pool in exchange for Isaac's oldest passive item.
^n^nStarting items are ignored and cannot be removed.

consumable.name: XVIII - The Moon?
consumable.bot_description:
Teleports Isaac to the Ultra Secret Room, creating a pathway back to normal rooms via red rooms.
^n^nActs as a random teleport if no Ultra Secret Room is available on the floor.

consumable.name: XIX - The Sun?
consumable.description: May the darkness swallow all around you
consumable.keywords: spirit of the night curse of darkness damage flight
consumable.bot_description:
<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +1.5 damage.
^n^nTurns Isaac's red heart containers into Bone Hearts.
^n^nGrants Spirit of the Night.
^n^nApplies Curse of Darkness!.
^n^nEffects last for the current floor.

consumable.name: XX - Judgement?
consumable.description: May you redeem those found wanting
consumable.bot_description: Spawns a Shop Restock Machine.

consumable.name: XXI - The World?
consumable.bot_description: Spawns a trapdoor that leads to a Crawl Space.

consumable.name: Cracked Key
consumable.unlock_method: Open {{i|Mom's Chest}} in the Home level.
consumable.bot_description:
Activates the effects of Red Key, creating a Red Room adjacent to a viable wall.
^n^n<:stat_exclamation:1263940092494483568> Can be created by dropping any trinket in a Boss Room or Treasure Room prior to picking up Dad's Note. Trinkets dropped in these rooms will convert to Cracked Key during the Ascent floors.

consumable.name: Queen of Hearts
consumable.bot_description: Spawns 1-20 Hearts.

consumable.name: VII - The Chariot
consumable.bot_description: Grants the effects of My Little Unicorn for 6 seconds.

consumable.name: Wild Card
consumable.bot_description: Copies the effect of the most recently used active item or consumable.

consumable.name: Soul of Isaac
consumable.unlock_method: Defeat Hush and complete Boss Rush as {{i|Tainted Isaac}}.
consumable.bot_description: Causes all item pedestals in the current room to cycle between the original item and an additional one.

consumable.name: Soul of Magdalene
consumable.unlock_method: Defeat Hush and complete Boss Rush as {{i|Tainted Magdalene}}.
consumable.bot_description: For the rest of the room, causes enemies to drop Half Hearts upon death that disappear after 2 seconds.

consumable.name: Soul of Cain
consumable.keywords: open door red key red room soul stone orange
consumable.unlock_method: Defeat Hush and complete Boss Rush as {{i|Tainted Cain}}.
consumable.bot_description:
Opens all doors in the room, and creates Red Key rooms on all valid walls.
^n^n<:stat_exclamation:1263940092494483568> Will destroy the entrance to the Mirrored World in Downpour / Dross II.

consumable.name: Soul of Judas
consumable.unlock_method: Defeat Hush and complete Boss Rush as {{i|Tainted Judas}}.
consumable.bot_description: Invokes the Dark Arts effect for 3 seconds, stopping time for 3 seconds and allowing Isaac to pass through enemies and projectiles, dealing damage to them and gaining a temporary damage bonus.

consumable.name: Soul of ???
consumable.keywords: soul of blue baby poop soul stone
consumable.unlock_method: Defeat Hush and complete Boss Rush as {{i|Tainted ???}}.
consumable.bot_description:
Causes 8 poison farts that leave damaging brown creep on the ground, then plants a trail of 7 Butt Bombs in quick succession.
^n^nStanding on the creep grants <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> +1.5 fire rate and <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +1 damage.
^n^nThe creep deals Isaac's amount of damage at a very fast rate.

consumable.name: Soul of Eve
consumable.keywords: dead bird familiar soul stone black
consumable.unlock_method: Defeat Hush and complete Boss Rush as {{i|Tainted Eve}}.
consumable.bot_description: Spawns 14 Dead Bird familiars for the current room.

consumable.name: Soul of Samson
consumable.unlock_method: Defeat Hush and complete Boss Rush as {{i|Tainted Samson}}.
consumable.bot_description: Grants the Berserk! ability for 10 seconds.

consumable.name: Soul of Azazel
consumable.unlock_method: Defeat Hush and complete Boss Rush as {{i|Tainted Azazel}}.
consumable.bot_description: Activates Mega Blast for 7.5 seconds.

consumable.name: Soul of Lazarus
consumable.keywords: extra life revive respawn soul stone orange
consumable.unlock_method: Defeat Hush and complete Boss Rush as {{i|Tainted Lazarus}}.
consumable.bot_description:
Kills and revives Isaac at half a heart in the same room, with some invincibility time.
^n^nThe soul stone is automatically used upon taking fatal damage, essentially serving as an extra life.

consumable.name: VIII - Justice
consumable.bot_description:
Spawns a random heart, key, bomb, and coin.
^n^nSpawned pickups can be of any variant.

consumable.name: Soul of Eden
consumable.keywords: d6 d20 chaos reroll die dice rainbow soul stone
consumable.unlock_method: Defeat Hush and complete Boss Rush as {{i|Tainted Eden}}.
consumable.bot_description: Activates the effects of The D6 and D20, but rerolled items are pulled from random item pools.

consumable.name: Soul of the Lost
consumable.unlock_method: Defeat Hush and complete Boss Rush as {{i|Tainted Lost}}.
consumable.bot_description:
Isaac dies and visually turns into The Lost, with all of his benefits and weaknesses, until leaving the room.
^n^nThis allows Isaac to take a Devil Deal for free, take one free hit due to the Holy Mantle, and enter the Mausoleum / Gehenna door for free.

consumable.name: Soul of Lilith
consumable.keywords: baby shop familiar soul stone red
consumable.unlock_method: Defeat Hush and complete Boss Rush as {{i|Tainted Lilith}}.
consumable.bot_description: Grants a permanent passive item familiar from the Baby Shop item pool.

consumable.name: Soul of the Keeper
consumable.keywords: coin money shop soul stone gray grey
consumable.unlock_method: Defeat Hush and complete Boss Rush as {{i|Tainted Keeper}}.
consumable.bot_description: Spawns 1-25 random coins.

consumable.name: Soul of Apollyon
consumable.unlock_method: Defeat Hush and complete Boss Rush as {{i|Tainted Apollyon}}.
consumable.bot_description: Spawns 15 random 7 Seals locusts.

consumable.name: Soul of the Forgotten
consumable.unlock_method: Defeat Hush and complete Boss Rush as {{i|Tainted Forgotten}}.
