machine.name: Slot Machine
machine.bot_description:
Costs 1¢ to play.

^n^nThe slots on the machine will spin and give a payout if all 3 of them land on the same icon.

^n^nPossible payouts^n^n
^n• 54% - nothing
^n• 11.4% - coin
^n• 9.3% - heart
^n• 5.7% - 2 coins
^n• 4.7% - pill
^n• 4.7% - bomb
^n• 3.1% - key
^n• 3.1% - neutral fly
^n• 2% - self-destruct with an explosion (check the "When destroyed" section)
^n• 1.56% - Pretty Fly orbital (same as Pretty Fly)
^n• 0.47% - self-destruct and spawn A Dollar or Portable Slot

^n^nOn Hard Mode, the chances for a payout are halved.

^n^nWhen destroyed^n^n
^n• 78% - 2-3 random pickups (35%: 1-3 coins; 20% - heart; 30% - bomb; 15% - key)
^n• 10% - pill
^n• 10% - trinket
^n• 1% - random chest
^n• 1% - Locked Chest

machine.name: Shop Restock Machine
machine.bot_description:
For the cost of 1¢, has a chance to reroll all item pedestals in the room.
^n^nIf used inside a shop, it won't reroll items that are not part of the shop (spawned via another mechanic). It will also reroll the pickups inside it, and empty shop slots will be refilled.
^n^nAfter the 4th reroll, the machine has a chance to break with every penny inserted, and a 50% chance to every subsequent reroll.
^n^nCan be used to restock the shop in the Mirrored World.

^n^nWhen destroyed^n^n
^n• Spawns 0-3 coins.
^n• Rerolls all item pedestals.

machine.name: Greed Donation Machine
machine.bot_description:
Appears after defeating Ultra Greed in <:stat_greed:1263944856376443104> Greed Mode.
^n^nTouching the machine donates 1¢ to it, incrementing the displayed amount of donations.
^n^nDonations persist between runs and contribute toward unlocking certain achievements.
^n^nEach donation has a chance to jam the machine, which is shown under the health bar. Each character has a separate jam chance that persists between runs. Modded characters always have a 100% jam chance.
^n^nThe jam chance maxes out at 20% at 200¢ in <:stat_greed:1263944856376443104> Greed Mode, and at 1% at 55¢ in <:stat_greedier:1263944862378491966> Greedier Mode.
^n^nDonating the 1000th coin will drop ~12 dimes, and reset the total donation amount.
^n^nThe machine is immune to any type of explosion and cannot be destroyed in any way.

machine.name: Mom's Dressing Table
machine.bot_description:
Randomizes Isaac's appearance based on the set of items he has when bumped into.
^n^nUsually appears in Bedrooms.

^n^nWhen destroyed^n^n
^n• 99% - 1-4 pills.
^n• 1% - random Mom item: Mom's Underwear, Mom's Heels, Mom's Lipstick, Mom's Bra, Mom's Pad, Mom's Eyeshadow, Mom's Contacts, Mom's Wig, Mom's Perfume, Mom's Pearls.

machine.name: Battery Bum
machine.bot_description:
Costs 1¢ to play.

^n^nPossible payouts^n^n
^n• 1-3 charges to Isaac's active item, able to go over the normal charge amount, up to a maximum of 2 full charges.
^n• Micro Battery
^n• Lil' Battery
^n• Watch Battery
^n• AAA Battery

^n^nFinal payout^n^n
^n• Random item from the Battery Bum item pool.

^n^nWhen destroyed^n^n
^n• Drops several random pickups, a pill, or a trinket.
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_angeldevil:1263940944848228474> +35% chance for an Angel/Devil Deal.

machine.name: Hell Game
machine.bot_description:
Costs half a heart to play. Prioritizes red hearts first.
^n^nStarting from Chapter 4, costs a full heart to play.
^n^nNot having enough HP to play can kill Isaac.

^n^nWhen given a heart, the beggar will lift one of the skulls up, revealing a Black Heart, Blue Spider, bomb, item, key, coin, or card. He will then shuffle the skulls around and wait for Isaac to bump into one of them, which will result in a payout.
^n^nThe skull Isaac bumps into is not relevant.
^n^nLeaving the room before bumping into a skull will reset the prize.
^n^nIf a Devil Deal has been taken during the run, there is a 25% chance that a Shell Game will be replaced with a Hell Game.

^n^nPossible payouts^n^n
^n• 2 of the previously shown pickups, 1 if it was a Black Heart or a card, or 2-3 if they were coins.
^n• Enemy Spider.

^n^nFinal payout^n^n
^n• Random item from the Devil Room item pool.

^n^nWhen destroyed^n^n
^n• Spawns 2 Enemy Spiders.

machine.name: Crane Game
machine.bot_description:
Costs 5¢ to play.
^n^nThe machine will display one random item from the Crane Game item pool, and can give up to 3 items before exploding.
^n^nBumping into the machine has a 25% chance to pay out with the displayed item, and 75% to do nothing.
^n^nCurse of the Blind! affects the Crane Game item, when displayed, and when won.
^n^nIf all items in the item pool have been picked up, the Crane Game will only dispense Buddy in a Box.

^n^nWhen destroyed^n^n
Drops several random pickups.

machine.name: Confessional
machine.bot_description:
Costs half a heart to play. Prioritizes red hearts first.
^n^nStarting from Chapter 4, costs a full heart to play.
^n^nNot having enough HP to play can kill Isaac.
^n^nHas a 30% chance to pay out on Normal Mode, and 25% on Hard Mode.

^n^nPossible payouts^n^n
^n• 5% - explode (cannot hurt Isaac), and spawn several random pickups
^n• 3.3% - explode (cannot hurt Isaac) and grant the final payout
^n• Removes a Broken Heart, if Isaac has one.
^n• 50% - Soul Heart
^n• 10% - Eternal Heart
^n• "You Feel Blessed!": removes the floor's curse, grants <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_angel:1263940933913804893> +10% Angel Room chance, and allows Isaac to find an Angel Room even if a Devil Deal has already been taken. If no Devil Deal has been taken, the Angel Room becomes guaranteed for that floor.

^n^nFinal payout^n^n
^n• Spawns an Angel Room item, or Redemption if a Devil Deal has been made during the run.

^n^nWhen destroyed^n^n
^n• Spawns several random pickups.

machine.name: Rotten Beggar
machine.bot_description:
Costs 1¢ to play.
^n^nEvery 3rd (sometimes less, rarely 4th) coin donated will result in a payout.
^n^nRotten Beggars have an 8% chance to replace Beggars.

^n^nPossible payouts^n^n
^n• 1-3 Blue Flies
^n• 1-3 Blue Spiders
^n• Bone Heart
^n• Rotten Heart
^n• Fish Head
^n• Fish Tail
^n• Rotten Penny
^n• Bob's Bladder
^n• Fart

^n^nFinal payout^n^n
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_angel:1263940933913804893> +10% chance for an Angel Room.
^n• Item from the Rotten Beggar item pool.

^n^nWhen destroyed^n^n
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_angeldevil:1263940944848228474> +35% chance for an Angel/Devil Deal.
^n• Spawns 2 Small Maggots.
^n• Chance to drop a Rotten Heart.

machine.name: Revive Machine
machine.keywords: blue machine new machine revival machine donation
machine.bot_description:
Appears in the starting room of each floor in Online Co-op Mode. Does not appear during singleplayer.
^n^nRequires 10¢ in order to revive a dead character. Coins are donated one by one until the required amount is deposited, after which a selection menu appears for the character to be revived.
^n^nEach revival increases the required amount by +2¢.
^n^nDonations are preserved for the duration of the run.
^n^nBlowing it up makes the machine unusable for the rest of the floor, and can drop one of the following:
^n• 33% → nothing
^n• 33% → Soul Heart
^n• 29% → Eternal Heart
^n• 5% → 1up!

machine.name: Blood Donation Machine
machine.bot_description:
Costs half a heart to play. Prioritizes red hearts first.
^n^nStarting from Chapter 4, costs a full heart to play.
^n^nNot having enough HP to play can kill Isaac.

^n^nPossible payouts^n^n
^n• 1-3 coins of any type (only 1 if playing on Hard Mode). When playing as Keeper or Tainted Keeper, 0-1 coins.
^n• Rarely drops Child's Heart.
^n• Explodes, giving one of the final payouts.

^n^nFinal payout^n^n
^nOne of the following:
^n• Blood Bag
^n• IV Bag
^n^nMultiple Blood Bags can appear per run, but only 1 IV Bag can spawn.

^n^nWhen destroyed^n^n
^n• Several coins or hearts.

machine.name: Fortune Telling Machine
machine.keywords: blue arcade crystal ball soul heart card
machine.bot_description:
Costs 1¢ to play.

^n^nPossible payouts^n^n
^n• 65% - displays a random fortune text or seed on screen
^n• 10.7% - trinket
^n• 10.7% - soul heart
^n• 10.7% - card/rune
^n• 1.75% - self-destruct (cannot hurt Isaac) and spawn several random pickups
^n• 1.16% - self-destruct and spawn Crystal Ball

^n^nWhen destroyed^n^n
^n• 78% - 2-3 random pickups (35%: 1-3 coins; 20% - heart; 30% - bomb; 15% - key)
^n• 10% - pill
^n• 10% - trinket
^n• 1% - random chest
^n• 1% - Locked Chest

machine.name: Beggar
machine.bot_description:
Costs 1¢ to play.

^n^nPossible payouts^n^n
^n• Random pickup.
^n• Random card.
^n^nOn Hard Mode, the first payout will happen after at least 6 donations, while on other modes payout may happen after any amount of donations.

^n^nFinal payout^n^n
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_angel:1263940933913804893> +35% chance for an Angel Room.
^n• 50% - one of the following items: Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner, Dessert, Rotten Meat.
^n• 50% - item from the Beggar item pool.

^n^nWhen destroyed^n^n
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_angeldevil:1263940944848228474> +35% chance for an Angel/Devil Deal.
^n• Spawns several random pickups.

machine.name: Devil Beggar
machine.bot_description:
Costs half a heart to play. Prioritizes red hearts first.
^n^nStarting from Chapter 4, costs a full heart to play.
^n^nNot having enough HP to play can kill Isaac.

^n^nPossible payouts^n^n
^n• Random card.
^n• Random pill.
^n• Random trinket.
^n^nOn Hard Mode, the first payout will happen after at least 6 donations, and any subsequent payout requires at least 3. On other modes, payout may happen anywhere between 1-8 donations.

^n^nFinal payout^n^n
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_devil:1263940081635557456> +35% chance for a Devil Deal.
^n• Item from the Devil Room item pool.

^n^nWhen destroyed^n^n
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_angel:1263940933913804893> +35% chance for an Angel Room.
^n• 2 enemy spiders.

machine.name: Shell Game
machine.bot_description:
Costs 1¢ to play.

^n^nWhen given a coin, the beggar will lift one of the skulls up, revealing a coin, bomb, red heart, key, or Skatole. He will then shuffle the skulls around and wait for Isaac to bump into one of them, which will result in a payout.
^n^nThe skull Isaac bumps into is not relevant.
^n^nLeaving the room before bumping into a skull will reset the prize.
^n^nEven though a Shell Game item pool exists, it is not used by this machine.

^n^nPossible payouts^n^n
^n• 2 of the previously shown pickup, or 3 if a coin was shown. These can be of any variant.
^n• Enemy Attack Fly.

^n^nFinal payout^n^n
^n• Skatole

^n^nWhen destroyed^n^n
^n• Spawns several random pickups.

machine.name: Key Master
machine.bot_description:
Costs 1 key to play.

^n^nHaving a Golden Key does not affect the Key Master in any way. Keys will still be consumed normally.

^n^nPossible payouts^n^n
^n• Random chest.

^n^nFinal payout^n^n
^n• Item from the Key Master item pool.
^n• Or Paper Clip.

^n^nWhen destroyed^n^n
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_angeldevil:1263940944848228474> +35% chance for an Angel/Devil Deal.
^n• Several random pickups.

machine.name: Donation Machine
machine.bot_description:
Touching the machine will donate 1¢ to it, increasing the displayed total by one.
^n^nThe total amount of donations persist between runs and contribute towards unlocking specific items, and upgrading the shop, resulting in better shop layouts.
^n^nDonation Machines cannot appear while achievements are disabled.

^n^nPossible payouts^n^n
^n• 2% chance to grant <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_luck:1263940158839849010> +1 luck.
^n• 0.15% chance to jam the machine, making it unavailable for the rest of the run. This chance increases by +0.15% with each coin donated during the run.
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_angel:1263940933913804893> increase Angel Room chance for every 10 pennies donated.

^n^nFinal payout^n^n
^n• Happens when donating the 1000th penny, which makes the machine explode, spawning ~12 dimes.
^n• This will reset the total amount of donations back to 0¢, without reverting any previously unlocked achievements or shop upgrades.

^n^nWhen destroyed^n^n
^n• 7-14 pennies. These pennies, plus an additional 1 penny, are deducted from the total amount of donations.
^n• The machine stays destroyed for the rest of the run.

machine.name: Bomb Bum
machine.bot_description:
Costs 1 bomb to play.

^n^nHaving a Golden Bomb does not affect the Bomb Bum in any way.

^n^nHas explosion immunity and can only be destroyed by Mama Mega!, Mega Bean, Mega Mush and Larynx. 

^n^nPossible payouts^n^n
^n• 1-3 pennies.
^n• Random heart.

^n^nFinal payout^n^n
^n• Item from the Bomb Bum item pool.

^n^nWhen bombed^n^n
^n• Spawns 6 Troll Bombs around the room.
^n• His own Troll Bombs cannot make him spawn more bombs.
^n^nWhen destroyed^n^n
^n• <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_angeldevil:1263940944848228474> +35% chance for an Angel/Devil Deal.
^n• Drops several random pickups.

character.name: Isaac
character.bot_description: The D6 once unlocked.

character.name: Magdalene
character.keywords: maggie golden hair yellow hair girl woman
character.unlock_method: Have 7 or more Red Heart containers at one time.
character.bot_description:
Yum Heart
^n^nFull Health after completing the Aprils Fool challenge. This guarantees both Full Health and Health Up to be in the run's pill rotation.

character.name: The Lost
character.unlock_method: Die in a Sacrifice Room while holding {{i|Missing Poster}}.
character.bot_description:
Eternal D6
^n^nHoly Mantle after donating 879 coins to the Greed Donation Machine. The effect becomes inherent to The Lost rather than being shown as an item.
^n^nDescription^n^n^n
Has no health and dies in one hit.
^n^nHas the ability to fly.
^n^nShoots spectral tears.
^n^nCan take Devil Deals and other items that require health containers in order to purchase for free. Doing so will despawn all other items in the room that require health.

character.name: Lazarus II
character.bot_description:
Anemic: the item's effects become permanently active after completing the Backasswards challenge.
^n^nDescription^n^n^n
Only accessible by dying and reviving as Lazarus, or by using Lazarus' Rags.
^n^nReverts to Lazarus upon traveling to another floor.
^n^nCan be used to obtain completion marks for Lazarus.

character.name: Black Judas
character.bot_description:
No starting items.
^n^nDescription^n^n^n
Can only be accessed by dying while holding Judas' Shadow.
^n^nCannot have Red Heart containers. Any item that gives Red Heart containers will grant a Black Heart instead.
^n^nCan be used to obtain completion marks for Judas.

character.name: Lilith
character.unlock_method: Defeat Ultra Greed as {{i|Azazel}}.
character.bot_description:
Box of Friends
^n^nIncubus (inherent)
^n^nCambion Conception
^n^nDescription^n^n^n
Lilith is blindfolded and cannot shoot any tears on her own, thus relies on her Incubus to deal damage.

character.name: Keeper
character.unlock_method: Donate 1000 coins to the {{i|Greed Donation Machine}}.
character.bot_description:
1¢ after defeating Hush as Keeper.
^n^nStore Key after defeating Satan as Keeper.
^n^nWooden Nickel after defeating Isaac as Keeper.
^n^nDescription^n^n^n
Shoots 3 tears in a spread at once, similar to The Inner Eye.
^n^nUses coins as heart containers, starting with 2, and losing 1 each time he's hit. Health is replenished by picking up coins off the ground (1 Penny = 1 heart container). Doing so does not add a coin to his coin counter.
^n^nIf a heart container is lost, it can be replenished with an HP up item.
^n^nThe maximum number of coin heart containers that can be acquired via normal HP up items is 3.
^n^nUpon defeating Hush as Keeper, he will start with 3 heart containers.
^n^nDevil Deals cost money instead of heart containers, at the rate of 15¢ for an item that would cost 1 heart container, and 30¢ for 2.
^n^nAll heart pickups are converted into 1-5 Blue Flies depending on the heart's quality.

character.name: Apollyon
character.unlock_method: Defeat Mega Satan.
character.bot_description: Void

character.name: The Forgotten
character.unlock_method: ^n1) Have The Lamb defeated at least once.^n2) Defeat the first floor boss under a minute. Mom's voice can be heard if successful.^n3) Go to the starting room and bomb the shadow on the floor. This will drop {{id|c550}}. If no bomb is available, one is guaranteed to spawn from the first sacrifice in the Sacrifice Room.^n4) Acquire {{id|c551}} by defeating Boss Rush, in order to form {{i|Mom's Shovel}}.^n5) Use the item in a dirt patch in the Dark Room.
character.bot_description:
No starting items.
^n^nDescription^n^n^n
Consists of 2 characters (The Forgotten and The Soul) that can be switched by using the drop button.
^n^nBoth characters share the same health bar, so each form can only have a maximum of 6 heart containers.
^n^nIf either character dies, both die.
^n^nTaking a Devil Deal that requires more heart containers than currently available and switching to the other character before health is deducted will not kill the characters. However, the form that took the deal won't be available to switch to until healed.
^n^n
The Forgotten^n^n^n
Cannot acquire heart containers. Any regular heart containers will be turned to Bone Hearts, while any Soul Hearts and Black Hearts will be given to The Soul.
^n^nThe Forgotten uses a bone club that can be swung as a melee weapon instead of firing regular tears.
^n^nThe club deals 3x damage and deals knockback to enemies and The Forgotten himself. It synergizes with items and tear effects.
^n^nHolding down the firing button will charge up an attack that, when released, throws the bone club forward and boomerangs back to The Forgotten.
^n^nThe attack can be released before fully charged, but it will travel a shorter distance.
^n^nThe throwing attack deals 1.5x damage and can hit the same enemy twice (once when launched and once when returned).
^n^nIf the damage stat is lower than 3.5, the throw attack instead deals DamageStat + 1.75 damage.
^n^nThe bone club passes through walls and obstacles, and can be used to grab pickups from a distance, and even open chests.
^n^nThe shot speed stat has no effect.
^n^nUnlike other characters, breaking a Bone Heart will affect the Devil Deal chance, unless the heart is broken via means of self-sacrifice.
^n^n
The Soul^n^n^n
The Soul is chained to The Forgotten and can only move a set distance from him.
^n^nCannot have any Red Heart containers. HP up items will grant Soul Hearts instead.
^n^nHas the ability to fly and shoots spectral tears.
^n^nWhen playing as The Soul, The Forgotten is immovable, cannot be damaged, and will block shots, as well as attract any projectiles in a very small radius.

character.name: Bethany
character.unlock_method: Defeat Mom's Heart/It Lives! on {{stat|hard}} Hard Mode as {{i|Lazarus}} without dying during the run.
character.bot_description:
Book of Virtues
^n^nDescription^n^n^n
Unable to use Soul Hearts and Black Hearts as health. She instead uses them as soul charges, as an alternative to charging active items.
^n^nSoul charges are displayed on the HUD and operate at the rate of 1 soul charge per half soul heart. Bethany starts with 4 soul charges.
^n^nSoul charges can be used to use an active item without having enough regular charges to do so. This is displayed by the item bar having blue instead of green charges. The amount of blue charges is equal to how many soul charges are going to be consumed if the item is used.
^n^nUp to 99 soul charges can be held at a time.

character.name: Jacob and Esau
character.unlock_method: Defeat Mother.
character.bot_description:
No starting items.
^n^nDescription^n^n^n
Consists of 2 characters that move and shoot at the same time.
^n^nHolding down the drop button allows Jacob to move independently while Esau stays stationary.
^n^nWhen one character dies, they both die.
^n^nThey share the same coins, bombs, and keys, but have their own separate stats, health bar, and item inventories.
^n^nEsau's health bar and active item is displayed in the lower-right corner. His stats are displayed under Jacob's, and items on the Found HUD are placed on the right side.
^n^nEsau's active item can be used by pressing the use consumable button. Using an actual consumable requires holding down the drop button before pressing the corresponding character's active item button.
^n^nPlacing down a bomb will make both characters place 2 for the price of 1.
^n^nWith correct timing, it is possible to take 2 items (one for each character) from a set of item pedestals that disappear once one of them is taken.
^n^nThe speed stat is shared between the characters, and each of them gets half of any speed upgrade.
^n^nTransformations are not shared. Each character has their own transformation progress.
^n^nKey items such as Key Piece 1 and Key Piece 2 will combine regardless of which character picked them up.
^n^nThe luck stat is combined for game events that depend on the character's luck.

character.name: Cain
character.unlock_method: Hold 55!c! at once.
character.bot_description:
Lucky Foot
^n^nPaper Clip after donating 68 coins to the Greed Donation Machine.
^n^nDescription^n^n^n
Can only shoot tears from his right eye.

character.name: Tainted Isaac
character.unlock_method: Open up the hidden Red Door in the Home level as {{i|Isaac}}.
character.bot_description:
No starting items.
^n^nDescription^n^n^n
Can hold only 8 passive items at a time. They are displayed in the top-left corner of the screen, with one of them highlighted by a white square.
^n^nPicking up the 9th item will replace the highlighted item and drop it on the ground.
^n^nThe currently highlighted item can be cycled by using the drop button.
^n^nAll new item pedestals cycle between 2 items for Isaac to choose from. This does not apply to pedestals that are dropped.
^n^nItems with the quest tag, as well as Birthright, don't take up inventory space.
^n^nDropping items removes their passive effects, however any health or pickups gained from them will be kept.

character.name: Tainted Magdalene
character.unlock_method: Open up the hidden Red Door in the Home level as {{i|Magdalene}}.
character.bot_description:
Yum Heart (consumable slot; heals 2 red hearts instead of 1)
^n^nDescription^n^n^n
When her health is above 2 Red Hearts, she leaves damaging red creep on the ground and loses half a heart each 10 seconds.
^n^nThe health loss affects all types of hearts except Rotten Hearts, but red hearts are prioritized and drained first.
^n^nLosing the leaking hearts does not affect the Devil Deal chance. Only non-leaking ones do.
^n^nIf she has no red hearts, all hearts will leak until she has half a heart left.
^n^nShe receives double healing from all sources except heart pickups.
^n^nAll enemies have a 50% chance of dropping a Half Heart upon death, that will disappear after 2 seconds unless picked up.
^n^nTouching an enemy will perform a melee attack that deals 6x damage and guarantees a Half Heart to spawn from enemies killed by it.
^n^nThe melee attack synergizes with held items.

character.name: Tainted Cain
character.unlock_method: Open up the hidden Red Door in the Home level as {{i|Cain}}.
character.bot_description:
Bag of Crafting (consumable slot)
^n^nDescription^n^n^n
Can only shoot tears from his right eye.
^n^nCannot pick up any items and must use the Bag of Crafting to obtain them.
^n^nTouching an item pedestal will convert it into an assortment of pickups. An exception to this rule are items with the quest tag.
^n^nSpecific pickups are dropped when touching items based on the current room:
^n• Secret Room: Bone Hearts
^n• Curse Room: Rotten Hearts
^n• Planetarium: random runes
^n• Devil Room: Black Hearts
^n• Angel Room Eternal Hearts
^n^nCrafting an active item will transform the old active item into pickups instead of dropping it.

character.name: Tainted Judas
character.unlock_method: Open up the hidden Red Door in the Home level as {{i|Judas}}.
character.bot_description:
Dark Arts (consumable slot)
^n^nDescription^n^n^n
Using Dark Arts grants a temporary <:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +1 damage bonus for every enemy/projectile walked through, that wears off at a rate of -0.25 every half a second.
^n^nCannot have Red Heart containers. Any item that gives Red Heart containers will grant a Black Heart instead.

character.name: Tainted ???
character.unlock_method: Open up the hidden Red Door in the Home level as {{i|???|character}}.
character.bot_description:
Hold (consumable slot)
^n^nDescription^n^n^n
Cannot have Red Heart containers. Any item that gives Red Heart containers will grant a Soul Heart instead.
^n^nBomb pickups are replaced with poop pickups. They are displayed on the HUD instead of bombs and up to 9 can be held at a time.
^n^nThe top-left corner of the screen shows a list of 6 different poop effects in set order.
^n^nAttempting to place a bomb will consume a poop and grant the effects of the leftmost shown poop effect.
^n^nPoop pickups have a chance to drop when killing enemies, and when dealing damage. Small poop pickups give 1 poop, and large ones give 3.
^n^nItems that give bombs will grant a Blue Fly for each bomb they should've given.
^n^nSpawns a poop upon death and drops a portion of his currently held poops.
^n^n
Poop variants^n^n^n
Some poop variants grant a poop that can be thrown, while others activate a one-time effect. Throwables poops deal 15 damage to enemies they hit.

^n^nThrowable:
^n^n Poop: normal poop just like ones found in regular runs.
^n^n Corn Poop: spawns a Blue Fly every 2 seconds. Up to 3 Blue Flies can be around it at a time.
^n^n Flaming Poop: deals 22 damage per tick to enemies that touch it. Once destroyed, leaves behind a fire that deals damage up to 3 times before disappearing. The first tick deals 22 damage, the second 16.5, and the third 11.
^n^n Stinky Poop: surrounded by a toxic cloud that deals 3.5 damage per tick (10.5 per second). If an explosion hits the cloud, it also explodes dealing 15 damage. When the poop is destroyed, it spawns an even larger toxic cloud that lingers for 5 seconds.
^n^n Black Poop: creates slowing black creep in a very small radius. When destroyed, deals 10 damage to all enemies and confuses them for 2 seconds. Creep will be continue to be created even after the poop is destroyed.
^n^n White Poop: acts the same as Hallowed Ground.
^n^n Stone Poop: hits enemies up to 3 times and takes much longer to break.
^n^n Poop Bomb: explodes after 1.5 seconds even if not thrown. Synergizes with bomb effects.

^n^nNon-throwable:
^n^n Fart: deals 5 damage, knocks back nearby enemies and projectiles and poisons enemies. Also spawns a toxic cloud that poisons enemies. If caught in an explosion, the cloud also explodes and deals 15 damage.
^n^n Explosive Diarrhea: drops 5 live bombs one after the other. They synergize with bomb effects.
^n^n Brown Creep: creates a trail of brown creep that lasts for the entire room. It deals 1.5x damage per tick (15x per second). Standing on the creep grants +1 damage, +1.5 tears and other effects depending on what the creep is in contact with:
^n• Black Poop: slows down enemies and grants slowing tears.
^n• Stinky Poop: poisons enemies and grants poison tears.
^n• Flaming Poop: sets enemies on fire and grants Fire Mind tears.
^n• Holy Poop: grants homing tears and 3x tears and damage.
^n• Stone Poop: keeps all extra effects of other poops even if they are destroyed, as long as the Stone Poop itself is not destroyed.

character.name: Tainted Eve
character.unlock_method: Open up the hidden Red Door in the Home level as {{i|Eve}}.
character.bot_description:
Sumptorium (consumable slot)
^n^nDescription^n^n^n
When at half a heart and no blood clots are alive, she gains the effects of Whore of Babylon, and starts wielding Sumptorium as a melee weapon that functions the same as Mom's Knife.

character.name: Tainted Samson
character.unlock_method: Open up the hidden Red Door in the Home level as {{i|Samson}}.
character.bot_description:
No starting items.
^n^nDescription^n^n^n
Dealing or taking damage makes Samson progressively more red. After reaching a certain point, he gains the effects of Berserk!.
^n^nThe amount of damage dealt required to activate the effect is equal to 120 + 40 × CurrentFloor. Taking damage adds +10%.

character.name: Tainted Azazel
character.unlock_method: Open up the hidden Red Door in the Home level as {{i|Azazel}}.
character.bot_description:
0 - The Fool
^n^nDescription^n^n^n
Fires a thin Brimstone beam instead of tears that deals 0.5x damage for 6 ticks.
^n^nAt the start of charging the attack, Azazel performs a Hemoptysis sneeze.

character.name: Tainted Lazarus
character.unlock_method: Open up the hidden Red Door in the Home level as {{i|Lazarus}}.
character.bot_description:
Flip (consumable slot)
^n^nDescription^n^n^n
Has two forms, Tainted Lazarus and Dead Tainted Lazarus, that switch upon every room clear.
^n^nEach form has its own health bar, stats, and item inventory.
^n^nFlip is shared between the two forms and can be used to switch between them when fully charged.
^n^nItems with the lazarusshared tag have their passive effects shared between the two forms. This is also the case for the lazarussharedglobal tag, except for direct stat changes granted by these items.

character.name: Judas
character.unlock_method: Defeat Satan.
character.bot_description: The Book of Belial

character.name: Tainted Eden
character.unlock_method: Open up the hidden Red Door in the Home level as {{i|Eden}}.
character.bot_description:
0-1 random trinket, pill, or card.
^nRandom active item.
^nRandom passive item.
^n^nDescription^n^n^n
Starts with randomized stats, items, and hairstyle.
^n^nRequires Eden tokens in order to play. Eden tokens are awarded every time one of the following is defeated: Mom's Heart, It Lives, Ultra Greed, or The Beast.
^n^nStarting a run as Tainted Eden consumes an Eden token.
^n^nTainted Eden's stat multipliers are not randomized.
^n^nStarting items cannot be ones with the noeden tag.
^n^nTaking damage causes all of Eden's stats, items, trinkets, consumables, and his hairstyle to be rerolled. Items will reroll into other items from the same pool they were obtained from.
^n^nTaking self-damage, such as from a Blood Donation Machine, or dying, will not trigger a reroll.

character.name: Tainted Lost
character.keywords: the baleful gray grey ghost soul
character.unlock_method: Open up the hidden Red Door in the Home level as {{i|The Lost}}.
character.bot_description:
Holy Card
^n^nDescription^n^n^n
Has no health and dies in one hit.
^n^nHas the ability to fly.
^n^nShoots spectral tears.
^n^nCan take Devil Deals and other items that require health containers in order to purchase for free. Doing so will despawn all other items in the room that require health.
^n^nAll cards have a 10% chance to reroll into Holy Card.
^n^nOnly items with the offensive and quest tags can be encountered naturally. Other items can only appear by using items such as Spindown Dice, Death Certificate, Soul of Lilith or as set drops from grid entities.
^n^nItems with quality 2 or less have a 20% chance of being rerolled.

character.name: Tainted Lilith
character.unlock_method: Open up the hidden Red Door in the Home level as {{i|Lilith}}.
character.bot_description:
No starting items.
^n^nDescription^n^n^n
Instead of firing tears, she launches a Gello familiar that behaves the same as the item, and is recalled when stopped firing.

character.name: Tainted Keeper
character.unlock_method: Open up the hidden Red Door in the Home level as {{i|Keeper}}.
character.bot_description:
No starting items.
^n^nDescription^n^n^n
Shoots 4 tears in a spread at once, similar to Mutant Spider.
^n^nUses coins as heart containers, starting with 2, and losing 1 each time he's hit. Health is replenished by picking up coins off the ground (1 Penny = 1 heart container). Doing so does not add a coin to his coin counter.
^n^nIf a heart container is lost, it can be replenished with an HP up item.
^n^nThe maximum number of coin heart containers that can be acquired via normal HP up items is 2.
^n^nA random coin is dropped from enemies killed. The coin disappears after 2 seconds unless picked up.
^n^nChampion enemies and mini-bosses drop 2 coins, while bosses drop several coins that take longer to disappear.
^n^nEnemies spawned later in the room are not guaranteed to spawn a coin. This chance decreases as more enemies spawn, and coins will eventually stop spawning in that room.
^n^nAll items encountered must be paid for in order to be picked up, including ones in Treasure Rooms, Boss Rooms, Angel Rooms, Devil Rooms, etc.
^n^nThey will cost either 15¢ or 30¢ depending on their heart container price if they would appear in a Devil Deal, or 10¢ for specific Shop items.
^n^nItems with the quest tag, and some set drops such as items from mini-bosses, chests, rocks, beggars/machines, etc, do not require payment.
^n^nShops do not require a key to open and have much more stock to offer, going up to 8 items/pickups for sale in a fully upgraded Shop.
^n^nShops will contain at least 1 Shop item, 1 Boss item, and 2 Treasure Room items. The other 4 slots can be keys, bombs, cards, pills, and trinkets that are sold for 5¢.
^n^nAll heart pickups are converted into 1-5 Blue Flies depending on the heart's quality.

character.name: Tainted Apollyon
character.keywords: the empty appollyon appolyon apolyon gray grey
character.unlock_method: Open up the hidden Red Door in the Home level as {{i|Apollyon}}.
character.bot_description:
Abyss (consumable slot)
^n^nDescription^n^n^n
Starts with an Abyss locust.

character.name: Tainted Forgotten
character.keywords: bones bony the fettered skeleton gray grey
character.unlock_method: Open up the hidden Red Door in the Home level as {{i|The Forgotten}}.
character.bot_description:
No starting items.
^n^nDescription^n^n^n
Consists of 2 characters: Tainted Forgotten which cannot move on his own, and Tainted Soul that can pick up Tainted Forgotten and throw him around.
^n^nTainted Soul is the character that can move, fly, and can be damaged, while Tainted Forgotten is the one that can shoot but cannot be damaged. The Soul cannot shoot or deal any damage.
^n^nEven though The Soul can be damaged, the health bar internally belongs to the body.
^n^nTouching the body will pick it up, allowing The Soul to throw it. This will cause it to swing his bone club that deals 3x damage, and the impact of the body itself deals 5 flat damage.
^n^nJust like regular The Forgotten, the bone club can be charged and thrown to deal 1.5x damage.
^n^nThe attack can be released before fully charged, but it will travel a shorter distance.
^n^nEnemies will almost always target the body instead of The Soul.
^n^nThe body can be used to guard against enemy projectiles and block their movement.
^n^nThe Soul cannot have Red Heart containers. Any item that gives Red Heart containers will grant a Soul Heart instead.
^n^nBoth the body and The Soul can pick up items and share the same inventory and health bar.
^n^nPlacing a bomb will place it underneath the body.
^n^nAny items picked up will behave as if the body picked them up, such as familiars that will orbit the body instead of The Soul. However, speed upgrades and invincibility effects will affect The Soul instead.
^n^nThe bone club passes through walls and obstacles, and can be used to grab pickups from a distance, and even open chests.

character.name: Tainted Bethany
character.unlock_method: Open up the hidden Red Door in the Home level as {{i|Bethany}}.
character.bot_description:
Lemegeton (consumable slot)
^n^nDescription^n^n^n
Unable to use Red Hearts as health. She instead uses them as blood charges, as an alternative to charging active items. Any item that gives Red Heart containers will grant a Soul Heart instead.
^n^nBlood charges are displayed on the HUD and operate at the rate of 1 blood charge per half red heart. Bethany starts with 6 blood charges.
^n^nBlood charges can be used to use an active item without having enough regular charges to do so. This is displayed by the item bar having red instead of green charges. The amount of red charges is equal to how many blood charges are going to be consumed if the item is used.
^n^nUp to 99 blood charges can be held at a time.
^n^nAny stat ups granted by items are reduced by 25%.
^n^nFamiliars and orbitals deal 25% less damage.
^n^nFamiliars that drop pickups upon clearing a set amount of rooms will do so more infrequently (1-2 rooms increase).
^n^nDirect fire rate modifiers such as Mom's Perfume are not reduced.
^n^nThe soft tears cap for Tainted Bethany is 4.43 instead of 5.

character.name: Tainted Jacob
character.unlock_method: Open up the hidden Red Door in the Home level as {{i|Jacob and Esau}}.
character.bot_description:
Anima Sola (consumable slot)
^n^nDescription^n^n^n
Unlike Jacob and Esau, Tainted Jacob is the only character that can be controlled, while Esau appears as an enemy known as Dark Esau.
^n^nDark Esau appears in the room Jacob is in, 20-40 seconds after entering the floor. He emerges from a crack in the ground, creating a circle of damaging flames that hurt both enemies (6 damage) and Jacob.
^n^nDark Esau will continuously chase Jacob and persist between rooms, speeding up the further away and slowing down when within a short distance.
^n^nWhen near Jacob and they align in the cardinal directions, Dark Esau will perform a charge attack at Jacob, damaging any enemies in its path while leaving behind a blazing trail that damages enemies and sets them on fire.
^n^nDark Esau deals 30 contact damage per tick to enemies, while his flames deal 10. His charge attack bypasses boss armor.
^n^nIf Dark Esau touches Jacob, Jacob turns into a ghost similar to The Lost, gaining the ability to fly and shoot spectral tears.
^n^nWhile in ghost form, Jacob will die in one hit or if touched again by Dark Esau. He still has a health bar that can be filled normally, however it is shown faded on the HUD and will not protect against damage.
^n^nDevil Deals can be taken for free while a ghost, however only one can be taken in a room, while the others will disappear.
^n^nThe ghost form persists for the remainder of the floor. Going to the next floor will return Jacob to his normal form.
^n^nUsing Anima Sola will always prioritize Dark Esau, locking him in place. When the chains break (automatically or by using the item again), Dark Esau will instantly perform his charge attack. This can be used as an offensive mechanic against enemies.
^n^nIf Anima Sola is used in a room without enemies before Dark Esau has spawned, it will immediately summon him without wasting a charge.
^n^nDark Esau cannot convert Jacob while chained, but still deals contact damage to enemies.
^n^nDark Esau cannot be killed.

character.unlock_method: Defeat Mom's Heart 10 times.
character.bot_description:
The Poop
^n^nDescription^n^n^n
Cannot have Red Heart containers. Any item that gives Red Heart containers will grant a Soul Heart instead.
^n^nDevil Deal items cost the same amount of Soul Hearts as they would cost Red Hearts, unlike with other characters that have no Red Hearts.
^n^nDestroying poop will spawn a Blue Fly.

character.name: Eve
character.unlock_method: Complete 2 floors in a row without picking up any hearts.
character.bot_description:
Whore of Babylon
^n^nDead Bird
^n^nRazor Blade after donating 439 coins to the Greed Donation Machine.
^n^nDescription^n^n^n
The Whore of Babylon and Dead Bird effects activate when Eve has 1 Red Heart remaining, rather than activating at half a heart. This also sets her damage multiplier to x1.

character.name: Samson
character.unlock_method: Complete 2 floors in a row without taking damage.
character.bot_description:
Bloody Lust
^n^nChild's Heart after completing the Ultra Hard challenge.

character.name: Azazel
character.unlock_method: Make 3 deals with the devil in one run.
character.bot_description:
0 - The Fool
^n^nDescription^n^n^n
Shoots a short-ranged Brimstone which deals damage 8 times per second instead of tears.
^n^nHas the ability to fly.

character.name: Lazarus
character.unlock_method: Have 4 or more {{i|Heart (soul)|pickup|Soul Hearts}} or {{i|Black Heart|pickup|Black Hearts}} at one time.
character.bot_description:
A random pill.
^n^nAnemic after completing the Backasswards challenge.
^n^nDescription^n^n^n
Has an extra life that causes him to respawn as Lazarus II, losing one heart container in the process.
^n^nLazarus transforms back to his original form when traveling to a new floor, and regains back the extra life.
^n^nTransforming to the other character grants a permanent +0.5 damage to both forms.

character.name: Eden
character.unlock_method: Complete Chapter 4.
character.bot_description:
0-1 random trinket, pill, or card.
^nRandom active item.
^nRandom passive item.
^n^nDescription^n^n^n
Starts with randomized stats, items, and hairstyle.
^n^nRequires Eden tokens in order to play. Eden tokens are awarded every time one of the following is defeated: Mom's Heart, It Lives, Ultra Greed, or The Beast.
^n^nStarting a run as Eden consumes an Eden token.
^n^nEden's stat multipliers are not randomized.
^n^nStarting items cannot be ones with the noeden tag.

transformation.name: Guppy
transformation.bot_description:
Obtained by acquiring any 3 items with the guppy tag.
^n^nGrants Isaac flight and spawns a Blue Fly 66% of the time when a tear hits an enemy.

transformation.name: Beelzebub
transformation.keywords: black lord of the flies wings fly flight bug insect
transformation.bot_description:
Obtained by acquiring any 3 items with the fly tag.
^n^nGrants Isaac flight and converts small enemy flies into Blue Flies.
^n^nLarger enemy flies such as Boom Flies, Pooters, Suckers, Moters, will become permanently charmed and follow you between rooms.

transformation.name: Bookworm
transformation.bot_description:
Obtained by acquiring any 3 items with the book tag.
^n^nCauses Isaac to fire an additional tear 25% of the time.

transformation.name: Adult
transformation.bot_description:
Obtained after consuming 3 Puberty pills.
^n^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_red:1263940190515232838> +1 full Red Heart container.
^n^nMakes Isaac's voice deeper.

transformation.name: Spider Baby
transformation.bot_description:
Obtained by acquiring any 3 items with the spider tag.
^n^nSpawns a spider familiar that slowly walks towards enemies and applies random status effects upon touching them.

transformation.name: Stompy
transformation.bot_description:
Obtained by acquiring any 3 items that increase Isaac's size, such as Leo, Magic Mushroom and One makes you larger.
^n^nGrants Isaac the ability to crush rocks upon touching them.
^n^nUpon taking damage, Isaac has a 20% chance to create a circular rock wave that deals 20 damage per second to any enemy caught in it.
^n^nThe rock waves cannot destroy machines.
^n^nCauses Isaac to create dust clouds as he walks.

transformation.name: Super Bum
transformation.bot_description:
Obtained by holding Bum Friend, Dark Bum and Key Bum at the same time.
^n^nCombines all 3 aforementioned familiars into Super Bum who automatically collects all coins, red hearts and keys off the ground and drops twice as many rewards as the regular bums would have.
^n^nThis also applies to items, as 2 items will be dropped whenever one would.
^n^nA unique animation plays when the transformation is acquired. See the video link below.

transformation.name: Fun Guy
transformation.bot_description:
Obtained by acquiring any 3 items with the mushroom tag.
^n^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_red:1263940190515232838> +1 full Red Heart container.

transformation.name: Seraphim
transformation.keywords: white angel wings fly flight faceless angel
transformation.bot_description:
Obtained by acquiring any 3 items with the angel tag.
^n^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_soul:1263940226758479953> +3 Soul Hearts.
^n^nGrants flight.

transformation.name: Bob
transformation.bot_description:
Obtained by acquiring any 3 items with the bob tag.
^n^nMakes Isaac leave green poisonous creep on the ground that deals 20 damage per second.
^n^nGrants poison immunity.

transformation.name: Spun
transformation.bot_description:
Obtained by acquiring any 3 items with the syringe tag.
^n^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> +2 damage.
^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_speed:1263940240675045417> +0.15 speed.
^n^nSpawns a random pill.

transformation.name: Yes Mother?
transformation.bot_description:
Obtained by acquiring any 3 items with the mom tag.
^n^nGrants a stationary Mom's Knife that trails behind Isaac and deals 2x Isaac's tear damage on contact.
^n^nThe knife synergizes as the item would.

transformation.name: Conjoined
transformation.bot_description:
Obtained by acquiring any 3 items with the baby tag.
^n^n<:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488><:stat_tears:1263940253836771458> -0.3 tears.
^n<:stat_arrowdn:1263940042561421488><:stat_damage:1263940065411727444> -0.3 damage.
^n^nCauses Isaac to shoot 3 tears simultaneously, of which 2 are fired diagonally.

transformation.name: Leviathan
transformation.keywords: black demon evil demon levathan levaithan levitan leviatan levaitan levithan levathian leaviathan levatian fly flight
transformation.bot_description:
Obtained by acquiring any 3 items with the devil tag.
^n^n<:stat_arrowup:1263934766697287770><:stat_black:1263940054078849086> +2 Black Hearts.
^n^nGrants flight.
^n^nCan be obtained as a rare reward from Sanguine Bond.

transformation.name: Oh Crap
transformation.bot_description:
Obtained by acquiring any 3 items with the poop tag.
^n^nCauses Isaac to heal half of a red heart each time a poop pile is destroyed.

curse.name: Curse of Darkness!
curse.bot_description: Makes the floor much darker, and barely lit by Isaac's aura.

curse.name: Curse of the Labyrinth!
curse.bot_description:
Makes the floor contain 2 Boss Rooms one after another, 2 item rooms, and count as 2 floors.
^n^nOnly the final Boss Room can spawn an Angel/Devil Deal.
^n^nCan only appear on the first floor of a chapter.

curse.name: Curse of the Lost!
curse.keywords: map hud amnesia ? question mark purple
curse.bot_description:
Removes the map from the HUD.
^n^nIncreases the total room count of the floor to the size of the next floor.

curse.name: Curse of the Unknown!
curse.bot_description:
Hides Isaac's health from the HUD.
^n^nDespite being hidden, health works normally.

curse.name: Curse of the Cursed!
curse.bot_description:
Changes every normal door into a cursed door that contains spikes which deal half a heart of damage to Isaac.
^n^nUnlike Curse Rooms, these doors deal damage from both ways when flown through.
^n^n<:stat_exclamation:1263940092494483568> Only available during the Cursed! challenge, or via the CVRS ED seed.

curse.name: Curse of the Maze!
curse.bot_description:
Entering a new room has a chance to take Isaac to the wrong room, indicated by a subtle screen-shake and sound effect. This can also happen when teleporting between rooms.
^n^nDiscovered rooms can randomly swap contents with another room of the same size.

curse.name: Curse of the Blind!
curse.bot_description: All item icons are replaced with a question mark, making them impossible to distinguish until picked up.

curse.name: Curse of the Giant!
curse.bot_description:
Merges normal-sized rooms into large rooms.
^n^n<:stat_exclamation:1263940092494483568> Currently not achievable naturally in game, and not fully working properly.
